flex-direction: column; gap: 0; padding-top: 24px; } Explore Specialities Specialities Stroke Spinal Cord Injury Traumatic Brain Injury Hemiplegia Quadriplegia & Paraplegia Post-Surgical Complications Motor Neuron Diseases Cerebral Palsy Parkinson's Disease Myopathy Disc & Spine Problems Sciatica Obesity Post-Covid Complications Muscular Dystrophy Osteoarthritis Rheumatoid Arthritis Developmental Delay Psychological Problems Autism Psychiatry OVERVIEW Autism Spectrum Disorder: Specialized Support for Every Child Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) is a complex neurodevelopmental condition characterized by challenges in social communication and interaction, alongside restricted and repetitive behaviors and interests. It exists on a broad spectrum — from individuals who are non-speaking and require significant daily support, to those who are highly verbal and academically capable but struggle with social interaction and sensory processing. At Ayurgreen Hospital, our Autism Specialist Program provides expert, evidence-based, family-centered support for children and young adults with ASD. We do not offer a 'cure' for autism — autism is a neurological difference, not a disease. Our goal is to help each autistic individual develop the skills and strategies to communicate, learn, participate, and thrive in their communities. Our program combines the most evidence-based behavioral and developmental interventions (ABA, DIR/Floortime, ESDM) with specialized speech, occupational, and sensory therapies — and uniquely integrates Ayurvedic approaches that are emerging as supportive in managing ASD-related GI issues, sleep disorders, and anxiety. ASD SUPPORT AREAS Autism Challenges We Support Comprehensive, evidence-based support addressing the communication, behavioral, sensory, and health challenges of ASD. Communication & Social Skills Non-verbal and minimally verbal autism with AAC support, early language intervention, ESDM programs, and social communication groups for verbal autistic individuals. Behavioral & Emotional Regulation ABA therapy for challenging behaviors, functional behavior assessments, PBS (Positive Behavior Support) plans, and anxiety management strategies for autistic children and young adults. Sensory Processing & Motor Skills Sensory integration therapy for hypersensitivity and hyposensitivity, proprioceptive and vestibular interventions, fine and gross motor skill development, and sensory diet programs. ASD INTERVENTION PROGRAM Comprehensive Autism Support Services Evidence-based, family-centered ASD support across communication, behavioral, sensory, and holistic health dimensions. 1 Speech, Language & Communication Intervention Comprehensive speech therapy targeting each child's specific communication needs: ESDM (Early Start Denver Model) for young children; AAC systems (PECS, SGDs, high-tech eye-gaze devices) for non-speaking autistic children; Social Communication intervention for verbal children; Pragmatic language groups for peer interaction skills; and parent coaching to support communication development at home. 2 Sensory Integration & Occupational Therapy Ayers Sensory Integration (ASI) therapy addressing the sensory processing differences common in autism — tactile defensiveness, proprioceptive seeking, vestibular hypersensitivity. Individualized sensory diets prescribed to regulate arousal and improve participation. Fine motor skills, handwriting, and self-care independence training. Environmental modification recommendations for home and school. 3 Ayurvedic & Holistic Support Ayurveda offers specific support for the co-occurring health challenges common in autism: GI dysbiosis and constipation (managed with Basti therapy and probiotic formulations); sleep disorders (managed with Ashwagandha and Shirodhara); anxiety and emotional dysregulation (Brahmi, Jatamansi formulations and Abhyanga with calming oils); and the overall neurological health support of Medhya Rasayana therapy. 4 Applied Behavior Analysis (ABA) & Behavioral Support Evidence-based ABA therapy for skill development (communication, self-care, academic, social) and management of challenging behaviors through positive reinforcement strategies. Functional Behavior Assessments (FBAs) identify the function of challenging behaviors, informing individualized Behavior Support Plans (BSPs) implemented consistently across home, school, and therapy settings. ASD SUPPORT TECHNOLOGY Technology & Approaches for ASD Support Evidence-based tools and therapies for comprehensive autism spectrum disorder support. AAC Communication Systems High-tech SGDs, PECS systems, and eye-gaze communication devices ensuring every non-verbal autistic child and young adult has a functional communication system. Sensory Integration Suite Specialized sensory gym with swings, climbing structures, and tactile materials for Ayers Sensory Integration therapy targeting sensory processing differences in autism. VR Social Skills Training Virtual reality environments for safe, controlled social skills practice — allowing autistic individuals to rehearse social scenarios in a low-stress, repeatable virtual environment. Ayurvedic GI & Sleep Support Basti therapy for GI dysbiosis and constipation, Brahmi and Ashwagandha for anxiety and sleep, and Abhyanga for sensory regulation and calming — supporting the co-occurring health challenges of autism. Family Training & Support Intensive parent training in ABA principles, communication strategies, and sensory diet implementation — ensuring evidence-based support continues at home 24/7. RECOVERY TIMELINE Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence. 1. Assessment Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel. 2. Diagnosis Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors. 3. Personalized Plan Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols. 4. Therapy Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments. 5. Monitoring Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data. 6. Recovery Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan. COMMON QUERIES Frequently Asked Questions Find answers to key details about the Autism program. What is the recovery protocol for this program? Our recovery protocol for Autism combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains. How long is the typical inpatient stay? Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways. Is robotic therapy safe for all patients? Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists. Are the Ayurvedic medicines safe? All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state. Can we coordinate with our existing neurologist? Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care. What is the daily therapy schedule? A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon. Do you offer post-discharge support? Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains. How do I book a consultation? You can book a virtual consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly. Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway. const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!container || !clip) return; const gap = 18; const totalWidth = clip.clientWidth; // Dynamic card count based on viewport width let n = 5; if (totalWidth < 480) n = 1; else if (totalWidth < 768) n = 2; else if (totalWidth < 1024) n = 3; else if (totalWidth < 1366) n = 4; else n = 5; const cardWidth = (totalWidth - gap * (n - 1)) / n; container.querySelectorAll('.rehab-card').forEach(card => { card.style.width = cardWidth + 'px'; card.style.minWidth = cardWidth + 'px'; }); container._cardWidth = cardWidth; container._gap = gap; container._visibleCards = n; // save dynamic visible card count // Always reset position when (re-)initialising container._offset = 0; container.style.transition = 'none'; container.style.transform = 'translateX(0px)'; updateSliderNav(scrollId); } // ── Move cards left/right ───────────────────────────────────── function slideCards(scrollId, dir) { const container = document.getElementById(scrollId); if (!container) return; const cardWidth = container._cardWidth || 255; const gap = container._gap || 18; const n = container._visibleCards || 5; // read dynamic count const total = container.querySelectorAll('.rehab-card').length; shadarasa: '#', kizil: '#', foundation: '#', acfhe: '#' }; // ── Mobile Drawer Toggle Script ───────────────────────────────── function initMobileMenu() { const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn'); const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-drawer'); const closeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-close-btn'); const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-therapies', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-videos', () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(1); }, () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); });

title: Autism Spectrum Disorder: Specialized Support for Every Child
desc: Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) is a complex neurodevelopmental condition characterized by challenges in social communication and interaction, alongside restrict...
content: Autism Spectrum Disorder: Specialized Support for Every Child Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) is a complex neurodevelopmental condition characterized by challenges in social communication and interaction, alongside restricted and repetitive behaviors and interests. It exists on a broad spectrum — from individuals who are non-speaking and require significant daily support, to those who are highly verbal and academically capable but struggle with social interaction and sensory processing. At Ayurgreen Hospital, our Autism Specialist Program provides expert, evidence-based, family-centered support for children and young adults with ASD. We do not offer a 'cure' for autism — autism is a neurological difference, not a disease. Our goal is to help each autistic individual develop the skills and strategies to communicate, learn, participate, and thrive in their communities. Our program combines the most evidence-based behavioral and developmental interventions (ABA, DIR/Floortime, ESDM) with specialized speech, occupational, and sensory therapies — and uniquely integrates Ayurvedic approaches that are emerging as supportive in managing ASD-related GI issues, sleep disorders, and anxiety.

title: Autism Challenges We Support
desc: Comprehensive, evidence-based support addressing the communication, behavioral, sensory, and health challenges of ASD.
content: Autism Challenges We Support Comprehensive, evidence-based support addressing the communication, behavioral, sensory, and health challenges of ASD.

title: Comprehensive Autism Support Services
desc: Evidence-based, family-centered ASD support across communication, behavioral, sensory, and holistic health dimensions.
content: Comprehensive Autism Support Services Evidence-based, family-centered ASD support across communication, behavioral, sensory, and holistic health dimensions.

title: Speech, Language & Communication Intervention
desc: Comprehensive speech therapy targeting each child's specific communication needs: ESDM (Early Start Denver Model) for young children; AAC systems (PECS, SGDs, h...
content: Speech, Language & Communication Intervention Comprehensive speech therapy targeting each child's specific communication needs: ESDM (Early Start Denver Model) for young children; AAC systems (PECS, SGDs, high-tech eye-gaze devices) for non-speaking autistic children; Social Communication intervention for verbal children; Pragmatic language groups for peer interaction skills; and parent coaching to support communication development at home.

title: Sensory Integration & Occupational Therapy
desc: Ayers Sensory Integration (ASI) therapy addressing the sensory processing differences common in autism — tactile defensiveness, proprioceptive seeking, vestibul...
content: Sensory Integration & Occupational Therapy Ayers Sensory Integration (ASI) therapy addressing the sensory processing differences common in autism — tactile defensiveness, proprioceptive seeking, vestibular hypersensitivity. Individualized sensory diets prescribed to regulate arousal and improve participation. Fine motor skills, handwriting, and self-care independence training. Environmental modification recommendations for home and school.

title: Ayurvedic & Holistic Support
desc: Ayurveda offers specific support for the co-occurring health challenges common in autism: GI dysbiosis and constipation (managed with Basti therapy and probioti...
content: Ayurvedic & Holistic Support Ayurveda offers specific support for the co-occurring health challenges common in autism: GI dysbiosis and constipation (managed with Basti therapy and probiotic formulations); sleep disorders (managed with Ashwagandha and Shirodhara); anxiety and emotional dysregulation (Brahmi, Jatamansi formulations and Abhyanga with calming oils); and the overall neurological health support of Medhya Rasayana therapy.

title: Applied Behavior Analysis (ABA) & Behavioral Support
desc: Evidence-based ABA therapy for skill development (communication, self-care, academic, social) and management of challenging behaviors through positive reinforce...
content: Applied Behavior Analysis (ABA) & Behavioral Support Evidence-based ABA therapy for skill development (communication, self-care, academic, social) and management of challenging behaviors through positive reinforcement strategies. Functional Behavior Assessments (FBAs) identify the function of challenging behaviors, informing individualized Behavior Support Plans (BSPs) implemented consistently across home, school, and therapy settings.

title: Technology & Approaches for ASD Support
desc: Evidence-based tools and therapies for comprehensive autism spectrum disorder support.
content: Technology & Approaches for ASD Support Evidence-based tools and therapies for comprehensive autism spectrum disorder support.

content: Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.

flex-direction: column; gap: 0; padding-top: 24px; } Explore Departments Departments Ayurveda Physiotherapy Robotic Rehabilitation Occupational Therapy Speech Therapy Virtual Reality Yoga and Meditation Acupuncture Reflexology Hydro / Aquatic Therapy Pediatrics Slimming Treatment Pain Management Diet & Nutrition Counseling Dentistry Modern Medicine Assistive Devices The Legacy Ayurveda Therapy at Ayurgreen Hospital At Ayurgreen Hospital, Ayurveda is not just a traditional treatment — it is an essential part of a scientifically guided recovery journey. With over 25 years of expertise in neuro and orthopedic rehabilitation, the hospital blends the wisdom of Ayurveda with modern medical advancements to support patients in regaining strength, mobility, and confidence. Rooted in the principle of balancing the body, mind, and soul, Ayurveda plays a powerful role in treatment for neurological disorders, especially when combined with advanced rehabilitation techniques. This integrated approach reflects Ayurgreen's philosophy of "Happiness in Healthcare", ensuring patients experience both healing and hope. Clinical Focus How Ayurveda Supports Stroke & Neurological Recovery Neurological conditions such as stroke, paralysis, and nerve disorders often affect both physical function and mental well-being. Ayurveda focuses on restoring the body's internal balance (doshas), improving circulation, and enhancing nerve regeneration. In stroke recovery, Ayurvedic therapies are designed to: Stimulate damaged nerves and muscles Improve blood flow to the brain and affected areas Reduce stiffness, pain, and inflammation Enhance coordination and motor function By addressing the root cause rather than just symptoms, Ayurvedic neuro rehabilitation supports long-term recovery and prevents complications. Therapy Modules Key Ayurvedic Therapies Offered Ayurgreen Hospital provides a range of specialized Ayurvedic treatments tailored to each patient's condition and recovery stage: 01 Panchakarma Detox Therapies A deep cleansing process that removes toxins from the body, improving overall function and preparing the body for faster healing. 02 Abhyanga (Therapeutic Oil Massage) A synchronized massage using herbal oils that helps improve circulation, reduce muscle stiffness, and relax the nervous system. 03 Njavarakizhi (Rice Bundle Therapy) A rejuvenating therapy using herbal rice bundles that strengthens muscles and enhances nerve function. 04 Shirodhara A calming treatment where herbal oil is poured over the forehead, helping reduce stress, anxiety, and neurological imbalances. 05 Pizhichil (Oil Bath Therapy) A therapy combining heat and herbal oils to improve joint mobility and muscle flexibility. Each therapy is carefully customized based on the patient's condition, ensuring safe and effective healing. Integrated Innovation Integration with Modern Rehabilitation What makes Ayurgreen unique is its seamless integration of Ayurveda with advanced rehabilitation technologies. Patients benefit from a multidisciplinary approach that combines: Robotic Neuro Rehabilitation Physiotherapy & Occupational Therapy Speech & Swallow Therapy Psychological Counseling VR Cognitive Rehabilitation Yoga & Meditation This combination ensures that Ayurveda enhances — not replaces — modern treatment, creating a comprehensive recovery plan. The result is faster progress, improved functional outcomes, and better quality of life. Why It Works Benefits of Ayurveda Therapy Ayurveda offers a wide range of physical, mental, and long-term health benefits: Physical Improved muscle strength and flexibility Reduced pain and inflammation Enhanced nerve regeneration and mobility Mental & Emotional Reduced stress and anxiety Better sleep quality Improved emotional stability Long-Term Wellness Prevention of relapse or complications Improved immunity and overall vitality Sustainable healing through natural methods The Benchmark Why Choose Ayurgreen Hospital? Ayurgreen stands out as a leader in Ayurveda treatment for neurological disorders because of its unique approach: 25+ Years of ExpertiseOver two decades of clinical experience in neuro rehabilitation, managing complex neurological impairments. !rowBottom) return; // Constant speed — never changes regardless of scroll const BASE_SPEED = 60; // pixels per second let trackTopWidth = 0; let trackBottomWidth = 0; let xTop = 0; let xBottom = 0; // direction: +1 = normal (scroll down), -1 = reversed (scroll up) let direction = 1; let targetDirection = 1; let lastScrollY = window.scrollY; let tickerAdded = false; let scrollListenerAdded = false; window.addEventListener('resize', () => { trackTopWidth = 0; trackBottomWidth = 0; }); function measureTracks() { const tw = rowTop.scrollWidth / 3; const bw = rowBottom.scrollWidth / 3; if (tw > 0) trackTopWidth = tw; if (bw > 0) trackBottomWidth = bw; } function runTicker() { if (tickerAdded) return; tickerAdded = true; measureTracks(); // Stagger the bottom row so rows are visually offset from each other if (trackBottomWidth > 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } // Detect scroll direction — set targetDirection, never touch speed if (!scrollListenerAdded) { scrollListenerAdded = targetDirection = 1; } else if (delta < 0) { // Scrolling up → reverse direction targetDirection = -1; } }, { passive: true }); } gsap.ticker.add((_time, deltaMs) => { const dt = Math.min(deltaMs / -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } return; } // Smoothly interpolate direction so the flip feels natural, not jarring direction += (targetDirection - direction) * Math.min(dt * 5, 1); // Constant pixel step — speed never changes, only sign (direction) does const px = BASE_SPEED * direction * dt; xTop -= px; // top row: negative px = left, positive px = right xBottom += px; // bottom row: opposite direction always // Seamless infinite loop snapping if (xTop <= -trackTopWidth) xTop += trackTopWidth; if (xTop > 0) xTop -= trackTopWidth; if (xBottom >= 0) xBottom -= trackBottomWidth; if (xBottom < -trackBottomWidth) xBottom += trackBottomWidth; gsap.set(rowTop, { x: xTop, force3D: true }); gsap.set(rowBottom, { x: xBottom, force3D: true }); }); } // Start only when the gallery section scrolls into view if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) { const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { if (entries[0].isIntersecting) { observer.disconnect(); requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(runTicker)); } }, { threshold: 0.01 }); observer.observe(trigger); } else { setTimeout(runTicker, 500); } // Re-measure on resize window.addEventListener('resize', measureTracks, { passive: true }); // Re-measure when images load to ensure correct widths are used for animation const imgs = trigger.querySelectorAll('.gallery-img'); imgs.forEach(img => { if (img.complete) { measureTracks(); } else { img.addEventListener('load', measureTracks, { passive: true }); } }); } // Render stories dynamically from Instagram links renderDynamicStories(); setupInfiniteSlider(); initVideoSlider(); // Render Life Gallery renderLifeGallery(); initLifeGalleryAnimation(); // Understanding Ayurgreen Pinned Storytelling GSAP Timeline let mm = gsap.matchMedia(); mm.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Separate ScrollTrigger for the Title to reveal it immediately as the section enters the viewport gsap.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", ease: "power2.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 95%", // Starts revealing immediately when it starts entering the viewport end: "top 40%", // Fully revealed by the time it reaches top 40% scrub: 1.0 } }); // Pinned timeline starting at top top let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top top", end: "+=250%", pin: true, scrub: 1.2, invalidateOnRefresh: true } }); // Timeline starts directly with video reveal and scales up centered tl.to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 1.6, ease: "power2.out" }) .to({}, { duration: 2.0 }) // Pause to let the video settle in the center focus // Video shifts left, title stays at the top, card reveals .to(".storytelling-video-box", { xPercent: -15, scale: 0.95, duration: 1.8, ease: "power2.inOut" }) .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, x: 0, y: 30, scale: 1, duration: 1.8, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.8") .to({}, { duration: 0.8 }) // Settle card .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, stagger: 0.5, ease: "power2.out" }) .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.3") .to({}, { duration: 1.5 }); // Hold at final state }); mm.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 80%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); tl.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", duration: 0.6 }) .to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.2 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }, "-=0.2"); }); gsap.fromTo(".stories-bg-shape", { width: "70%" }, { width: "100%", ease: "power1.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: ".stories-relearning-section", start: "top bottom-=10%", end: "center center", scrub: 1.2, // Ultra smooth scroll scrubbing with lag invalidateOnRefresh: true } } ); // ADMIRE Ecosystem animations using gsap.matchMedia() let admireMM = gsap.matchMedia(); admireMM.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Desktop entry timeline let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top 75%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); gsap.set("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 0, y: 35 }); gsap.set(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 0, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 0 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.7, ease: "back.out(1.2)" }, 0) .to(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 1, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.1 }, 0) .to([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.12, ease: "power2.out" }, 0) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08, ease: "back.out(1.5)" }, 0.2); // Parallax scroll effect on cards gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-1", { y: -25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-2", { y: 15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-3", { y: -15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-4", { y: 25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); // Running dash lines let flowAnim = gsap.to(".admire-connecting-lines path", { strokeDashoffset: -30, duration: 2.5, repeat: -1, ease: "none" }); return () => { flowAnim.kill(); }; }); admireMM.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { // Mobile entry timeline (simplified stacking animations) let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top 80%", toggleActions: "play none none none" } }); gsap.set(["#admire-centerpiece", ".admire-info-card", ".admire-tag-pill"], { opacity: 0, y: 30 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08 }, "-=0.3") .to(".admire-info-card", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.15 }, "-=0.3"); }); window.addEventListener('resize', initVideoSlider); // --- Ayurgreen Ecosystem Redirection Configuration --- const ECOSYSTEM_URLS = { hospitals: '#', getwell: '#', niramaya: '#', herbals: '#', college: '#', scientifica: '#', shadarasa: '#', kizil: '#', foundation: '#', acfhe: '#' }; // ── Mobile Drawer Toggle Script ───────────────────────────────── function initMobileMenu() { const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn'); const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-drawer'); const closeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-close-btn'); const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-therapies', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-videos', () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(1); }, () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); });

.ayur-page-main { --primary-green: #2BC46D; --dark-navy: #020C22; --pure-white: #FFFFFF; --body-text: #667085; --heading: #101828; --border: #EAECF0; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; color: var(--body-text); background-color: var(--pure-white); line-height: 1.7; } .ayur-container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; box-sizing: border-box; width: 100%; } /* Fix banner content left alignment */ .ayur-hero-content { padding-left: 48px !important; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .ayur-hero-content { padding-left: 48px !important; } } .ayur-page-main h1, .ayur-page-main h2, .ayur-page-main h3, .ayur-page-main h4 { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; color: var(--heading); letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ayur-section-header { text-align: center; max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto 56px auto; } .ayur-section-label { font-size: 14px; text-transform: uppercase; } .ayur-section-support { font-size: 16px; color: var(--body-text); margin-top: 12px; line-height: 1.6; } .ayur-section-large { padding: 80px 0; } .ayur-section-medium { padding: 60px 0; } .ayur-intro-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 24px; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .ayur-conditions-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .ayur-conditions-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } } .ayur-condition-card { background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.4) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.3) 100%), #E5E9EC; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); border-radius: 28px; overflow: hidden; height: 420px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02); transition: all 400ms ease; } .ayur-condition-card-img-wrapper { width: calc(100% - 24px) !important; margin: 12px 12px 0 12px !important; border-radius: 18px !important; height: 180px !important; overflow: hidden; position: relative; } .ayur-condition-card-img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 400ms ease; } .ayur-condition-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); border-color: rgba(43, 196, 109, 0.2); } .ayur-condition-card:hover .ayur-condition-card-img { transform: scale(1.03); } .ayur-condition-card-content { padding: 24px; background-color: transparent; flex-grow: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ayur-condition-card-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #0c1938 !important; margin-bottom: 10px; } .ayur-condition-card-desc { font-size: 14px; color: rgba(12, 25, 56, 0.85) !important; line-height: 1.5; } .ayur-timeline-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 48px; margin-bottom: 56px; position: relative; z-index: 2; } .ayur-timeline-item:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; } .ayur-timeline-item:nth-child(even) { flex-direction: row-reverse; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .ayur-timeline-item, .ayur-timeline-item:nth-child(even) { flex-direction: column; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 40px; } } .ayur-timeline-col-img { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 28px; width: 100%; } .ayur-timeline-col-img img { width: 100%; height: 320px; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 400ms ease; display: block; } .ayur-timeline-col-img:hover img { transform: scale(1.03); } .ayur-timeline-col-content { flex: 1; width: 100%; } .ayur-timeline-badge { background: rgba(43, 196, 109, 0.1); color: var(--primary-green); font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 16px; border: 2px solid var(--primary-green); } .ayur-tech-outer { background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.4) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.3) 100%), #E5E9EC; box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); padding: 80px 24px; border-radius: 36px; color: #0c1938 !important; margin-bottom: 56px; } .ayur-tech-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 24px; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .ayur-tech-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .ayur-tech-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } } .ayur-tech-card { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.45) !important; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5) !important; border-radius: 32px; padding: 24px; backdrop-filter: blur(24px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); transition: all 400ms ease; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ayur-tech-card-title-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ayur-tech-card-icon { color: var(--primary-green); display: flex; align-items: center; } .ayur-tech-card-title { font-size: 18px; justify-content: space-between; position: relative; margin-top: 40px; gap: 24px; } .ayur-journey-timeline::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 36px; left: 40px; right: 40px; height: 2px; background: #EAECF0; z-index: 1; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .ayur-journey-timeline { flex-wrap: wrap; } .ayur-journey-timeline::before { display: none; } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .ayur-journey-timeline { flex-direction: column; gap: 32px; } } .ayur-journey-step { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center; position: relative; z-index: 2; min-width: 140px; } .ayur-journey-icon-circle { width: 72px; height: 72px; border-radius: 50%; background: #ffffff; border: 2px solid #EAECF0; color: var(--dark-navy); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 16px; transition: all 0.3s ease; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02); } .ayur-journey-step:hover .ayur-journey-icon-circle { border-color: var(--primary-green); color: var(--primary-green); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(43, 196, 109, 0.15); } .ayur-journey-step-title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark-navy); margin-bottom: 6px; } .ayur-journey-step-desc { font-size: 12px; color: var(--body-text); line-height: 1.4; } .ayur-faq-container { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; } .ayur-faq-item { background: #F8FAFC; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; transition: all 0.3s ease; } .ayur-faq-item:hover { border-color: rgba(43, 196, 109, 0.3); } .ayur-faq-trigger { width: 100%; padding: 24px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background: none; border: none; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; color: var(--dark-navy); cursor: pointer; } .ayur-faq-content { max-height: 0; overflow: hidden; transition: max-height 0.3s cubic-bezier(0, 1, 0, 1); } .ayur-faq-item.active .ayur-faq-content { max-height: 1000px; transition: max-height 0.3s cubic-bezier(1, 0, 1, 0); } .ayur-faq-content-inner { padding: 0 24px 24px 24px; font-size: 14.5px; color: var(--body-text); line-height: 1.6; } .ayur-faq-item .faq-icon { transition: transform 0.3s ease; color: var(--primary-green); display: flex; align-items: center; } .ayur-faq-item.active .faq-icon { transform: rotate(45deg); } .ayur-cta-outer { background: #FFFFFF; padding: 60px 0; } .ayur-cta-section { background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.4) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.3) 100%), #E5E9EC; backdrop-filter: blur(24px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px); border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); border-radius: 36px; padding: 64px 24px; text-align: center; box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); } .ayur-cta-title { font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700; color: #0c1938 !important; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ayur-cta-desc { color: rgba(12, 25, 56, 0.85) !important; font-size: 16px; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto 36px auto; line-height: 1.6; } .ayur-cta-btn-group { display: flex; gap: 16px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ayur-btn-primary, .ayur-btn-glass { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; border-left: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5) !important; color: #ffffff !important; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 40px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; text-transform: capitalize; letter-spacing: 0; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.3s ease; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15), inset 0 2px 4px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(120%); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(120%); transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2), inset 0 2px 6px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4) !important; } .ayur-btn-primary svg, .ayur-btn-glass svg { background-color: transparent !important; transition: transform 0.3s ease; } .ayur-btn-primary:hover svg, .ayur-btn-glass:hover svg, .ayur-btn-primary:hover img, .ayur-btn-glass:hover img { transform: scale(1.1) !important; } /* Sidebar column overrides */ .ayur-sidebar-content .ayur-container { max-width: 100% !important; flex-direction: column; gap: 0; padding-top: 24px; } Explore Medical Integrations Medical Integrations Neurology Neurosurgery Orthopedic ENT General Medicine Urology Cardiology Respiratory Therapy Neuro Psychology OVERVIEW Cardiology: Expert Care for Heart Health & Cardiac Rehabilitation Cardiovascular disease is the leading cause of death and disability worldwide, and it has a profound and often overlooked connection to neurological health. Cardiac conditions are the primary cause of ischemic stroke — the very condition that brings many of our patients to Ayurgreen Hospital. Our Cardiology Department provides expert cardiac services for two important patient groups: those in the community who require specialized cardiac evaluation and management, and our rehabilitation inpatients who need ongoing cardiac monitoring and safety clearance to participate safely in intensive robotic and physical rehabilitation programs. At Ayurgreen Hospital, we understand that a recovering stroke or TBI patient cannot achieve their full rehabilitation potential if their heart health is not simultaneously optimized. Our cardiologists are an integral part of the multidisciplinary team, ensuring that every patient's recovery is both safe and maximally effective. CONDITIONS WE MANAGE Cardiac Conditions We Specialize In Expert cardiac management for both general patients and the complex cardiovascular needs of our neurological rehabilitation population. Coronary & Hypertensive Disease Ischemic heart disease, acute coronary syndrome, hypertensive heart disease, and heart failure management. The cornerstone of stroke prevention — vital for our neurological rehabilitation patients. Arrhythmias & Rhythm Disorders Atrial fibrillation (AF) — the most common cause of cardioembolic stroke — along with other supraventricular and ventricular arrhythmias. Expert ECG, Holter, and echocardiographic evaluation for precise diagnosis and management. Cardiac Rehabilitation Structured exercise-based cardiac rehabilitation programs for post-MI, post-cardiac surgery, and heart failure patients. Integrated with our physiotherapy team for safe, supervised progressive exercise. CARDIAC SERVICES Comprehensive Cardiac Care Expert cardiac diagnostics, medical management, and rehabilitation — integrated into our neurological recovery ecosystem. 1 Cardiac Assessment for Rehabilitation Clearance Before intensive rehabilitation begins, all patients with cardiac risk factors undergo comprehensive cardiac evaluation by our cardiologists. Echocardiography, stress testing, and Holter monitoring ensure that every patient is safe to begin high-intensity robotic and physiotherapy sessions — preventing cardiac events during recovery. 2 Exercise-Based Cardiac Rehabilitation Our cardiologists work alongside physiotherapists to design safe, progressive exercise programs for cardiac rehabilitation patients. Continuous cardiac monitoring during exercise sessions ensures safety while building cardiovascular fitness, improving heart function, and reducing future cardiac risk. 3 Ayurvedic Cardioprotective Therapies Authentic Ayurvedic cardioprotective therapies including Hridya (cardiac) rasayanas like Arjuna (Terminalia arjuna) formulations, proven to improve cardiac muscle function and reduce arrhythmias. Stress-reducing Ayurvedic therapies like Shirodhara and yoga are integrated as part of a holistic cardiac wellness program. 4 Stroke Prevention Cardiology Specialized cardiology services focused on secondary stroke prevention for our neurological rehabilitation patients. Optimal anticoagulation management for atrial fibrillation, lipid management for atherosclerosis, and blood pressure control — the most critical interventions to prevent a second stroke. CARDIAC DIAGNOSTICS Advanced Cardiac Technology Comprehensive cardiac diagnostic capabilities to accurately assess and monitor cardiovascular health. Echocardiography 2D and Doppler echocardiography for detailed assessment of cardiac structure and function — essential for evaluating the heart as a source of stroke emboli. ECG & Holter Monitoring 12-lead ECG for acute cardiac assessment and 24/48-hour Holter monitoring to detect paroxysmal atrial fibrillation — the most common preventable cause of stroke. Stress Testing (TMT) Treadmill stress testing to evaluate exercise tolerance and detect significant coronary artery disease, critical for cardiac clearance before rehabilitation begins. Ayurvedic Cardio Tonics Evidence-based Ayurvedic cardiac formulations (Arjuna, Pushkarmool) that support heart muscle strength, improve cardiac efficiency, and manage mild-to-moderate hypertension naturally. Cardiac Safety Monitoring Continuous cardiac telemetry monitoring for high-risk rehabilitation patients, ensuring immediate detection and response to any cardiac events during intensive therapy sessions. RECOVERY TIMELINE Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence. 1. Assessment Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel. 2. Diagnosis Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors. 3. Personalized Plan Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols. 4. Therapy Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments. 5. Monitoring Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data. 6. Recovery Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan. COMMON QUERIES Frequently Asked Questions Find answers to key details about the Cardiology program. What is the recovery protocol for this program? Our recovery protocol for Cardiology combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains. How long is the typical inpatient stay? Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways. Is robotic therapy safe for all patients? Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists. Are the Ayurvedic medicines safe? All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state. Can we coordinate with our existing neurologist? Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care. What is the daily therapy schedule? A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon. Do you offer post-discharge support? Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains. How do I book a consultation? You can book a virtual consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly. Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway. document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(otherVideo => { if (otherVideo !== video) { otherVideo.pause(); otherVideo.src = ""; // Clears the source to show poster otherVideo.load(); const otherCard = otherVideo.closest('.story-card'); otherCard.classList.remove('playing'); const otherMini = otherCard.querySelector('.story-mini-play-btn'); setMiniPlayIcon(otherMini, false); } }); // Dynamically set source if not set if (!video.src || video.src === window.location.href) { video.src = video.getAttribute('data-src') + "#t=0.001"; video.load(); } // Play video video.play().catch(err => console.log("Play interrupted:", err)); card.classList.add('playing'); setMiniPlayIcon(miniPlay, true); } else { // Stop current video video.pause(); video.src = ""; // Clear src to restore patient cover thumbnail video.load(); card.classList.remove('playing'); setMiniPlayIcon(miniPlay, false); // Restart auto-slider if no card is playing let anyPlaying = false; document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(v => { if (v.src && v.src !== "" && !v.paused) anyPlaying = true; }); if (!anyPlaying) { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); } } }; card.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); if (playOverlay) playOverlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); if (miniPlay) miniPlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); }); } // Auto sliding let videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); // Pause auto sliding on hover (only if no video is currently playing) const clipVideos = document.getElementById('clip-videos'); if (clipVideos) { clipVideos.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); }); clipVideos.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { let anyPlaying = false; document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(v => { if (!v.paused) anyPlaying = true; }); if (!anyPlaying) { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); } }); } function renderLifeGallery() { const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!rowTop || !rowBottom) return; const renderRow = (container, items) => { // No lazy loading — images need to measure their widths for the animation const markup = items.map((src) => { return `<img src="${src}" class="gallery-img" alt="Life at Ayurgreen">`; }).join(''); // Repeat the images 3 times for seamless wrapping container.innerHTML = markup + markup + markup; }; // Distribute images between top and bottom rows const topItems = []; const bottomItems = []; galleryImages.forEach((src, idx) => { if (idx % 2 === 0) { topItems.push(src); } else { bottomItems.push(src); } }); renderRow(rowTop, topItems); renderRow(rowBottom, bottomItems); } function initLifeGalleryAnimation() { const trigger = document.getElementById('life-gallery-trigger'); const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!trigger || !rowTop || !rowBottom) return; // Constant speed — never changes regardless of scroll const BASE_SPEED = 60; // pixels per second let trackTopWidth = 0; let trackBottomWidth = 0; let xTop = 0; let xBottom = 0; // direction: +1 = normal (scroll down), -1 = reversed (scroll up) let direction = 1; let targetDirection = 1; let lastScrollY = window.scrollY; let tickerAdded = false; let scrollListenerAdded = false; window.addEventListener('resize', () => { trackTopWidth = 0; trackBottomWidth = 0; }); function measureTracks() { const tw = rowTop.scrollWidth / 3; const bw = rowBottom.scrollWidth / 3; if (tw > 0) trackTopWidth = tw; if (bw > 0) trackBottomWidth = bw; } function runTicker() { if (tickerAdded) return; tickerAdded = true; measureTracks(); // Stagger the bottom row so rows are visually offset from each other if (trackBottomWidth > 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } // Detect scroll direction — set targetDirection, never touch speed if (!scrollListenerAdded) { scrollListenerAdded = true; window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { const current = window.scrollY; const delta = current - lastScrollY; lastScrollY = current; if (delta > 0) { // Scrolling down → normal direction targetDirection = 1; } else if (delta < 0) { // Scrolling up → reverse direction targetDirection = -1; } }, { passive: true }); } gsap.ticker.add((_time, deltaMs) => { const dt = Math.min(deltaMs / 1000, 0.05); // Re-measure if images haven't loaded widths yet if (trackTopWidth === 0 || trackBottomWidth === 0) { measureTracks(); if (trackBottomWidth > 0 && xBottom === 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } return; } // Smoothly interpolate direction so the flip feels natural, not jarring direction += (targetDirection - direction) * Math.min(dt * 5, 1); // Constant pixel step — speed never changes, only sign (direction) does const px = BASE_SPEED * direction * dt; xTop -= px; // top row: negative px = left, positive px = right xBottom += px; // bottom row: opposite direction always // Seamless infinite loop snapping if (xTop <= -trackTopWidth) xTop += trackTopWidth; if (xTop > 0) xTop -= trackTopWidth; if (xBottom >= 0) xBottom -= trackBottomWidth; if (xBottom < -trackBottomWidth) xBottom += trackBottomWidth; gsap.set(rowTop, { x: xTop, force3D: true }); gsap.set(rowBottom, { x: xBottom, force3D: true }); }); } // Start only when the gallery section scrolls into view if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) { const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { if (entries[0].isIntersecting) { observer.disconnect(); requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(runTicker)); } }, { threshold: 0.01 }); observer.observe(trigger); } else { setTimeout(runTicker, 500); } // Re-measure on resize window.addEventListener('resize', measureTracks, { passive: true }); // Re-measure when images load to ensure correct widths are used for animation const imgs = trigger.querySelectorAll('.gallery-img'); imgs.forEach(img => { if (img.complete) { measureTracks(); } else { img.addEventListener('load', measureTracks, { passive: true }); } }); } // Render stories dynamically from Instagram links renderDynamicStories(); setupInfiniteSlider(); initVideoSlider(); // Render Life Gallery renderLifeGallery(); initLifeGalleryAnimation(); // Understanding Ayurgreen Pinned Storytelling GSAP Timeline let mm = gsap.matchMedia(); mm.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Separate ScrollTrigger for the Title to reveal it immediately as the section enters the viewport gsap.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", ease: "power2.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 95%", // Starts revealing immediately when it starts entering the viewport end: "top 40%", // Fully revealed by the time it reaches top 40% scrub: 1.0 } }); // Pinned timeline starting at top top let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top top", end: "+=250%", pin: true, scrub: 1.2, invalidateOnRefresh: true } }); // Timeline starts directly with video reveal and scales up centered tl.to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 1.6, ease: "power2.out" }) .to({}, { duration: 2.0 }) // Pause to let the video settle in the center focus // Video shifts left, title stays at the top, card reveals .to(".storytelling-video-box", { xPercent: -15, scale: 0.95, duration: 1.8, ease: "power2.inOut" }) .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, x: 0, y: 30, scale: 1, duration: 1.8, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.8") .to({}, { duration: 0.8 }) // Settle card .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, stagger: 0.5, ease: "power2.out" }) .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.3") .to({}, { duration: 1.5 }); // Hold at final state }); mm.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 80%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); tl.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", duration: 0.6 }) .to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.2 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }, "-=0.2"); }); gsap.fromTo(".stories-bg-shape", { width: "70%" }, { width: "100%", ease: "power1.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: ".stories-relearning-section", start: "top bottom-=10%", end: "center center", scrub: 1.2, // Ultra smooth scroll scrubbing with lag invalidateOnRefresh: true } } ); // ADMIRE Ecosystem animations using gsap.matchMedia() let admireMM = gsap.matchMedia(); admireMM.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Desktop entry timeline let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top 75%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); gsap.set("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 0, y: 35 }); gsap.set(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 0, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 0 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.7, ease: "back.out(1.2)" }, 0) .to(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 1, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.1 }, 0) .to([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.12, ease: "power2.out" }, 0) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08, ease: "back.out(1.5)" }, 0.2); // Parallax scroll effect on cards gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-1", { y: -25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-2", { y: 15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", }); gsap.set(["#admire-centerpiece", ".admire-info-card", ".admire-tag-pill"], { opacity: 0, y: 30 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08 }, "-=0.3") .to(".admire-info-card", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.15 }, "-=0.3"); }); window.addEventListener('resize', initVideoSlider); // --- Ayurgreen Ecosystem Redirection Configuration --- const ECOSYSTEM_URLS = { hospitals: '#', getwell: '#', niramaya: '#', herbals: '#', college: '#', scientifica: '#', shadarasa: '#', kizil: '#', foundation: '#', acfhe: '#' }; // ── Mobile Drawer Toggle Script ───────────────────────────────── function initMobileMenu() { const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn'); const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-drawer'); const closeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-close-btn'); const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-therapies', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-videos', () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(1); }, () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); });

title: Cardiology: Expert Care for Heart Health & Cardiac Rehabilitation
desc: Cardiovascular disease is the leading cause of death and disability worldwide, and it has a profound and often overlooked connection to neurological health. Car...
content: Cardiology: Expert Care for Heart Health & Cardiac Rehabilitation Cardiovascular disease is the leading cause of death and disability worldwide, and it has a profound and often overlooked connection to neurological health. Cardiac conditions are the primary cause of ischemic stroke — the very condition that brings many of our patients to Ayurgreen Hospital. Our Cardiology Department provides expert cardiac services for two important patient groups: those in the community who require specialized cardiac evaluation and management, and our rehabilitation inpatients who need ongoing cardiac monitoring and safety clearance to participate safely in intensive robotic and physical rehabilitation programs. At Ayurgreen Hospital, we understand that a recovering stroke or TBI patient cannot achieve their full rehabilitation potential if their heart health is not simultaneously optimized. Our cardiologists are an integral part of the multidisciplinary team, ensuring that every patient's recovery is both safe and maximally effective.

title: Cardiac Conditions We Specialize In
desc: Expert cardiac management for both general patients and the complex cardiovascular needs of our neurological rehabilitation population.
content: Cardiac Conditions We Specialize In Expert cardiac management for both general patients and the complex cardiovascular needs of our neurological rehabilitation population.

title: Comprehensive Cardiac Care
desc: Expert cardiac diagnostics, medical management, and rehabilitation — integrated into our neurological recovery ecosystem.
content: Comprehensive Cardiac Care Expert cardiac diagnostics, medical management, and rehabilitation — integrated into our neurological recovery ecosystem.

title: Cardiac Assessment for Rehabilitation Clearance
desc: Before intensive rehabilitation begins, all patients with cardiac risk factors undergo comprehensive cardiac evaluation by our cardiologists. Echocardiography, ...
content: Cardiac Assessment for Rehabilitation Clearance Before intensive rehabilitation begins, all patients with cardiac risk factors undergo comprehensive cardiac evaluation by our cardiologists. Echocardiography, stress testing, and Holter monitoring ensure that every patient is safe to begin high-intensity robotic and physiotherapy sessions — preventing cardiac events during recovery.

title: Exercise-Based Cardiac Rehabilitation
desc: Our cardiologists work alongside physiotherapists to design safe, progressive exercise programs for cardiac rehabilitation patients. Continuous cardiac monitori...
content: Exercise-Based Cardiac Rehabilitation Our cardiologists work alongside physiotherapists to design safe, progressive exercise programs for cardiac rehabilitation patients. Continuous cardiac monitoring during exercise sessions ensures safety while building cardiovascular fitness, improving heart function, and reducing future cardiac risk.

title: Ayurvedic Cardioprotective Therapies
desc: Authentic Ayurvedic cardioprotective therapies including Hridya (cardiac) rasayanas like Arjuna (Terminalia arjuna) formulations, proven to improve cardiac musc...
content: Ayurvedic Cardioprotective Therapies Authentic Ayurvedic cardioprotective therapies including Hridya (cardiac) rasayanas like Arjuna (Terminalia arjuna) formulations, proven to improve cardiac muscle function and reduce arrhythmias. Stress-reducing Ayurvedic therapies like Shirodhara and yoga are integrated as part of a holistic cardiac wellness program.

title: Stroke Prevention Cardiology
desc: Specialized cardiology services focused on secondary stroke prevention for our neurological rehabilitation patients. Optimal anticoagulation management for atri...
content: Stroke Prevention Cardiology Specialized cardiology services focused on secondary stroke prevention for our neurological rehabilitation patients. Optimal anticoagulation management for atrial fibrillation, lipid management for atherosclerosis, and blood pressure control — the most critical interventions to prevent a second stroke.

title: Advanced Cardiac Technology
desc: Comprehensive cardiac diagnostic capabilities to accurately assess and monitor cardiovascular health.
content: Advanced Cardiac Technology Comprehensive cardiac diagnostic capabilities to accurately assess and monitor cardiovascular health.

title: Your Recovery Journey
desc: Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.
content: Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.

content: Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway.

flex-direction: column; gap: 0; padding-top: 24px; } Explore Specialities Specialities Stroke Spinal Cord Injury Traumatic Brain Injury Hemiplegia Quadriplegia & Paraplegia Post-Surgical Complications Motor Neuron Diseases Cerebral Palsy Parkinson's Disease Myopathy Disc & Spine Problems Sciatica Obesity Post-Covid Complications Muscular Dystrophy Osteoarthritis Rheumatoid Arthritis Developmental Delay Psychological Problems Autism Psychiatry OVERVIEW Cerebral Palsy Rehabilitation: Unlocking Every Child's Potential Cerebral Palsy (CP) is a group of permanent movement disorders caused by damage to the developing brain — before, during, or shortly after birth. It is the most common cause of physical disability in childhood, affecting movement, muscle tone, posture, and balance in varying degrees. At Ayurgreen Hospital, our Cerebral Palsy Rehabilitation Program is one of the most specialized and comprehensive in India. We believe that every child with CP has the potential to reach their maximum functional independence — and we use every tool at our disposal to help them achieve it. Our integrated program combines robotic technology, Neurodevelopmental Therapy (NDT), Constraint-Induced Movement Therapy (CIMT), intensive physiotherapy and occupational therapy, speech therapy, and authentic Ayurvedic therapies specifically adapted for children — creating a holistic healing environment where each child thrives. CP TYPES WE TREAT Cerebral Palsy Types We Specialize In Expert rehabilitation for all types and severities of cerebral palsy, from hemiplegic to quadriplegic CP. Spastic Cerebral Palsy (Hemi, Di, Quad) The most common type — characterized by muscle stiffness and spasticity. Hemiplegic (one side), diplegic (both legs), and quadriplegic (all four limbs) spastic CP each have specific rehabilitation approaches using robotic systems, Botox, and Ayurvedic spasticity management. Dyskinetic & Athetoid CP Characterized by involuntary, uncontrolled movements. Our program uses sensory integration therapy, specialized physiotherapy, and Ayurvedic calming therapies to improve movement control and reduce involuntary movements. Ataxic & Mixed Cerebral Palsy Ataxic CP with poor balance and coordination is addressed through intensive balance training and the Huber 360 platform. Mixed CP types are comprehensively managed with customized programs targeting each component of the child's presentation. CP REHABILITATION Comprehensive Cerebral Palsy Rehabilitation Integrated, family-centered rehabilitation that addresses every aspect of a child's development and functional needs. 1 Robotic & Technology-Assisted Therapy Our robotic systems are adapted for pediatric use: the Armotion provides guided arm therapy for hemiplegic CP; the G-EO system provides supported walking practice for children who cannot yet walk independently; and the Huber 360 provides balance and core strengthening for ataxic and diplegic CP. These systems deliver the volume and precision of movement training critical for pediatric neuroplasticity. 2 NDT, CIMT & Intensive Physiotherapy Neurodevelopmental Therapy (NDT/Bobath) is the foundation of our physiotherapy program for CP, addressing tone, posture, and functional movement patterns. Constraint-Induced Movement Therapy (CIMT) and Hand-Arm Bimanual Intensive Therapy (HABIT) maximize arm function in hemiplegic CP. Intensive physiotherapy for gait retraining, balance, and muscle strengthening. 3 Ayurvedic Therapies for Cerebral Palsy Kerala Ayurveda has a rich tradition of therapies for developmental movement disorders. Abhyanga (oil massage) with specific medicated oils reduces spasticity and promotes sensorimotor development; Njavara Kizhi strengthens weak muscles; Shirodhara calms the nervous system in dyskinetic CP; and Medhya Rasayana formulations (Brahmi, Shatavari) support cognitive development and neuroprotection. 4 Speech Therapy & Occupational Therapy Comprehensive speech therapy for CP-related communication disorders (dysarthria, AAC), feeding difficulties, and language delay. Occupational therapy for fine motor development, sensory integration, adaptive equipment prescription, school participation, and independence in all ADLs — helping each child achieve their maximum educational and social participation. CP REHABILITATION TECHNOLOGY Advanced Technology for CP Rehabilitation Specialized pediatric robotic and therapeutic technology for maximum developmental progress in cerebral palsy. Pediatric Robotic Gait Training G-EO and supported walking systems adapted for children, providing body-weight support and guided gait training to promote walking development in non-ambulant CP children. Armotion Upper Limb Therapy Robotic guided arm therapy for hemiplegic CP children, combined with CIMT to maximize use and development of the affected arm. Huber 360 Balance Training Dynamic balance, coordination, and core strength training for ataxic and diplegic CP — improving postural stability and walking ability through interactive programs. Ayurvedic Neurodevelopment Traditional Kerala Ayurvedic therapies (Abhyanga, Njavara Kizhi, Brahmi Rasayana) specifically adapted for children to reduce spasticity, strengthen muscles, and support healthy neurodevelopment. Botox for Spasticity Targeted botulinum toxin injections to reduce focal spasticity (calf, hamstring, hip adductors) — creating a window for intensive physiotherapy to maximize functional gains in spastic CP. RECOVERY TIMELINE Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence. 1. Assessment Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel. 2. Diagnosis Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors. 3. Personalized Plan Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols. 4. Therapy Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments. 5. Monitoring Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data. 6. Recovery Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan. COMMON QUERIES Frequently Asked Questions Find answers to key details about the Cerebral Palsy program. What is the recovery protocol for this program? Our recovery protocol for Cerebral Palsy combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains. How long is the typical inpatient stay? Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways. Is robotic therapy safe for all patients? Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists. Are the Ayurvedic medicines safe? All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state. Can we coordinate with our existing neurologist? Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care. What is the daily therapy schedule? A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon. Do you offer post-discharge support? Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains. How do I book a consultation? You can book a virtual consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly. Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway. function setupVideoCardEvents(container) { container.querySelectorAll('.story-card').forEach(card => { const video = card.querySelector('.story-card-video'); const playOverlay = 7.07"/></svg>`; }); } const togglePlay = (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.story-open-ig-btn')) return; e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); // If video is paused or has no source yet const isNotPlaying = video.paused || !video.src || video.src === window.location.href; if (isNotPlaying) { // Pause and reset all other cards (restore their poster cover images) document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(otherVideo => { if (otherVideo !== video) { otherVideo.pause(); otherVideo.src = ""; // Clears the source to show poster otherVideo.load(); const otherCard = otherVideo.closest('.story-card'); otherCard.classList.remove('playing'); const otherMini = otherCard.querySelector('.story-mini-play-btn'); setMiniPlayIcon(otherMini, false); } }); // Dynamically set source if not set if (!video.src || video.src === window.location.href) { video.src = video.getAttribute('data-src') + "#t=0.001"; video.load(); } // Play video video.play().catch(err => console.log("Play interrupted:", err)); card.classList.add('playing'); setMiniPlayIcon(miniPlay, true); } else { // Stop current video video.pause(); video.src = ""; // Clear src to restore patient
