= setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); } } }; card.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); if (playOverlay) playOverlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); if (miniPlay) miniPlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); }); } // Auto sliding let videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); // Pause auto sliding on hover (only if no video is currently playing) const clipVideos = document.getElementById('clip-videos'); if (clipVideos) { clipVideos.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); }); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!rowTop || !rowBottom) return; const renderRow = (container, items) => { // No lazy loading — images need to measure their widths for the animation const markup = items.map((src) => { return `<img src="${src}" class="gallery-img" alt="Life at Ayurgreen">`; }).join(''); // Repeat the images 3 times for seamless wrapping container.innerHTML = markup + markup + markup; }; // Distribute images between top and bottom rows const topItems = []; const bottomItems = []; galleryImages.forEach((src, idx) => { if (idx % 2 === 0) { topItems.push(src); } else { bottomItems.push(src); } }); renderRow(rowTop, topItems); renderRow(rowBottom, bottomItems); } function initLifeGalleryAnimation() { const trigger = document.getElementById('life-gallery-trigger'); const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!trigger || !rowTop || !rowBottom) return; // Constant speed — never changes regardless of scroll const BASE_SPEED = 60; // pixels per second let trackTopWidth = 0; let trackBottomWidth = 0; let xTop = 0; let xBottom = 0; // direction: +1 = normal (scroll down), -1 = reversed (scroll up) let direction = 1; let targetDirection = 1; let lastScrollY = window.scrollY; let tickerAdded = false; let scrollListenerAdded = false; window.addEventListener('resize', () => { trackTopWidth = 0; trackBottomWidth = 0; }); function measureTracks() { const tw = rowTop.scrollWidth / 3; const bw = rowBottom.scrollWidth / 3; if (tw > 0) trackTopWidth = tw; if (bw > 0) trackBottomWidth = bw; } function runTicker() { if (tickerAdded) return; tickerAdded = true; measureTracks(); // Stagger the bottom row so rows are visually offset from each other if (trackBottomWidth > 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } // Detect scroll direction — set targetDirection, never touch speed if (!scrollListenerAdded) { scrollListenerAdded = true; window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { const current = window.scrollY; const delta = current - lastScrollY; lastScrollY = current; if (delta > 0) { // Scrolling down → normal direction targetDirection = 1; } else if (delta < 0) { // Scrolling up → reverse direction targetDirection = -1; } }, { passive: true }); } gsap.ticker.add((_time, deltaMs) => { const dt = Math.min(deltaMs / 1000, 0.05); // Re-measure if images haven't loaded widths yet if (trackTopWidth === 0 || trackBottomWidth === 0) { measureTracks(); if (trackBottomWidth > 0 && xBottom === 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } return; } // Smoothly interpolate direction so the flip feels natural, not jarring direction += (targetDirection - direction) * Math.min(dt * 5, 1); // Constant pixel step — speed never changes, only sign (direction) does const px = BASE_SPEED * direction * dt; xTop -= px; // top row: negative px = left, positive px = right xBottom += px; // bottom row: opposite direction always // Seamless infinite loop snapping if (xTop <= -trackTopWidth) xTop += trackTopWidth; if (xTop > 0) xTop -= trackTopWidth; if (xBottom >= 0) xBottom -= trackBottomWidth; if (xBottom < -trackBottomWidth) xBottom += trackBottomWidth; gsap.set(rowTop, { x: xTop, force3D: true }); gsap.set(rowBottom, { x: xBottom, force3D: true }); }); } // Start only when the gallery section scrolls into view if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) { const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { if (entries[0].isIntersecting) { observer.disconnect(); requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(runTicker)); } }, { threshold: 0.01 }); observer.observe(trigger); } else { setTimeout(runTicker, 500); } // Re-measure on resize window.addEventListener('resize', measureTracks, { passive: true }); // Re-measure when images load to ensure correct widths are used for animation const imgs = trigger.querySelectorAll('.gallery-img'); imgs.forEach(img => { if (img.complete) { initVideoSlider(); // Render Life Gallery renderLifeGallery(); initLifeGalleryAnimation(); // Understanding Ayurgreen Pinned Storytelling GSAP Timeline let mm = gsap.matchMedia(); mm.add("(min-width: duration: 1.5 }); // Hold at final state }); mm.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 80%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); tl.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", duration: 0.6 }) .to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.2 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }, "-=0.2"); }); gsap.fromTo(".stories-bg-shape", { width: "70%" }, { width: "100%", ease: "power1.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: ".stories-relearning-section", start: "top bottom-=10%", end: "center center", scrub: 1.2, // Ultra smooth scroll scrubbing with lag invalidateOnRefresh: true } } ); // ADMIRE Ecosystem animations using gsap.matchMedia() let admireMM = gsap.matchMedia(); admireMM.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Desktop entry timeline let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top 75%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); gsap.set("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 0, y: 35 }); gsap.set(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 0, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 0 }); .to([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.12, ease: "power2.out" }, 0) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08, ease: "back.out(1.5)" }, 0.2); // Parallax scroll effect on cards gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-1", { y: -25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-3", { y: -15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col }); gsap.set(["#admire-centerpiece", ".admire-info-card", ".admire-tag-pill"], { opacity: 0, y: 30 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { initVideoSlider); // --- Ayurgreen Ecosystem Redirection Configuration --- const ECOSYSTEM_URLS = { hospitals: '#', getwell: '#', niramaya: '#', herbals: '#', college: '#', scientifica: '#', shadarasa: '#', kizil: '#', foundation: '#', acfhe: '#' }; // ── Mobile Drawer Toggle Script ───────────────────────────────── function initMobileMenu() { const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn'); const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-drawer'); const closeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-close-btn'); const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-therapies', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-videos', () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(1); }, () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); });

title: Cerebral Palsy Rehabilitation: Unlocking Every Child's Potential
desc: Cerebral Palsy (CP) is a group of permanent movement disorders caused by damage to the developing brain — before, during, or shortly after birth. It is the most...
content: Cerebral Palsy Rehabilitation: Unlocking Every Child's Potential Cerebral Palsy (CP) is a group of permanent movement disorders caused by damage to the developing brain — before, during, or shortly after birth. It is the most common cause of physical disability in childhood, affecting movement, muscle tone, posture, and balance in varying degrees. At Ayurgreen Hospital, our Cerebral Palsy Rehabilitation Program is one of the most specialized and comprehensive in India. We believe that every child with CP has the potential to reach their maximum functional independence — and we use every tool at our disposal to help them achieve it. Our integrated program combines robotic technology, Neurodevelopmental Therapy (NDT), Constraint-Induced Movement Therapy (CIMT), intensive physiotherapy and occupational therapy, speech therapy, and authentic Ayurvedic therapies specifically adapted for children — creating a holistic healing environment where each child thrives.

title: Cerebral Palsy Types We Specialize In
desc: Expert rehabilitation for all types and severities of cerebral palsy, from hemiplegic to quadriplegic CP.

title: Robotic & Technology-Assisted Therapy
desc: Our robotic systems are adapted for pediatric use: the Armotion provides guided arm therapy for hemiplegic CP; the G-EO system provides supported walking practi...
content: Robotic & Technology-Assisted Therapy Our robotic systems are adapted for pediatric use: the Armotion provides guided arm therapy for hemiplegic CP; the G-EO system provides supported walking practice for children who cannot yet walk independently; and the Huber 360 provides balance and core strengthening for ataxic and diplegic CP. These systems deliver the volume and precision of movement training critical for pediatric neuroplasticity.

title: NDT, CIMT & Intensive Physiotherapy
desc: Neurodevelopmental Therapy (NDT/Bobath) is the foundation of our physiotherapy program for CP, addressing tone, posture, and functional movement patterns. Const...
content: NDT, CIMT & Intensive Physiotherapy Neurodevelopmental Therapy (NDT/Bobath) is the foundation of our physiotherapy program for CP, addressing tone, posture, and functional movement patterns. Constraint-Induced Movement Therapy (CIMT) and Hand-Arm Bimanual Intensive Therapy (HABIT) maximize arm function in hemiplegic CP. Intensive physiotherapy for gait retraining, balance, and muscle strengthening.

title: Ayurvedic Therapies for Cerebral Palsy
desc: Kerala Ayurveda has a rich tradition of therapies for developmental movement disorders. Abhyanga (oil massage) with specific medicated oils reduces spasticity a...
content: Ayurvedic Therapies for Cerebral Palsy Kerala Ayurveda has a rich tradition of therapies for developmental movement disorders. Abhyanga (oil massage) with specific medicated oils reduces spasticity and promotes sensorimotor development; Njavara Kizhi strengthens weak muscles; Shirodhara calms the nervous system in dyskinetic CP; and Medhya Rasayana formulations (Brahmi, Shatavari) support cognitive development and neuroprotection.

title: Speech Therapy & Occupational Therapy
desc: Comprehensive speech therapy for CP-related communication disorders (dysarthria, AAC), feeding difficulties, and language delay. Occupational therapy for fine m...
content: Speech Therapy & Occupational Therapy Comprehensive speech therapy for CP-related communication disorders (dysarthria, AAC), feeding difficulties, and language delay. Occupational therapy for fine motor development, sensory integration, adaptive equipment prescription, school participation, and independence in all ADLs — helping each child achieve their maximum educational and social participation.

title: Advanced Technology for CP Rehabilitation
desc: Specialized pediatric robotic and therapeutic technology for maximum developmental progress in cerebral palsy.
content: Advanced Technology for CP Rehabilitation Specialized pediatric robotic and therapeutic technology for maximum developmental progress in cerebral palsy.

flex-direction: column; gap: 0; padding-top: 24px; } Explore Departments Departments Ayurveda Physiotherapy Robotic Rehabilitation Occupational Therapy Speech Therapy Virtual Reality Yoga and Meditation Acupuncture Reflexology Hydro / Aquatic Therapy Pediatrics Slimming Treatment Pain Management Diet & Nutrition Counseling Dentistry Modern Medicine Assistive Devices OVERVIEW Counseling: Compassionate Support for Mind & Spirit A medical journey — whether recovering from stroke, living with a chronic neurological condition, or facing a life-altering disability — is not only a physical experience. It profoundly affects emotions, relationships, identity, and sense of purpose. Compassionate, skilled counseling is essential to support both patients and families through these challenges. At Ayurgreen Hospital, professional counseling is provided as an integral component of all rehabilitation programs — not as a separate service to be requested, but as a proactive, embedded dimension of care. Our trained counselors and clinical psychologists routinely screen all patients and families for psychological needs and provide responsive, personalized support. Our counseling services bridge the gap between the clinical expertise of our medical team and the human experience of our patients and families — ensuring that the emotional, relational, and spiritual dimensions of recovery receive the same expert attention as the physical dimensions. COUNSELING FOCUS AREAS What Our Counselors Address Compassionate, professional counseling for the emotional, relational, and psychological challenges of illness and rehabilitation. Patient Emotional Support Addressing the depression, anxiety, grief, loss, fear, anger, and adjustment challenges that accompany sudden disability, chronic illness, and long rehabilitation journeys. Family & Relationship Counseling Supporting families through the significant stress, role changes, relationship strain, and grief that accompanies caring for a family member with serious illness or disability. Caregiver Wellbeing & Burnout Prevention Dedicated caregiver support addressing the burden, burnout, compassion fatigue, and depression that commonly affect those caring for neurologically impaired family members. COUNSELING SERVICES Comprehensive Counseling Services Professional, compassionate counseling integrated within our rehabilitation programs for patient and family wellbeing. 1 Individual Patient Counseling One-to-one counseling sessions addressing the emotional impact of sudden disability, the grief of lost function and independence, adjustment to changed life roles and relationships, motivation and engagement in rehabilitation, fear of the future, and spiritual and existential questions that arise in serious illness. Person-centered, solution-focused, and CBT approaches used flexibly to meet each patient's needs. 2 Family & Caregiver Counseling Structured family sessions facilitated by our counselors: understanding the patient's diagnosis and what to realistically expect from recovery; managing changed family dynamics, roles, and responsibilities; communication strategies that support the patient's autonomy and dignity; financial planning implications of long-term care; and managing sibling and extended family relationships when a family member has serious illness. 3 Sattvavajaya (Ayurvedic Mind Counseling) Ayurveda's Sattvavajaya Chikitsa — psychological healing through self-knowledge, positive thinking, and spiritual alignment — complements modern counseling with ancient wisdom. Practices including Svadhyaya (self-reflection), positive affirmation (Mantra recitation), and guidance on Ayurvedic lifestyle for mental wellbeing (Dinacharya, Sadvritta) provide a culturally resonant framework for psychological healing alongside modern counseling. 4 Group Support & Peer Support Programs Structured therapeutic support groups for stroke survivors, brain injury patients, spinal cord injury patients, and caregivers — providing peer connection, shared experience, mutual support, and practical advice from those who truly understand the challenges. Group therapy reduces isolation, builds community, and accelerates the adjustment process through shared narrative and collective wisdom. COUNSELING APPROACHES Counseling Approaches & Support Tools Evidence-based counseling techniques integrated with Ayurvedic psychological approaches for complete emotional support. Person-Centered Counseling Carl Rogers-based person-centered approach providing unconditional positive regard, empathic understanding, and genuine therapeutic presence — the foundation of effective counseling. CBT & Solution-Focused Approaches Cognitive Behavioral Therapy for depression and anxiety; Solution-Focused Brief Therapy for practical problem-solving; Motivational Interviewing for rehabilitation engagement. Sattvavajaya Chikitsa Ayurvedic psychological healing through self-knowledge, Mantra therapy, and positive lifestyle guidance — providing a culturally resonant complement to Western counseling approaches. Peer Support Groups Facilitated peer support groups for stroke, SCI, TBI, and caregiver populations — reducing isolation and accelerating psychological adjustment through shared experience. Spiritual & Existential Support Sensitive support for the spiritual and existential questions that arise in serious illness — working with the patient's own faith tradition and spiritual framework to find meaning, hope, and peace. RECOVERY TIMELINE Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence. 1. Assessment Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel. 2. Diagnosis Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors. 3. Personalized Plan Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols. 4. Therapy Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments. 5. Monitoring Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data. 6. Recovery Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan. COMMON QUERIES Frequently Asked Questions Find answers to key details about the Counseling program. What is the recovery protocol for this program? Our recovery protocol for Counseling combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains. How long is the typical inpatient stay? Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways. Is robotic therapy safe for all patients? Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists. Are the Ayurvedic medicines safe? All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state. Can we coordinate with our existing neurologist? Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care. What is the daily therapy schedule? A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon. Do you offer post-discharge support? Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains. How do I book a consultation? You can book a virtual consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly. Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway. const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!container || !clip) return; const gap = 18; const totalWidth = clip.clientWidth; // Dynamic card count based on viewport width let n = 5; if (totalWidth < 480) n = 1; else if (totalWidth < 768) n = 2; else if (totalWidth < 1024) n = 3; else if (totalWidth < 1366) n = 4; else n = 5; const cardWidth = (totalWidth - gap * (n - 1)) / n; container.querySelectorAll('.rehab-card').forEach(card => { card.style.width = cardWidth + 'px'; card.style.minWidth = cardWidth + 'px'; }); container._cardWidth = cardWidth; container._gap = gap; container._visibleCards = n; // save dynamic visible card count // Always reset position when (re-)initialising container._offset = 0; container.style.transition = 'none'; container.style.transform = 'translateX(0px)'; updateSliderNav(scrollId); } // ── Move cards left/right ───────────────────────────────────── function slideCards(scrollId, dir) { const container = document.getElementById(scrollId); shadarasa: '#', kizil: '#', foundation: '#', acfhe: '#' }; // ── Mobile Drawer Toggle Script ───────────────────────────────── function initMobileMenu() { const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn'); const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-drawer'); const closeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-close-btn'); const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-therapies', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-videos', () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(1); }, () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); });

title: Counseling: Compassionate Support for Mind & Spirit
desc: A medical journey — whether recovering from stroke, living with a chronic neurological condition, or facing a life-altering disability — is not only a physical ...
content: Counseling: Compassionate Support for Mind & Spirit A medical journey — whether recovering from stroke, living with a chronic neurological condition, or facing a life-altering disability — is not only a physical experience. It profoundly affects emotions, relationships, identity, and sense of purpose. Compassionate, skilled counseling is essential to support both patients and families through these challenges. At Ayurgreen Hospital, professional counseling is provided as an integral component of all rehabilitation programs — not as a separate service to be requested, but as a proactive, embedded dimension of care. Our trained counselors and clinical psychologists routinely screen all patients and families for psychological needs and provide responsive, personalized support. Our counseling services bridge the gap between the clinical expertise of our medical team and the human experience of our patients and families — ensuring that the emotional, relational, and spiritual dimensions of recovery receive the same expert attention as the physical dimensions.

title: What Our Counselors Address
desc: Compassionate, professional counseling for the emotional, relational, and psychological challenges of illness and rehabilitation.
content: What Our Counselors Address Compassionate, professional counseling for the emotional, relational, and psychological challenges of illness and rehabilitation.

title: Comprehensive Counseling Services
desc: Professional, compassionate counseling integrated within our rehabilitation programs for patient and family wellbeing.
content: Comprehensive Counseling Services Professional, compassionate counseling integrated within our rehabilitation programs for patient and family wellbeing.

title: Individual Patient Counseling
desc: One-to-one counseling sessions addressing the emotional impact of sudden disability, the grief of lost function and independence, adjustment to changed life rol...
content: Individual Patient Counseling One-to-one counseling sessions addressing the emotional impact of sudden disability, the grief of lost function and independence, adjustment to changed life roles and relationships, motivation and engagement in rehabilitation, fear of the future, and spiritual and existential questions that arise in serious illness. Person-centered, solution-focused, and CBT approaches used flexibly to meet each patient's needs.

title: Family & Caregiver Counseling
desc: Structured family sessions facilitated by our counselors: understanding the patient's diagnosis and what to realistically expect from recovery; managing changed...
content: Family & Caregiver Counseling Structured family sessions facilitated by our counselors: understanding the patient's diagnosis and what to realistically expect from recovery; managing changed family dynamics, roles, and responsibilities; communication strategies that support the patient's autonomy and dignity; financial planning implications of long-term care; and managing sibling and extended family relationships when a family member has serious illness.

title: Sattvavajaya (Ayurvedic Mind Counseling)
desc: Ayurveda's Sattvavajaya Chikitsa — psychological healing through self-knowledge, positive thinking, and spiritual alignment — complements modern counseling with...
content: Sattvavajaya (Ayurvedic Mind Counseling) Ayurveda's Sattvavajaya Chikitsa — psychological healing through self-knowledge, positive thinking, and spiritual alignment — complements modern counseling with ancient wisdom. Practices including Svadhyaya (self-reflection), positive affirmation (Mantra recitation), and guidance on Ayurvedic lifestyle for mental wellbeing (Dinacharya, Sadvritta) provide a culturally resonant framework for psychological healing alongside modern counseling.

title: Group Support & Peer Support Programs
desc: Structured therapeutic support groups for stroke survivors, brain injury patients, spinal cord injury patients, and caregivers — providing peer connection, shar...
content: Group Support & Peer Support Programs Structured therapeutic support groups for stroke survivors, brain injury patients, spinal cord injury patients, and caregivers — providing peer connection, shared experience, mutual support, and practical advice from those who truly understand the challenges. Group therapy reduces isolation, builds community, and accelerates the adjustment process through shared narrative and collective wisdom.

title: Counseling Approaches & Support Tools
desc: Evidence-based counseling techniques integrated with Ayurvedic psychological approaches for complete emotional support.
content: Counseling Approaches & Support Tools Evidence-based counseling techniques integrated with Ayurvedic psychological approaches for complete emotional support.

title: Your Recovery Journey
desc: Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.
content: Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.

title: Start Your Recovery Journey Today
desc: Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway.
content: Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway.

flex-direction: column; gap: 0; padding-top: 24px; } Explore Departments Departments Ayurveda Physiotherapy Robotic Rehabilitation Occupational Therapy Speech Therapy Virtual Reality Yoga and Meditation Acupuncture Reflexology Hydro / Aquatic Therapy Pediatrics Slimming Treatment Pain Management Diet & Nutrition Counseling Dentistry Modern Medicine Assistive Devices OVERVIEW Dentistry: Oral Health as a Foundation of Overall Wellness Oral health is inseparable from overall health. Dental problems — from tooth decay and gum disease to dental pain and oral infections — not only cause local suffering but contribute to systemic inflammation, impair nutrition through difficulty eating, and significantly affect confidence, social interaction, and quality of life. At Ayurgreen Hospital, our Dentistry Department provides comprehensive dental care within the holistic, integrated hospital environment. Dental care is particularly important for our rehabilitation population — poor oral hygiene increases the risk of aspiration pneumonia in dysphagic stroke patients; dental pain can disrupt concentration and rehabilitation engagement; and nutritional needs may be compromised if dental problems make eating painful or difficult. Our dental team provides expert care from routine preventive dentistry through to complex restorations and oral surgery, in a calm, patient-centered environment that accommodates the special needs of our medically complex rehabilitation patients. DENTAL SERVICES Dental Conditions & Services We Provide Comprehensive dental care for the general public and the special dental needs of our rehabilitation patients. Preventive & Restorative Dentistry Routine check-ups, professional cleaning (scaling and polishing), cavity detection, composite fillings, and crown restorations — comprehensive preventive and restorative dental care for long-term oral health. Oral Surgery & Extractions Expert tooth extractions (including impacted wisdom teeth), minor oral surgery, and management of dental infections — performed safely with awareness of each patient's medical conditions and medications. Prosthetics & Dental Implants Dental implants, dentures, bridges, and crowns for tooth replacement — restoring the ability to eat comfortably, speak clearly, and smile with confidence after tooth loss. DENTAL SERVICES Comprehensive Dental Care Expert, patient-centered dental care integrated with our holistic hospital environment. 1 Preventive Dental Care & Oral Hygiene Comprehensive preventive dentistry: professional scaling and polishing, fluoride treatments, dental sealants for children, caries risk assessment, customized oral hygiene instruction, and nutritional counseling for dental health. For our rehabilitation patients — particular emphasis on oral hygiene protocols for those with dysphagia and reduced saliva production, to prevent aspiration pneumonia. 2 Restorative & Cosmetic Dentistry Tooth-colored composite fillings, porcelain crowns and bridges, dental inlays and onlays, and ceramic veneers — restoring the function, strength, and aesthetics of damaged teeth. Digital X-ray and intraoral cameras for precise diagnosis. All restorative materials are carefully selected for biocompatibility. 3 Ayurvedic Oral Health Integration Ayurveda's Dantadhavana (tooth care) and Gandusha (oil pulling) practices complement modern dental care with powerful antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and oral microbiome-balancing effects. Arimedadi Tailam (Ayurvedic oil pulling preparation), Triphala mouthwash for gum health, and herbal tooth powders are integrated with conventional dental treatment for comprehensive oral health. 4 Dental Implants & Prosthetic Dentistry Titanium dental implants providing the most natural and functional replacement for missing teeth — preserving bone, enabling normal biting and chewing, and restoring confidence. Implant-supported dentures and bridges for those with multiple missing teeth. Conventional full and partial dentures with high-quality materials and optimal fit for comfort and function. DENTAL TECHNOLOGY Advanced Dental Technology Modern dental technology for precise diagnosis, comfortable treatment, and excellent aesthetic outcomes. Digital Dental X-Ray Low-radiation digital dental radiography providing high-resolution images for precise diagnosis of cavities, bone loss, and pathology — with dramatically less radiation than conventional X-rays. Intraoral Camera High-magnification intraoral cameras allowing patients to see exactly what the dentist sees — improving communication, understanding, and informed consent for all dental procedures. Laser Dentistry Dental laser for painless gum therapy, cavity preparation with minimal drilling, teeth whitening, and minor oral surgery — improving patient comfort and reducing treatment time. Ayurvedic Oral Hygiene Integration Arimedadi Tailam oil pulling, Triphala mouthwash, and herbal dental powders complementing conventional dental care for comprehensive oral health and microbiome balance. Medically Complex Dental Care Expert dental care for patients on anticoagulants, antiplatelet agents, bisphosphonates, and immunosuppressants — safely managing the dental needs of our medically complex rehabilitation patients. RECOVERY TIMELINE Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence. 1. Assessment Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel. 2. Diagnosis Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors. 3. Personalized Plan Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols. 4. Therapy Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments. 5. Monitoring Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data. 6. Recovery Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan. COMMON QUERIES Frequently Asked Questions Find answers to key details about the Dentistry program. What is the recovery protocol for this program? Our recovery protocol for Dentistry combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains. How long is the typical inpatient stay? Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways. Is robotic therapy safe for all patients? Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists. Are the Ayurvedic medicines safe? All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state. Can we coordinate with our existing neurologist? Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care. What is the daily therapy schedule? A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon. Do you offer post-discharge support? Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains. How do I book a consultation? You can book a virtual consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly. Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway. or has no source yet const isNotPlaying = video.paused || !video.src || video.src === window.location.href; if (isNotPlaying) { // Pause and reset all other cards (restore their poster cover images) document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(otherVideo => { if (otherVideo !== video) { otherVideo.pause(); otherVideo.src = ""; // Clears the source to show poster otherVideo.load(); const otherCard = otherVideo.closest('.story-card'); otherCard.classList.remove('playing'); const otherMini = otherCard.querySelector('.story-mini-play-btn'); setMiniPlayIcon(otherMini, false); } }); // Dynamically set source if not set if (!video.src || video.src === window.location.href) { video.src = video.getAttribute('data-src') + "#t=0.001"; video.load(); } // Play video video.play().catch(err => console.log("Play interrupted:", err)); card.classList.add('playing'); setMiniPlayIcon(miniPlay, true); } else { // Stop current video video.pause(); video.src = ""; // Clear src to restore patient cover thumbnail video.load(); card.classList.remove('playing'); setMiniPlayIcon(miniPlay, false); // Restart auto-slider if no card is playing let anyPlaying = false; document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(v => { if (v.src && v.src !== "" && !v.paused) anyPlaying = true; }); if (!anyPlaying) { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); } } }; card.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); if (playOverlay) playOverlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); if (miniPlay) miniPlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); }); } // Auto sliding let videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); // Pause auto sliding on hover (only if no video is currently playing) const clipVideos = document.getElementById('clip-videos'); if (clipVideos) { clipVideos.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); }); clipVideos.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { let anyPlaying = false; document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(v => { if (!v.paused) anyPlaying = true; }); if (!anyPlaying) { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); } }); } function renderLifeGallery() { const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!rowTop || !rowBottom) return; const renderRow = (container, items) => { // No lazy loading — images need to measure their widths for the animation const markup = items.map((src) => { return `<img src="${src}" class="gallery-img" alt="Life at Ayurgreen">`; }).join(''); // Repeat the images 3 times for seamless wrapping container.innerHTML = markup + markup + markup; }; // Distribute images between top and bottom rows const topItems = []; const bottomItems = []; galleryImages.forEach((src, idx) => { if (idx % 2 === 0) { topItems.push(src); } else { bottomItems.push(src); } }); renderRow(rowTop, topItems); renderRow(rowBottom, bottomItems); } function initLifeGalleryAnimation() { const trigger = document.getElementById('life-gallery-trigger'); const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!trigger || !rowTop || !rowBottom) return; // Constant speed — never changes regardless of scroll const BASE_SPEED = 60; // pixels per second let trackTopWidth = 0; let trackBottomWidth = 0; let xTop = 0; let xBottom = 0; // direction: +1 = normal (scroll down), -1 = reversed (scroll up) let direction = 1; let targetDirection = 1; let lastScrollY = window.scrollY; let tickerAdded = false; let scrollListenerAdded = false; window.addEventListener('resize', () => { trackTopWidth = 0; trackBottomWidth = 0; }); function measureTracks() { const tw = rowTop.scrollWidth / 3; const bw = rowBottom.scrollWidth / 3; if (tw > 0) trackTopWidth = tw; if (bw > 0) trackBottomWidth = bw; } function runTicker() { if (tickerAdded) return; tickerAdded = true; measureTracks(); // Stagger the bottom row so rows are visually offset from each other if (trackBottomWidth > 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } // Detect scroll direction — set targetDirection, never touch speed if (!scrollListenerAdded) { scrollListenerAdded = true; window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { const current = window.scrollY; const delta = current - lastScrollY; lastScrollY = current; if (delta > 0) { // Scrolling down → normal direction targetDirection = 1; } else if (delta < 0) { // Scrolling up → reverse direction targetDirection = -1; } }, { passive: true }); } gsap.ticker.add((_time, deltaMs) => { const dt = Math.min(deltaMs / 1000, 0.05); // Re-measure if images haven't loaded widths yet if (trackTopWidth === 0 || trackBottomWidth === 0) { measureTracks(); if (trackBottomWidth > 0 && xBottom === 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } return; } // Smoothly interpolate direction so the flip feels natural, not jarring direction += (targetDirection - direction) * Math.min(dt * 5, 1); // Constant pixel step — speed never changes, only sign (direction) does const px = BASE_SPEED * direction * dt; xTop -= px; // top row: negative px = left, positive px = right xBottom += px; // bottom row: opposite direction always // Seamless infinite loop snapping if (xTop <= -trackTopWidth) xTop += trackTopWidth; if (xTop > 0) xTop -= trackTopWidth; if (xBottom >= 0) xBottom -= trackBottomWidth; if (xBottom < -trackBottomWidth) xBottom += trackBottomWidth; gsap.set(rowTop, { x: xTop, force3D: true }); gsap.set(rowBottom, { x: xBottom, force3D: true }); }); } // Start only when the gallery section scrolls into view if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) { const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { if (entries[0].isIntersecting) { observer.disconnect(); requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(runTicker)); } }, { threshold: 0.01 }); observer.observe(trigger); } else { setTimeout(runTicker, 500); } // Re-measure on resize window.addEventListener('resize', measureTracks, { passive: true }); // Re-measure when images load to ensure correct widths are used for animation const imgs = trigger.querySelectorAll('.gallery-img'); imgs.forEach(img => { if (img.complete) { measureTracks(); } else { img.addEventListener('load', measureTracks, { passive: true }); } }); } // Render stories dynamically from Instagram links renderDynamicStories(); setupInfiniteSlider(); initVideoSlider(); // Render Life Gallery renderLifeGallery(); initLifeGalleryAnimation(); // Understanding Ayurgreen Pinned Storytelling GSAP Timeline let mm = gsap.matchMedia(); mm.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Separate ScrollTrigger for the Title to reveal it immediately as the section enters the viewport gsap.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", ease: "power2.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 95%", // Starts revealing immediately when it starts entering the viewport end: "top 40%", // Fully revealed by the time it reaches top 40% scrub: 1.0 } }); // Pinned timeline starting at top top let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top top", end: "+=250%", pin: true, scrub: 1.2, invalidateOnRefresh: true } }); // Timeline starts directly with video reveal and scales up centered tl.to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 1.6, ease: "power2.out" }) .to({}, { duration: 2.0 }) // Pause to let the video settle in the center focus // Video shifts left, title stays at the top, card reveals .to(".storytelling-video-box", { xPercent: -15, scale: 0.95, duration: 1.8, ease: "power2.inOut" }) .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, x: 0, y: 30, scale: 1, duration: 1.8, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.8") .to({}, { duration: 0.8 }) // Settle card .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, stagger: 0.5, ease: "power2.out" }) .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.3") .to({}, { duration: 1.5 }); // Hold at final state }); mm.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 80%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); tl.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", duration: 0.6 }) .to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.2 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }, "-=0.2"); }); gsap.fromTo(".stories-bg-shape", { width: "70%" }, { width: "100%", ease: "power1.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: ".stories-relearning-section", start: "top bottom-=10%", end: "center center", scrub: 1.2, // Ultra smooth scroll scrubbing with lag invalidateOnRefresh: true } } ); // ADMIRE Ecosystem animations using gsap.matchMedia() let admireMM = gsap.matchMedia(); admireMM.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Desktop entry timeline let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top 75%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); gsap.set("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 0, y: 35 }); gsap.set(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 0, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 0 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.7, ease: "back.out(1.2)" }, 0) .to(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 1, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.1 }, 0) .to([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.12, ease: "power2.out" }, 0) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08, ease: "back.out(1.5)" }, 0.2); // Parallax scroll effect on cards gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-1", { y: -25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-2", { y: 15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-3", { y: -15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-4", { y: 25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); // Running dash lines let flowAnim = }); gsap.set(["#admire-centerpiece", ".admire-info-card", ".admire-tag-pill"], { opacity: 0, y: 30 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08 }, "-=0.3") .to(".admire-info-card", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.15 }, "-=0.3"); }); window.addEventListener('resize', initVideoSlider); // --- Ayurgreen Ecosystem Redirection Configuration --- const ECOSYSTEM_URLS = { hospitals: '#', getwell: '#', niramaya: '#', herbals: '#', college: '#', scientifica: '#', shadarasa: '#', kizil: '#', foundation: '#', acfhe: '#' }; // ── Mobile Drawer Toggle Script ───────────────────────────────── function initMobileMenu() { const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn'); const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-drawer'); const closeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-close-btn'); const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-therapies', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-videos', () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(1); }, () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); });

title: Dentistry: Oral Health as a Foundation of Overall Wellness
desc: Oral health is inseparable from overall health. Dental problems — from tooth decay and gum disease to dental pain and oral infections — not only cause local suf...
content: Dentistry: Oral Health as a Foundation of Overall Wellness Oral health is inseparable from overall health. Dental problems — from tooth decay and gum disease to dental pain and oral infections — not only cause local suffering but contribute to systemic inflammation, impair nutrition through difficulty eating, and significantly affect confidence, social interaction, and quality of life. At Ayurgreen Hospital, our Dentistry Department provides comprehensive dental care within the holistic, integrated hospital environment. Dental care is particularly important for our rehabilitation population — poor oral hygiene increases the risk of aspiration pneumonia in dysphagic stroke patients; dental pain can disrupt concentration and rehabilitation engagement; and nutritional needs may be compromised if dental problems make eating painful or difficult. Our dental team provides expert care from routine preventive dentistry through to complex restorations and oral surgery, in a calm, patient-centered environment that accommodates the special needs of our medically complex rehabilitation patients.

title: Dental Conditions & Services We Provide

content: Dental Conditions & Services We Provide Comprehensive dental care for the general public and the special dental needs of our rehabilitation patients.

title: Preventive Dental Care & Oral Hygiene
desc: Comprehensive preventive dentistry: professional scaling and polishing, fluoride treatments, dental sealants for children, caries risk assessment, customized or...
content: Preventive Dental Care & Oral Hygiene Comprehensive preventive dentistry: professional scaling and polishing, fluoride treatments, dental sealants for children, caries risk assessment, customized oral hygiene instruction, and nutritional counseling for dental health. For our rehabilitation patients — particular emphasis on oral hygiene protocols for those with dysphagia and reduced saliva production, to prevent aspiration pneumonia.

title: Restorative & Cosmetic Dentistry
desc: Tooth-colored composite fillings, porcelain crowns and bridges, dental inlays and onlays, and ceramic veneers — restoring the function, strength, and aesthetics...
content: Restorative & Cosmetic Dentistry Tooth-colored composite fillings, porcelain crowns and bridges, dental inlays and onlays, and ceramic veneers — restoring the function, strength, and aesthetics of damaged teeth. Digital X-ray and intraoral cameras for precise diagnosis. All restorative materials are carefully selected for biocompatibility.

title: Ayurvedic Oral Health Integration
desc: Ayurveda's Dantadhavana (tooth care) and Gandusha (oil pulling) practices complement modern dental care with powerful antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and oral...
content: Ayurvedic Oral Health Integration Ayurveda's Dantadhavana (tooth care) and Gandusha (oil pulling) practices complement modern dental care with powerful antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and oral microbiome-balancing effects. Arimedadi Tailam (Ayurvedic oil pulling preparation), Triphala mouthwash for gum health, and herbal tooth powders are integrated with conventional dental treatment for comprehensive oral health.

title: Dental Implants & Prosthetic Dentistry
desc: Titanium dental implants providing the most natural and functional replacement for missing teeth — preserving bone, enabling normal biting and chewing, and rest...
content: Dental Implants & Prosthetic Dentistry Titanium dental implants providing the most natural and functional replacement for missing teeth — preserving bone, enabling normal biting and chewing, and restoring confidence. Implant-supported dentures and bridges for those with multiple missing teeth. Conventional full and partial dentures with high-quality materials and optimal fit for comfort and function.

title: Advanced Dental Technology
desc: Modern dental technology for precise diagnosis, comfortable treatment, and excellent aesthetic outcomes.
content: Advanced Dental Technology Modern dental technology for precise diagnosis, comfortable treatment, and excellent aesthetic outcomes.

flex-direction: column; gap: 0; padding-top: 24px; } Explore Specialities Specialities Stroke Spinal Cord Injury Traumatic Brain Injury Hemiplegia Quadriplegia & Paraplegia Post-Surgical Complications Motor Neuron Diseases Cerebral Palsy Parkinson's Disease Myopathy Disc & Spine Problems Sciatica Obesity Post-Covid Complications Muscular Dystrophy Osteoarthritis Rheumatoid Arthritis Developmental Delay Psychological Problems Autism Psychiatry OVERVIEW Developmental Delay Rehabilitation: Every Milestone Matters Developmental delay refers to a child not reaching developmental milestones (motor, speech, cognitive, social, or adaptive skills) at the expected age. It can range from specific delays in a single domain to global developmental delay affecting all areas of development. At Ayurgreen Hospital, we provide a comprehensive, family-centered developmental rehabilitation program that addresses each child's unique developmental needs across all domains. Our multidisciplinary team of developmental pediatricians, physiotherapists, occupational therapists, speech therapists, and Ayurvedic physicians works together to help every child reach their maximum developmental potential. Early intervention is critical — the earlier a developmental delay is identified and treated, the greater the opportunity to harness the extraordinary plasticity of the developing brain and close the developmental gap. DEVELOPMENTAL CONDITIONS Developmental Delays We Address Comprehensive early intervention for all types and severities of developmental delay and disorder. Global Developmental Delay Children with significant delays in two or more developmental domains (motor, speech, cognitive, adaptive). Comprehensive multidisciplinary assessment and intensive early intervention across all affected areas. Motor Developmental Delay Delayed achievement of motor milestones (sitting, standing, walking) from causes including cerebral palsy, hypotonia, and prematurity. Intensive physiotherapy and Ayurvedic neurodevelopmental therapies. Speech, Language & Communication Delay Delayed speech acquisition, expressive and receptive language disorders, and non-verbal communication challenges. Comprehensive speech therapy and augmentative communication strategies. DEVELOPMENTAL INTERVENTION Comprehensive Developmental Rehabilitation Family-centered, evidence-based developmental therapy across all domains of a child's development. 1 Physiotherapy for Motor Development NDT (Neurodevelopmental Treatment/Bobath) approach targeting normal movement patterns, postural control, and milestone achievement. Sensorimotor integration therapy for children with hypotonia. Gait training, balance development, and gross motor skill building — all delivered through play-based, engaging activities appropriate to each child's developmental level. 2 Speech Therapy & Communication Development Early language intervention programs for pre-verbal children and targeted speech therapy for language delay. Play-based intervention, parent coaching, and augmentative communication strategies (PECS, sign language, AAC devices) ensure all children have a means of communication while speech develops. Social communication groups for pragmatic language development. 3 Ayurvedic Neurodevelopmental Therapies Kerala Ayurveda's Kumarabrityam (pediatric specialization) has specific approaches for developmental delay. Abhyanga with Bala Ashwagandha oil promotes sensorimotor development and neuromuscular tone. Shiroabhyanga (head oil massage) stimulates brain development. Medhya Rasayana formulations — Brahmi, Shatavari, Yashtimadhu — support cognitive development and neuroprotection. 4 Occupational Therapy & Sensory Integration Fine motor skill development, handwriting readiness, self-care skill training, sensory integration therapy for children with sensory processing disorders, and school readiness programs. Our OTs work with parents and teachers to ensure children can participate fully in educational and social environments. DEVELOPMENTAL THERAPY TOOLS Technology & Approaches for Developmental Rehabilitation Evidence-based developmental therapy tools and Ayurvedic approaches for optimal child development. Denver Developmental Screening Standardized developmental assessment screening for early identification of delays across all domains — the foundation of effective, timely early intervention. Sensory Integration Therapy Suite Specialized sensory gym equipment (swings, climbing structures, tactile materials) for sensory integration therapy addressing hyper/hyposensitivity and sensory processing disorders. AAC Communication Systems PECS, communication boards, and high-tech AAC devices for children with significant communication delays — ensuring every child has a voice. Ayurvedic Pediatric Neurodevelopment Brahmi, Shatavari, and Bala Ashwagandha formulations combined with Shiroabhyanga and Abhyanga supporting brain development, cognitive function, and neuromuscular tone in children with developmental delay. Parent Training & Home Programs Extensive parent education, coaching, and home exercise programs ensuring therapy continues 24/7 — maximizing the critical early intervention window for developmental progress. RECOVERY TIMELINE Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence. 1. Assessment Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel. 2. Diagnosis Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors. 3. Personalized Plan Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols. 4. Therapy Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments. 5. Monitoring Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data. 6. Recovery Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan. COMMON QUERIES Frequently Asked Questions Find answers to key details about the Developmental Delay program. What is the recovery protocol for this program? Our recovery protocol for Developmental Delay combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains. How long is the typical inpatient stay? Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways. Is robotic therapy safe for all patients? Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists. Are the Ayurvedic medicines safe? All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state. Can we coordinate with our existing neurologist? Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care. What is the daily therapy schedule? A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon. Do you offer post-discharge support? Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains. How do I book a consultation? You can book a virtual consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly. Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway. Dynamically set source if not set if (!video.src || video.src === window.location.href) { video.src = video.getAttribute('data-src') + "#t=0.001"; video.load(); } // Play video video.play().catch(err for the animation const markup = items.map((src) => { return `<img src="${src}" class="gallery-img" alt="Life at Ayurgreen">`; }).join(''); // Repeat the images 3 times for seamless wrapping container.innerHTML = markup + markup + markup; }; // Distribute images between top and bottom rows const topItems = []; const bottomItems = []; galleryImages.forEach((src, idx) => { if (idx % 2 === 0) { topItems.push(src); } else { bottomItems.push(src); } }); renderRow(rowTop, topItems); renderRow(rowBottom, bottomItems); } function initLifeGalleryAnimation() { const trigger = document.getElementById('life-gallery-trigger'); const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!trigger || !rowTop || !rowBottom) return; // Constant speed — never changes regardless of scroll const BASE_SPEED = 60; // pixels per second let trackTopWidth = 0; let trackBottomWidth = 0; let xTop = 0; let xBottom = 0; // direction: +1 = normal (scroll down), -1 = reversed (scroll up) let direction = 1; let targetDirection = 1; let lastScrollY = window.scrollY; let tickerAdded = false; let scrollListenerAdded = false; window.addEventListener('resize', () => { trackTopWidth = 0; trackBottomWidth = 0; }); function measureTracks() { const tw = rowTop.scrollWidth / 3; const bw = rowBottom.scrollWidth / 3; if (tw > 0) trackTopWidth = tw; if (bw > 0) trackBottomWidth = bw; } function runTicker() { if (tickerAdded) return; tickerAdded = true; measureTracks(); // Stagger the bottom row so rows are visually offset from each other if (trackBottomWidth > 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } // Detect scroll direction — set targetDirection, never touch speed if (!scrollListenerAdded) { scrollListenerAdded = true; window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { const current = window.scrollY; const delta = current - lastScrollY; lastScrollY = current; if (delta > 0) { // Scrolling down → normal direction targetDirection = 1; } else if (delta < 0) { // Scrolling up → reverse direction targetDirection = -1; } }, { passive: true }); } gsap.ticker.add((_time, deltaMs) => { const dt = Math.min(deltaMs / 1000, 0.05); // Re-measure if images haven't loaded widths yet if (trackTopWidth === 0 || trackBottomWidth === 0) { measureTracks(); if (trackBottomWidth > 0 && xBottom === 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } return; } // Smoothly interpolate direction so the flip feels natural, not jarring direction += (targetDirection - direction) * Math.min(dt * 5, 1); // Constant pixel step — speed never changes, only sign (direction) does const px = BASE_SPEED * direction * dt; xTop -= px; // top row: negative px = left, positive px = right xBottom += px; // bottom row: opposite direction always // Seamless infinite loop snapping if (xTop <= -trackTopWidth) xTop += trackTopWidth; if (xTop > 0) xTop -= trackTopWidth; if (xBottom >= 0) xBottom -= trackBottomWidth; if (xBottom < -trackBottomWidth) xBottom += trackBottomWidth; gsap.set(rowTop, { x: xTop, force3D: true }); gsap.set(rowBottom, { x: xBottom, force3D: true }); }); } // Start only when the gallery section scrolls into view if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) { const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { if (entries[0].isIntersecting) { observer.disconnect(); requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(runTicker)); } }, { threshold: 0.01 }); observer.observe(trigger); } else { setTimeout(runTicker, 500); } // Re-measure on resize window.addEventListener('resize', measureTracks, { passive: true }); // Re-measure when images load to ensure correct widths are used for animation const imgs = trigger.querySelectorAll('.gallery-img'); imgs.forEach(img => { if (img.complete) { ".stories-relearning-section", start: "top bottom-=10%", end: "center center", scrub: 1.2, // Ultra smooth scroll scrubbing with lag invalidateOnRefresh: true } } ); // ADMIRE Ecosystem animations using gsap.matchMedia() let admireMM = gsap.matchMedia(); admireMM.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Desktop entry timeline let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: shadarasa: '#', kizil: '#', foundation: '#', acfhe: '#' }; // ── Mobile Drawer Toggle Script ───────────────────────────────── function initMobileMenu() { const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn'); const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-drawer'); const closeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-close-btn'); const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); });

title: Developmental Delay Rehabilitation: Every Milestone Matters
desc: Developmental delay refers to a child not reaching developmental milestones (motor, speech, cognitive, social, or adaptive skills) at the expected age. It can r...
content: Developmental Delay Rehabilitation: Every Milestone Matters Developmental delay refers to a child not reaching developmental milestones (motor, speech, cognitive, social, or adaptive skills) at the expected age. It can range from specific delays in a single domain to global developmental delay affecting all areas of development. At Ayurgreen Hospital, we provide a comprehensive, family-centered developmental rehabilitation program that addresses each child's unique developmental needs across all domains. Our multidisciplinary team of developmental pediatricians, physiotherapists, occupational therapists, speech therapists, and Ayurvedic physicians works together to help every child reach their maximum developmental potential. Early intervention is critical — the earlier a developmental delay is identified and treated, the greater the opportunity to harness the extraordinary plasticity of the developing brain and close the developmental gap.

title: Developmental Delays We Address
desc: Comprehensive early intervention for all types and severities of developmental delay and disorder.
content: Developmental Delays We Address Comprehensive early intervention for all types and severities of developmental delay and disorder.

title: Comprehensive Developmental Rehabilitation

title: Physiotherapy for Motor Development
desc: NDT (Neurodevelopmental Treatment/Bobath) approach targeting normal movement patterns, postural control, and milestone achievement. Sensorimotor integration the...
content: Physiotherapy for Motor Development NDT (Neurodevelopmental Treatment/Bobath) approach targeting normal movement patterns, postural control, and milestone achievement. Sensorimotor integration therapy for children with hypotonia. Gait training, balance development, and gross motor skill building — all delivered through play-based, engaging activities appropriate to each child's developmental level.

title: Speech Therapy & Communication Development

content: Speech Therapy & Communication Development Early language intervention programs for pre-verbal children and targeted speech therapy for language delay. Social communication groups for pragmatic language development.

Abhyanga with Bala Ashwagandha oil promotes sensorimotor development and neuromuscular tone. Shiroabhyanga (head oil massage) stimulates brain development. Medhya Rasayana formulations — Brahmi, Shatavari, Yashtimadhu — support cognitive development and neuroprotection.
