flex-direction: column; gap: 0; padding-top: 24px; } Explore Departments Departments Ayurveda Physiotherapy Robotic Rehabilitation Occupational Therapy Speech Therapy Virtual Reality Yoga and Meditation Acupuncture Reflexology Hydro / Aquatic Therapy Pediatrics Slimming Treatment Pain Management Diet & Nutrition Counseling Dentistry Modern Medicine Assistive Devices OVERVIEW Diet & Nutrition: Fueling Recovery, Optimizing Health Nutrition is the foundation of all healing. Every cellular repair process, every neurological recovery mechanism, every immune response — they all depend on adequate, appropriate nutrition. In the context of neurological and physical rehabilitation, optimal nutrition is not just supportive — it is a primary therapeutic intervention. At Ayurgreen Hospital, our Dietetics and Nutrition Department provides expert, individualized nutritional care for all patients. Our registered dietitians work as integral members of the rehabilitation team, understanding that a patient who is malnourished, hyperglycemic, or nutritionally deficient cannot achieve their maximum rehabilitation potential. Our approach uniquely combines modern evidence-based nutritional science with Ayurvedic dietary principles (Pathya-Apathya) — creating nutritional plans that are not only clinically precise but also culturally appropriate, palatable, and sustainable for long-term health after discharge. NUTRITION SERVICES Nutritional Support We Provide Comprehensive, individualized nutritional care for all rehabilitation patients and community health goals. Rehabilitation Nutrition Optimized nutrition for neurological and physical rehabilitation — supporting neuroplasticity with brain-healthy nutrients (Omega-3, antioxidants), providing adequate protein for muscle recovery, and managing swallowing difficulties with texture-modified diets. Therapeutic Medical Diets Specialized therapeutic diets for medical conditions: diabetic diet, renal diet, cardiac diet (low sodium, low fat), ketogenic diet for epilepsy, high-protein diet for wound healing, anti-inflammatory diet for arthritis and autoimmune conditions. Weight Management & Metabolic Nutrition Evidence-based nutritional programs for weight loss, muscle gain, sports performance, and metabolic syndrome management — combining caloric precision with Ayurvedic dietary wisdom. NUTRITION SERVICES Comprehensive Dietetics & Nutrition Services Expert, individualized nutritional care integrating modern nutritional science with Ayurvedic dietary wisdom. 1 Comprehensive Nutritional Assessment Detailed nutritional assessment for every admitted patient: anthropometric measurements (weight, height, BMI, waist circumference), body composition analysis, dietary history assessment, biochemical nutritional markers (albumin, prealbumin, micronutrient levels), dysphagia screening for neurological patients, and identification of malnutrition risk using validated tools (MNA, SGA). 2 Neurological Rehabilitation Dietetics Specialized nutritional management for neurological rehabilitation: high-protein nutrition supporting muscle rebuilding during intensive physiotherapy; brain-healthy micronutrients (B12, folate, Omega-3, antioxidants) supporting neuroplasticity; diabetic nutrition for the high proportion of diabetic stroke patients; dysphagia diet management (IDDSI texture-modified foods); and enteral and parenteral nutrition for patients unable to eat orally. 3 Ayurvedic Dietary Medicine (Pathya-Apathya) Ayurvedic dietary principles form a sophisticated nutritional science: Pathya (appropriate) and Apathya (inappropriate) foods are individually prescribed based on each patient's Prakriti (constitution), current Vikriti (imbalance), and condition. Specific foods that support stroke recovery (warm, easy-to-digest foods, ghee in moderation), reduce Vata (neurological diseases), or pacify Kapha (obesity, metabolic disease) are incorporated into practical, culturally appropriate meal plans. 4 Clinical & Enteral Nutrition Support Comprehensive clinical nutrition support for complex rehabilitation patients: nasogastric and PEG tube feeding management for patients with severe dysphagia or reduced consciousness; parenteral nutrition for patients unable to tolerate enteral feeds; transition feeding protocols supporting the move from tube feeding to oral nutrition; and specialized nutrition for wound healing, pressure sore management, and post-surgical recovery. NUTRITION CAPABILITIES Advanced Dietetics & Nutrition Technology Evidence-based nutritional assessment and intervention for optimal rehabilitation and health outcomes. Metabolic Rate Assessment Resting metabolic rate measurement enabling precisely individualized caloric prescriptions — eliminating guesswork and ensuring nutrition plans are physiologically accurate. DEXA Body Composition Dual-energy X-ray absorptiometry measuring fat mass, lean mass, and bone density — the most accurate method for monitoring nutritional rehabilitation progress. Ayurvedic Dietary Consultation Individualized Pathya-Apathya dietary prescriptions combining Ayurvedic constitutional analysis with modern nutritional science for culturally appropriate, clinically optimal meal planning. Dysphagia Diet Management IDDSI-compliant texture-modified food preparation and liquid thickening for all levels of dysphagia — ensuring safe oral nutrition for neurological patients at every stage of swallowing recovery. Enteral Nutrition Management Expert management of nasogastric, PEG, and jejunal tube feeding including formula selection, rate titration, complication management, and transition feeding protocols. RECOVERY TIMELINE Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence. 1. Assessment Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel. 2. Diagnosis Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors. 3. Personalized Plan Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols. 4. Therapy Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments. 5. Monitoring Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data. 6. Recovery Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan. COMMON QUERIES Frequently Asked Questions Find answers to key details about the Diet & Nutrition program. What is the recovery protocol for this program? Our recovery protocol for Diet & Nutrition combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains. How long is the typical inpatient stay? Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways. Is robotic therapy safe for all patients? Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists. Are the Ayurvedic medicines safe? All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state. Can we coordinate with our existing neurologist? Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care. What is the daily therapy schedule? A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon. Do you offer post-discharge support? Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains. How do I book a consultation? You can book a virtual consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly. Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway. const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!container || !clip) return; const gap = 18; const totalWidth = clip.clientWidth; // Dynamic card count based on viewport width let n = 5; if (totalWidth < 480) n = 1; else if (totalWidth < 768) n = 2; else if (totalWidth < 1024) n = 3; else if (totalWidth < 1366) n = 4; else n = 5; const cardWidth = (totalWidth - gap * (n - 1)) / n; container.querySelectorAll('.rehab-card').forEach(card => { card.style.width = cardWidth + 'px'; card.style.minWidth = cardWidth + 'px'; }); container._cardWidth = cardWidth; container._gap = gap; container._visibleCards = n; // save dynamic visible card count // Always reset position when (re-)initialising container._offset = 0; container.style.transition = 'none'; container.style.transform = 'translateX(0px)'; updateSliderNav(scrollId); } // ── Move cards left/right ───────────────────────────────────── function slideCards(scrollId, dir) { const container = document.getElementById(scrollId); if (!container) return; const cardWidth = container._cardWidth || 255; const gap = container._gap || 18; const n = container._visibleCards || 5; // read dynamic count const total = container.querySelectorAll('.rehab-card').length; const maxOffset = Math.max(0, total - n); container._offset = Math.min(Math.max((container._offset || 0) + dir, 0), maxOffset); const translateX = -(container._offset * (cardWidth + gap)); container.style.transform = 'translateX(' + translateX + 'px)'; initVideoSlider); // --- Ayurgreen Ecosystem Redirection Configuration --- const ECOSYSTEM_URLS = { hospitals: '#', getwell: '#', niramaya: '#', herbals: '#', college: '#', scientifica: '#', shadarasa: '#', kizil: '#', foundation: '#', acfhe: '#' }; // ── Mobile Drawer Toggle Script ───────────────────────────────── function initMobileMenu() { const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn'); const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-drawer'); const closeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-close-btn'); const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-therapies', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-videos', () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(1); }, () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); });

title: Diet & Nutrition: Fueling Recovery, Optimizing Health
desc: Nutrition is the foundation of all healing. Every cellular repair process, every neurological recovery mechanism, every immune response — they all depend on ade...
content: Diet & Nutrition: Fueling Recovery, Optimizing Health Nutrition is the foundation of all healing. Every cellular repair process, every neurological recovery mechanism, every immune response — they all depend on adequate, appropriate nutrition. In the context of neurological and physical rehabilitation, optimal nutrition is not just supportive — it is a primary therapeutic intervention. At Ayurgreen Hospital, our Dietetics and Nutrition Department provides expert, individualized nutritional care for all patients. Our registered dietitians work as integral members of the rehabilitation team, understanding that a patient who is malnourished, hyperglycemic, or nutritionally deficient cannot achieve their maximum rehabilitation potential. Our approach uniquely combines modern evidence-based nutritional science with Ayurvedic dietary principles (Pathya-Apathya) — creating nutritional plans that are not only clinically precise but also culturally appropriate, palatable, and sustainable for long-term health after discharge.

title: Nutritional Support We Provide
desc: Comprehensive, individualized nutritional care for all rehabilitation patients and community health goals.
content: Nutritional Support We Provide Comprehensive, individualized nutritional care for all rehabilitation patients and community health goals.

title: Comprehensive Dietetics & Nutrition Services
desc: Expert, individualized nutritional care integrating modern nutritional science with Ayurvedic dietary wisdom.
content: Comprehensive Dietetics & Nutrition Services Expert, individualized nutritional care integrating modern nutritional science with Ayurvedic dietary wisdom.

title: Comprehensive Nutritional Assessment
desc: Detailed nutritional assessment for every admitted patient: anthropometric measurements (weight, height, BMI, waist circumference), body composition analysis, d...
content: Comprehensive Nutritional Assessment Detailed nutritional assessment for every admitted patient: anthropometric measurements (weight, height, BMI, waist circumference), body composition analysis, dietary history assessment, biochemical nutritional markers (albumin, prealbumin, micronutrient levels), dysphagia screening for neurological patients, and identification of malnutrition risk using validated tools (MNA, SGA).

title: Neurological Rehabilitation Dietetics
desc: Specialized nutritional management for neurological rehabilitation: high-protein nutrition supporting muscle rebuilding during intensive physiotherapy; brain-he...
content: Neurological Rehabilitation Dietetics Specialized nutritional management for neurological rehabilitation: high-protein nutrition supporting muscle rebuilding during intensive physiotherapy; brain-healthy micronutrients (B12, folate, Omega-3, antioxidants) supporting neuroplasticity; diabetic nutrition for the high proportion of diabetic stroke patients; dysphagia diet management (IDDSI texture-modified foods); and enteral and parenteral nutrition for patients unable to eat orally.

title: Ayurvedic Dietary Medicine (Pathya-Apathya)
desc: Ayurvedic dietary principles form a sophisticated nutritional science: Pathya (appropriate) and Apathya (inappropriate) foods are individually prescribed based ...
content: Ayurvedic Dietary Medicine (Pathya-Apathya) Ayurvedic dietary principles form a sophisticated nutritional science: Pathya (appropriate) and Apathya (inappropriate) foods are individually prescribed based on each patient's Prakriti (constitution), current Vikriti (imbalance), and condition. Specific foods that support stroke recovery (warm, easy-to-digest foods, ghee in moderation), reduce Vata (neurological diseases), or pacify Kapha (obesity, metabolic disease) are incorporated into practical, culturally appropriate meal plans.

title: Clinical & Enteral Nutrition Support
desc: Comprehensive clinical nutrition support for complex rehabilitation patients: nasogastric and PEG tube feeding management for patients with severe dysphagia or ...
content: Clinical & Enteral Nutrition Support Comprehensive clinical nutrition support for complex rehabilitation patients: nasogastric and PEG tube feeding management for patients with severe dysphagia or reduced consciousness; parenteral nutrition for patients unable to tolerate enteral feeds; transition feeding protocols supporting the move from tube feeding to oral nutrition; and specialized nutrition for wound healing, pressure sore management, and post-surgical recovery.

title: Advanced Dietetics & Nutrition Technology
desc: Evidence-based nutritional assessment and intervention for optimal rehabilitation and health outcomes.
content: Advanced Dietetics & Nutrition Technology Evidence-based nutritional assessment and intervention for optimal rehabilitation and health outcomes.

title: Your Recovery Journey
desc: Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.
content: Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.

title: Start Your Recovery Journey Today
desc: Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway.
content: Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway.

flex-direction: column; gap: 0; padding-top: 24px; } Explore Specialities Specialities Stroke Spinal Cord Injury Traumatic Brain Injury Hemiplegia Quadriplegia & Paraplegia Post-Surgical Complications Motor Neuron Diseases Cerebral Palsy Parkinson's Disease Myopathy Disc & Spine Problems Sciatica Obesity Post-Covid Complications Muscular Dystrophy Osteoarthritis Rheumatoid Arthritis Developmental Delay Psychological Problems Autism Psychiatry OVERVIEW Disc & Spine Problems: Expert Care for Spinal Health The spine is the central pillar of the human body — a complex mechanical structure protecting the spinal cord while enabling remarkable flexibility and movement. Disc and spine problems are among the most common causes of pain and disability worldwide, affecting people of all ages and walks of life. At Ayurgreen Hospital, we provide a comprehensive, evidence-based, and highly integrated approach to disc and spine problems. Our spine team includes orthopedic spine surgeons, neurologists, physiotherapists, pain management specialists, and Ayurvedic physicians — all collaborating to provide the most complete spine care available. Our unique advantage is our ability to offer the full spectrum of spine care — from conservative management (physiotherapy, Ayurveda, injections) through to minimally invasive spine surgery — all under one roof. Most importantly, we can accurately determine which approach is right for each individual patient. SPINE CONDITIONS WE TREAT Disc & Spine Conditions We Specialize In Expert management for the full range of disc and spine conditions causing pain, stiffness, and neurological symptoms. Disc Herniation & Prolapse Cervical disc prolapse (causing neck pain and arm symptoms), lumbar disc prolapse (causing low back pain and sciatica), and cauda equina syndrome — all requiring expert assessment to determine the right conservative or surgical approach. Degenerative Spine Disease Spondylosis (cervical and lumbar), spinal stenosis, facet joint arthropathy, and spondylolisthesis — progressive degenerative spine conditions requiring comprehensive management to control pain and prevent neurological compromise. Spinal Deformity & Fractures Kyphosis, scoliosis, and flatback deformity requiring specialized physiotherapy and possibly surgical correction. Vertebral compression fractures from osteoporosis requiring vertebroplasty or kyphoplasty. SPINE TREATMENT Comprehensive Disc & Spine Care The complete spectrum of spine care from conservative Ayurvedic management through to minimally invasive surgery. 1 Specialized Spine Physiotherapy Evidence-based physiotherapy for disc and spine problems including McKenzie Method for disc-related pain, stabilization exercises (core strengthening) for lumbar instability, manual mobilization and manipulation for facet joint pain, neural mobilization for radiculopathy, and posture correction programs. Our physiotherapists are spine specialists who deliver measurable, lasting results. 2 Ayurvedic Spine & Disc Therapies Kerala Ayurveda offers outstanding therapies for disc and spine problems: Kati Basti (medicated oil retention for the lumbar spine) directly nourishes the disc and intervertebral joints; Greeva Basti (for cervical spine); Pinda Sweda (herbal paste fomentation) reduces nerve root inflammation; Navarakizhi rebuilds paravertebral muscle strength; and powerful Vata-pacifying herbal formulations reduce discogenic and neuropathic pain. 3 Minimally Invasive Spine Surgery When conservative measures have failed or neurological compromise is present, our spine surgeons offer minimally invasive surgical solutions: Microdiscectomy for disc herniation, Endoscopic Spine Surgery, Anterior/Posterior Cervical Disc Replacement, Spinal Fusion for instability, and Vertebroplasty/Kyphoplasty for compression fractures. 4 Interventional Pain Management Image-guided interventional procedures for spine pain: Epidural Steroid Injections (ESI) for radiculopathy and spinal stenosis, Facet Joint Injections and Radiofrequency Ablation for facet arthropathy, Nerve Root Blocks for targeted pain control, and Trigger Point Injections for myofascial pain — all under fluoroscopic or CT guidance for precision and safety. SPINE TREATMENT TECHNOLOGY Advanced Spine Care Technology The full spectrum of spine diagnostic and treatment technology for accurate diagnosis and optimal outcomes. MRI & CT Guided Diagnosis Expert interpretation of MRI and CT spine imaging to precisely identify disc pathology, neural compression, and structural abnormalities — the foundation of accurate spine diagnosis. Kati Basti & Greeva Basti Medicated warm oil retention directly over the lumbar (Kati) and cervical (Greeva) spine — nourishing discs and facet joints while reducing nerve root inflammation naturally. Epidural Steroid Injections Fluoroscopy-guided epidural steroid injections for radiculopathy and spinal stenosis — providing rapid, targeted anti-inflammatory pain relief to enable active physiotherapy rehabilitation. Minimally Invasive Surgery Suite Advanced surgical capabilities for microdiscectomy, endoscopic spine surgery, and fusion procedures through the smallest possible incisions with minimal tissue disruption. Hydrotherapy for Spine Water-based physiotherapy for spine patients — enabling active exercise and movement without gravitational axial loading, ideal for acute disc pain and post-operative spine rehabilitation. RECOVERY TIMELINE Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence. 1. Assessment Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel. 2. Diagnosis Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors. 3. Personalized Plan Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols. 4. Therapy Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments. 5. Monitoring Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data. 6. Recovery Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan. COMMON QUERIES Frequently Asked Questions Find answers to key details about the Disc & Spine Problems program. What is the recovery protocol for this program? Our recovery protocol for Disc & Spine Problems combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains. How long is the typical inpatient stay? Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways. Is robotic therapy safe for all patients? Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists. Are the Ayurvedic medicines safe? All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state. Can we coordinate with our existing neurologist? Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care. What is the daily therapy schedule? A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon. Do you offer post-discharge support? Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains. How do I book a consultation? You can book a virtual consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly. Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway. document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(otherVideo => { if (otherVideo !== video) { otherVideo.pause(); otherVideo.src = ""; // Clears the source to show poster otherVideo.load(); const otherCard = otherVideo.closest('.story-card'); otherCard.classList.remove('playing'); const otherMini = otherCard.querySelector('.story-mini-play-btn'); setMiniPlayIcon(otherMini, false); } }); // Dynamically set source if not set if (!video.src || video.src === window.location.href) { video.src = video.getAttribute('data-src') + "#t=0.001"; video.load(); } // Play video video.play().catch(err => console.log("Play interrupted:", err)); card.classList.add('playing'); setMiniPlayIcon(miniPlay, true); } else { // Stop current video video.pause(); video.src = ""; // Clear src to restore patient cover thumbnail video.load(); card.classList.remove('playing'); setMiniPlayIcon(miniPlay, false); // Restart auto-slider if no card is playing let anyPlaying = false; document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(v => { if (v.src && v.src !== "" && !v.paused) anyPlaying = true; }); if (!anyPlaying) { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); } } }; card.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); if (playOverlay) playOverlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); if (miniPlay) miniPlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); }); } // Auto sliding let videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); // Pause auto sliding on hover (only if no video is currently playing) const clipVideos = document.getElementById('clip-videos'); if (clipVideos) { clipVideos.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); }); clipVideos.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { let anyPlaying = false; document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(v => { if (!v.paused) anyPlaying = true; }); if (!anyPlaying) { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); } }); } function renderLifeGallery() { const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!rowTop || !rowBottom) return; const renderRow = (container, items) => { // No lazy loading — images need to measure their widths for the animation const markup = items.map((src) => { return `<img src="${src}" class="gallery-img" alt="Life at Ayurgreen">`; }).join(''); // Repeat the images 3 times for seamless wrapping container.innerHTML = markup + markup + markup; }; // Distribute images between top and bottom rows const topItems = []; const bottomItems = []; galleryImages.forEach((src, idx) => { if (idx % 2 === 0) { topItems.push(src); } else { bottomItems.push(src); } }); renderRow(rowTop, topItems); renderRow(rowBottom, bottomItems); } function initLifeGalleryAnimation() { const trigger = document.getElementById('life-gallery-trigger'); const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!trigger || !rowTop || !rowBottom) return; // Constant speed — never changes regardless of scroll const BASE_SPEED = 60; // pixels per second let trackTopWidth = 0; let trackBottomWidth = 0; let xTop = 0; let xBottom = 0; // direction: +1 = normal (scroll down), -1 = reversed (scroll up) let direction = 1; let targetDirection = 1; let lastScrollY = window.scrollY; let tickerAdded = false; let scrollListenerAdded = false; window.addEventListener('resize', () => { trackTopWidth = 0; trackBottomWidth = 0; }); function measureTracks() { const tw = rowTop.scrollWidth / 3; const bw = rowBottom.scrollWidth / 3; if (tw > 0) trackTopWidth = tw; if (bw > 0) trackBottomWidth = bw; } function runTicker() { if (tickerAdded) return; tickerAdded = true; measureTracks(); // Stagger the bottom row so rows are visually offset from each other if (trackBottomWidth > 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } // Detect scroll direction — set targetDirection, never touch speed if (!scrollListenerAdded) { scrollListenerAdded = true; window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { const current = window.scrollY; const delta = current - lastScrollY; lastScrollY = current; if (delta > 0) { // Scrolling down → normal direction targetDirection = 1; } else if (delta < 0) { // Scrolling up → reverse direction targetDirection = -1; } }, { passive: true }); } gsap.ticker.add((_time, deltaMs) => { const dt = Math.min(deltaMs / 1000, 0.05); // Re-measure if images haven't loaded widths yet if (trackTopWidth === 0 || trackBottomWidth === 0) { measureTracks(); if (trackBottomWidth > 0 && xBottom === 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } return; } // Smoothly interpolate direction so the flip feels natural, not jarring direction += (targetDirection - direction) * Math.min(dt * 5, 1); // Constant pixel step — speed never changes, only sign (direction) does const px = BASE_SPEED * direction * dt; xTop -= px; // top row: negative px = left, positive px = right xBottom += px; // bottom row: opposite direction always // Seamless infinite loop snapping if (xTop <= -trackTopWidth) xTop += trackTopWidth; if (xTop > 0) xTop -= trackTopWidth; if (xBottom >= 0) xBottom -= trackBottomWidth; if (xBottom < -trackBottomWidth) xBottom += trackBottomWidth; gsap.set(rowTop, { x: xTop, force3D: true }); gsap.set(rowBottom, { x: xBottom, force3D: true }); }); } // Start only when the gallery section scrolls into view if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) { const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { if (entries[0].isIntersecting) { observer.disconnect(); requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(runTicker)); } }, { threshold: 0.01 }); observer.observe(trigger); } else { setTimeout(runTicker, 500); } // Re-measure on resize window.addEventListener('resize', measureTracks, { passive: true }); // Re-measure when images load to ensure correct widths are used for animation const imgs = trigger.querySelectorAll('.gallery-img'); imgs.forEach(img => { if (img.complete) { measureTracks(); } else { img.addEventListener('load', measureTracks, { passive: true }); } }); } // Render stories dynamically from Instagram links renderDynamicStories(); setupInfiniteSlider(); initVideoSlider(); // Render Life Gallery renderLifeGallery(); initLifeGalleryAnimation(); // Understanding Ayurgreen Pinned Storytelling GSAP Timeline let mm = gsap.matchMedia(); mm.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Separate ScrollTrigger for the Title to reveal it immediately as the section enters the viewport gsap.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", ease: "power2.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 95%", // Starts revealing immediately when it starts entering the viewport end: "top 40%", // Fully revealed by the time it reaches top 40% scrub: 1.0 } }); // Pinned timeline starting at top top let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top top", end: "+=250%", pin: true, scrub: 1.2, invalidateOnRefresh: true } }); // Timeline starts directly with video reveal and scales up centered tl.to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 1.6, ease: "power2.out" }) .to({}, { duration: 2.0 }) // Pause to let the video settle in the center focus // Video shifts left, title stays at the top, card reveals .to(".storytelling-video-box", { xPercent: -15, scale: 0.95, duration: 1.8, ease: "power2.inOut" }) .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, x: 0, y: 30, scale: 1, duration: 1.8, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.8") .to({}, { duration: 0.8 }) // Settle card .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, stagger: 0.5, ease: "power2.out" }) .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.3") .to({}, { duration: 1.5 }); // Hold at final state }); mm.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 80%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); tl.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", duration: 0.6 }) .to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.2 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }, "-=0.2"); }); gsap.fromTo(".stories-bg-shape", { width: "70%" }, { width: "100%", ease: "power1.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: ".stories-relearning-section", start: "top bottom-=10%", end: "center center", scrub: 1.2, // Ultra smooth scroll scrubbing with lag invalidateOnRefresh: true } } ); // ADMIRE Ecosystem animations using gsap.matchMedia() let admireMM = gsap.matchMedia(); admireMM.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Desktop entry timeline let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top 75%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); gsap.set("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 0, y: 35 }); gsap.set(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 0, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 0 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.7, ease: "back.out(1.2)" }, 0) .to(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 1, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.1 }, 0) .to([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.12, ease: "power2.out" }, 0) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08, ease: "back.out(1.5)" }, 0.2); // Parallax scroll effect on cards gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-1", { y: -25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-2", { y: 15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-3", { y: -15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-4", { y: 25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); // Running dash lines let flowAnim = gsap.to(".admire-connecting-lines path", { strokeDashoffset: -30, duration: 2.5, repeat: -1, ease: "none" }); return () => { flowAnim.kill(); }; }); admireMM.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { // Mobile entry timeline (simplified stacking animations) let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top 80%", toggleActions: "play none none none" } }); gsap.set(["#admire-centerpiece", ".admire-info-card", ".admire-tag-pill"], { opacity: 0, y: 30 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08 }, "-=0.3") .to(".admire-info-card", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.15 }, "-=0.3"); }); window.addEventListener('resize', initVideoSlider); // --- Ayurgreen Ecosystem Redirection Configuration --- const ECOSYSTEM_URLS = { hospitals: '#', getwell: '#', niramaya: '#', herbals: '#', college: '#', scientifica: '#', shadarasa: '#', kizil: '#', foundation: '#', acfhe: '#' }; // ── Mobile Drawer Toggle Script ───────────────────────────────── function initMobileMenu() { const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn'); const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-drawer'); const closeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-close-btn'); const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-therapies', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-videos', () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(1); }, () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); });

title: Disc & Spine Problems: Expert Care for Spinal Health
desc: The spine is the central pillar of the human body — a complex mechanical structure protecting the spinal cord while enabling remarkable flexibility and movement...
content: Disc & Spine Problems: Expert Care for Spinal Health The spine is the central pillar of the human body — a complex mechanical structure protecting the spinal cord while enabling remarkable flexibility and movement. Disc and spine problems are among the most common causes of pain and disability worldwide, affecting people of all ages and walks of life. At Ayurgreen Hospital, we provide a comprehensive, evidence-based, and highly integrated approach to disc and spine problems. Our spine team includes orthopedic spine surgeons, neurologists, physiotherapists, pain management specialists, and Ayurvedic physicians — all collaborating to provide the most complete spine care available. Our unique advantage is our ability to offer the full spectrum of spine care — from conservative management (physiotherapy, Ayurveda, injections) through to minimally invasive spine surgery — all under one roof. Most importantly, we can accurately determine which approach is right for each individual patient.

title: Disc & Spine Conditions We Specialize In
desc: Expert management for the full range of disc and spine conditions causing pain, stiffness, and neurological symptoms.
content: Disc & Spine Conditions We Specialize In Expert management for the full range of disc and spine conditions causing pain, stiffness, and neurological symptoms.

title: Specialized Spine Physiotherapy
desc: Evidence-based physiotherapy for disc and spine problems including McKenzie Method for disc-related pain, stabilization exercises (core strengthening) for lumba...
content: Specialized Spine Physiotherapy Evidence-based physiotherapy for disc and spine problems including McKenzie Method for disc-related pain, stabilization exercises (core strengthening) for lumbar instability, manual mobilization and manipulation for facet joint pain, neural mobilization for radiculopathy, and posture correction programs. Our physiotherapists are spine specialists who deliver measurable, lasting results.

title: Ayurvedic Spine & Disc Therapies
desc: Kerala Ayurveda offers outstanding therapies for disc and spine problems: Kati Basti (medicated oil retention for the lumbar spine) directly nourishes the disc ...
content: Ayurvedic Spine & Disc Therapies Kerala Ayurveda offers outstanding therapies for disc and spine problems: Kati Basti (medicated oil retention for the lumbar spine) directly nourishes the disc and intervertebral joints; Greeva Basti (for cervical spine); Pinda Sweda (herbal paste fomentation) reduces nerve root inflammation; Navarakizhi rebuilds paravertebral muscle strength; and powerful Vata-pacifying herbal formulations reduce discogenic and neuropathic pain.

title: Minimally Invasive Spine Surgery
desc: When conservative measures have failed or neurological compromise is present, our spine surgeons offer minimally invasive surgical solutions: Microdiscectomy fo...
content: Minimally Invasive Spine Surgery When conservative measures have failed or neurological compromise is present, our spine surgeons offer minimally invasive surgical solutions: Microdiscectomy for disc herniation, Endoscopic Spine Surgery, Anterior/Posterior Cervical Disc Replacement, Spinal Fusion for instability, and Vertebroplasty/Kyphoplasty for compression fractures.

title: Interventional Pain Management
desc: Image-guided interventional procedures for spine pain: Epidural Steroid Injections (ESI) for radiculopathy and spinal stenosis, Facet Joint Injections and Radio...
content: Interventional Pain Management Image-guided interventional procedures for spine pain: Epidural Steroid Injections (ESI) for radiculopathy and spinal stenosis, Facet Joint Injections and Radiofrequency Ablation for facet arthropathy, Nerve Root Blocks for targeted pain control, and Trigger Point Injections for myofascial pain — all under fluoroscopic or CT guidance for precision and safety.

content: Advanced Spine Care Technology The full spectrum of spine diagnostic and treatment technology for accurate diagnosis and optimal outcomes.

flex-direction: column; gap: 0; padding-top: 24px; } Explore Medical Integrations Medical Integrations Neurology Neurosurgery Orthopedic ENT General Medicine Urology Cardiology Respiratory Therapy Neuro Psychology OVERVIEW ENT Excellence: Expert Care for Ear, Nose & Throat Conditions affecting the ear, nose, and throat (ENT) — medically known as Otolaryngology — can significantly impact your ability to hear, breathe, speak, eat, and sleep. These are not merely inconveniences; they are functions central to daily life, communication, and overall health. At Ayurgreen Hospital, our ENT Department provides specialized, compassionate care for the complete range of ear, nose, and throat conditions. Our expert ENT surgeons combine the most advanced surgical techniques with evidence-based medical management. A unique advantage of our integrated center is the natural synergy between ENT care and our other departments. Hearing loss from stroke, swallowing difficulties (dysphagia) managed by speech therapists, and vertigo rehabilitated by our physiotherapists — these connections are seamlessly managed in one place, providing a truly holistic recovery experience. CONDITIONS WE TREAT ENT Conditions We Specialize In Expert surgical and medical management for all conditions of the ear, nose, throat, head, and neck. Ear & Hearing Conditions Chronic otitis media, otosclerosis, sudden sensorineural hearing loss, tinnitus, Meniere's disease, and vertigo. Comprehensive hearing assessment and surgical correction for hearing restoration. Nasal & Sinus Conditions Deviated nasal septum, chronic sinusitis, nasal polyposis, and turbinate hypertrophy. Endoscopic sinus surgery (FESS) for definitive relief from chronic nasal obstruction and recurrent infections. Throat & Voice Disorders Chronic tonsillitis, adenoid hypertrophy, obstructive sleep apnea, voice disorders (dysphonia), and dysphagia (swallowing difficulties) — particularly common in stroke and neurological rehabilitation patients. ENT SERVICES Comprehensive ENT Care Advanced ENT surgery and medical management integrated with our speech therapy and neurological rehabilitation services. 1 Functional Endoscopic Sinus Surgery (FESS) FESS is the gold standard for surgical management of chronic sinusitis and nasal polyps. Using specialized endoscopes, our ENT surgeons restore normal sinus drainage through precise, minimally invasive surgery — with immediate improvement in breathing, reduced headaches, and elimination of recurrent infections. 2 Dysphagia & Swallowing Management Our ENT specialists work in direct collaboration with our expert Speech and Language Therapists to manage swallowing disorders — a critical concern for stroke and TBI rehabilitation patients. Videofluoroscopic Swallow Studies (VFSS) are used to precisely diagnose swallowing dysfunction and guide targeted therapy. 3 Hearing Assessment & Rehabilitation Comprehensive audiological evaluation including pure tone audiometry, tympanometry, and speech audiometry. Hearing aid prescription and fitting, and cochlear implant candidacy assessment. Collaboration with speech therapists for auditory rehabilitation. 4 Vestibular Rehabilitation for Vertigo Vestibular disorders causing severe vertigo are rehabilitated through specialized vestibular physiotherapy (Epley maneuver, Brandt-Daroff exercises, gaze stabilization training). Our physiotherapists work hand-in-hand with ENT specialists to restore balance and confidence in daily activities. ENT TECHNOLOGY Advanced ENT Diagnostics & Surgery State-of-the-art ENT diagnostic and surgical capabilities for precise, comfortable, and effective care. Video Endoscopy Suite High-definition video endoscopes for detailed visualization of nasal passages, sinuses, larynx, and pharynx — enabling precise diagnosis and procedure guidance. Comprehensive Audiometry Full audiological diagnostic suite including pure tone audiometry, impedance audiometry, and speech audiometry for complete hearing evaluation. Videofluoroscopic Swallow Study Gold-standard imaging assessment for swallowing dysfunction, providing real-time visualization of the entire swallowing mechanism in collaboration with speech therapy. Sleep Apnea Diagnostics Polysomnography (sleep study) and drug-induced sleep endoscopy (DISE) to precisely identify sites of airway obstruction for optimal surgical planning. Ayurvedic ENT Integration Nasya karma (nasal administration of medicated oils) and herbal steam inhalation therapies to complement ENT treatment, reducing inflammation and improving mucosal health. RECOVERY TIMELINE Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence. 1. Assessment Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel. 2. Diagnosis Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors. 3. Personalized Plan Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols. 4. Therapy Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments. 5. Monitoring Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data. 6. Recovery Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan. COMMON QUERIES Frequently Asked Questions Find answers to key details about the ENT program. What is the recovery protocol for this program? Our recovery protocol for ENT combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains. How long is the typical inpatient stay? Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways. Is robotic therapy safe for all patients? Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists. Are the Ayurvedic medicines safe? All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state. Can we coordinate with our existing neurologist? Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care. What is the daily therapy schedule? A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon. Do you offer post-discharge support? Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains. How do I book a consultation? You can book a virtual consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly. Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway. function setupVideoCardEvents(container) { container.querySelectorAll('.story-card').forEach(card => { const video = card.querySelector('.story-card-video'); const playOverlay = card.querySelector('.story-play-overlay-btn'); const miniPlay = card.querySelector('.story-mini-play-btn'); const muteBtn = card.querySelector('.story-mute-btn'); if (muteBtn) { 7.07"/></svg>`; }); } const togglePlay = (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.story-open-ig-btn')) return; e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); // If video is paused or has no source yet const isNotPlaying = video.paused || !video.src || video.src === window.location.href; if (isNotPlaying) { // Pause and reset all other cards (restore their poster cover images) document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(otherVideo => { if (otherVideo !== video) { otherVideo.pause(); otherVideo.src = ""; // Clears the source to show poster otherVideo.load(); const otherCard = otherVideo.closest('.story-card'); otherCard.classList.remove('playing'); const otherMini = otherCard.querySelector('.story-mini-play-btn'); setMiniPlayIcon(otherMini, false); } }); // Dynamically set source if not set if (!video.src || video.src === window.location.href) { video.src = video.getAttribute('data-src') + "#t=0.001"; video.load(); } // Play video video.play().catch(err => console.log("Play interrupted:", err)); card.classList.add('playing'); setMiniPlayIcon(miniPlay, true); } else { // Stop current video video.pause(); video.src = ""; // Clear src to restore patient cover thumbnail video.load(); card.classList.remove('playing'); setMiniPlayIcon(miniPlay, false); // Restart auto-slider if no card is playing let anyPlaying = false; document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(v => { if (v.src && v.src !== "" && !v.paused) anyPlaying = true; }); if (!anyPlaying) { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); } } }; card.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); if (playOverlay) playOverlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); if (miniPlay) miniPlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); }); } // Auto sliding let videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); // Pause auto sliding on hover (only if no video is currently playing) const clipVideos = document.getElementById('clip-videos'); if (clipVideos) { clipVideos.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); }); clipVideos.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { let anyPlaying = false; document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(v => { if (!v.paused) anyPlaying = true; }); if (!anyPlaying) { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); } }); } function renderLifeGallery() { const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!rowTop || !rowBottom) return; const renderRow = (container, items) => { // No lazy loading — images need to measure their widths for the animation const markup = items.map((src) => { return `<img src="${src}" class="gallery-img" alt="Life at Ayurgreen">`; }).join(''); // Repeat the images 3 times for seamless wrapping container.innerHTML = markup + markup + markup; }; // Distribute images between top and bottom rows const topItems = []; const bottomItems = []; galleryImages.forEach((src, idx) => { if (idx % 2 === 0) { topItems.push(src); } else { bottomItems.push(src); } }); renderRow(rowTop, topItems); renderRow(rowBottom, bottomItems); } function initLifeGalleryAnimation() { const trigger = document.getElementById('life-gallery-trigger'); const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!trigger || !rowTop || !rowBottom) return; // Constant speed — never changes regardless of scroll const BASE_SPEED = 60; // pixels per second let trackTopWidth = 0; let trackBottomWidth = 0; let xTop = 0; let xBottom = 0; // direction: +1 = normal (scroll down), -1 = reversed (scroll up) let direction = 1; let targetDirection = 1; let lastScrollY = window.scrollY; let tickerAdded = false; let scrollListenerAdded = false; window.addEventListener('resize', () => { trackTopWidth = 0; trackBottomWidth = 0; }); function measureTracks() { const tw = rowTop.scrollWidth / 3; const bw = rowBottom.scrollWidth / 3; if (tw > 0) trackTopWidth = tw; if (bw > 0) trackBottomWidth = bw; } function runTicker() { if (tickerAdded) return; tickerAdded = true; measureTracks(); // Stagger the bottom row so rows are visually offset from each other if (trackBottomWidth > 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } // Detect scroll direction — set targetDirection, never touch speed if (!scrollListenerAdded) { scrollListenerAdded = true; window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { const current = window.scrollY; const delta = current - lastScrollY; lastScrollY = current; if (delta > 0) { // Scrolling down → normal direction targetDirection = 1; } else if (delta < 0) { // Scrolling up → reverse direction targetDirection = -1; } }, { passive: true }); } gsap.ticker.add((_time, deltaMs) => { const dt = Math.min(deltaMs / 1000, 0.05); // Re-measure if images haven't loaded widths yet if (trackTopWidth === 0 || trackBottomWidth === 0) { measureTracks(); if (trackBottomWidth > 0 && xBottom === 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } return; } // Smoothly interpolate direction so the flip feels natural, not jarring direction += (targetDirection - direction) * Math.min(dt * 5, 1); // Constant pixel step — speed never changes, only sign (direction) does const px = BASE_SPEED * direction * dt; xTop -= px; // top row: negative px = left, positive px = right xBottom += px; // bottom row: opposite direction always // Seamless infinite loop snapping if (xTop <= -trackTopWidth) xTop += trackTopWidth; if (xTop > 0) xTop -= trackTopWidth; if (xBottom >= 0) xBottom -= trackBottomWidth; if (xBottom < -trackBottomWidth) xBottom += trackBottomWidth; gsap.set(rowTop, { x: xTop, force3D: true }); gsap.set(rowBottom, { x: xBottom, force3D: true }); }); } // Start only when the gallery section scrolls into view if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) { const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { if (entries[0].isIntersecting) { observer.disconnect(); requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(runTicker)); } }, { threshold: 0.01 }); observer.observe(trigger); } else { setTimeout(runTicker, 500); } // Re-measure on resize window.addEventListener('resize', measureTracks, { passive: true }); // Re-measure when images load to ensure correct widths are used for animation const imgs = trigger.querySelectorAll('.gallery-img'); imgs.forEach(img => { if (img.complete) { measureTracks(); } else { img.addEventListener('load', measureTracks, { passive: true }); } }); } // Render stories dynamically from Instagram links renderDynamicStories(); setupInfiniteSlider(); initVideoSlider(); // Render Life Gallery renderLifeGallery(); initLifeGalleryAnimation(); // Understanding Ayurgreen Pinned Storytelling GSAP Timeline let mm = gsap.matchMedia(); mm.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Separate ScrollTrigger for the Title to reveal it immediately as the section enters the viewport gsap.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", ease: "power2.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 95%", // Starts revealing immediately when it starts entering the viewport end: "top 40%", // Fully revealed by the time it reaches top 40% scrub: 1.0 } }); // Pinned timeline starting at top top let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top top", end: "+=250%", pin: true, scrub: 1.2, invalidateOnRefresh: true } }); // Timeline starts directly with video reveal and scales up centered tl.to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 1.6, ease: "power2.out" }) .to({}, { duration: 2.0 }) // Pause to let the video settle in the center focus // Video shifts left, title stays at the top, card reveals .to(".storytelling-video-box", { xPercent: -15, scale: 0.95, duration: 1.8, ease: "power2.inOut" }) .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, x: 0, y: 30, scale: 1, duration: 1.8, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.8") .to({}, { duration: 0.8 }) // Settle card .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, stagger: 0.5, ease: "power2.out" }) .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.3") .to({}, { duration: 1.5 }); // Hold at final state }); mm.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 80%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); tl.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", duration: 0.6 }) .to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.2 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }, "-=0.2"); }); gsap.fromTo(".stories-bg-shape", { width: "70%" }, { width: "100%", ease: "power1.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: ".stories-relearning-section", start: "top bottom-=10%", end: "center center", scrub: 1.2, // Ultra smooth scroll scrubbing with lag invalidateOnRefresh: true } } ); // ADMIRE Ecosystem animations using gsap.matchMedia() let admireMM = gsap.matchMedia(); admireMM.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Desktop entry timeline let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top 75%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); gsap.set("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 0, y: 35 }); gsap.set(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 0, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 0 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.7, ease: "back.out(1.2)" }, 0) .to(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 1, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.1 }, 0) .to([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.12, ease: "power2.out" }, 0) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08, ease: "back.out(1.5)" }, 0.2); // Parallax scroll effect on cards gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-1", { y: -25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-2", { y: 15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-3", { y: -15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-4", { y: 25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); // Running dash lines let flowAnim = gsap.to(".admire-connecting-lines path", { strokeDashoffset: -30, duration: 2.5, repeat: -1, ease: "none" }); return () => { flowAnim.kill(); }; }); admireMM.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { // Mobile entry timeline (simplified stacking animations) let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top 80%", toggleActions: "play none none none" } }); gsap.set(["#admire-centerpiece", ".admire-info-card", ".admire-tag-pill"], { opacity: 0, y: 30 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08 }, "-=0.3") .to(".admire-info-card", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.15 }, "-=0.3"); }); window.addEventListener('resize', initVideoSlider); // --- Ayurgreen Ecosystem Redirection Configuration --- const ECOSYSTEM_URLS = { hospitals: '#', getwell: '#', niramaya: '#', herbals: '#', college: '#', scientifica: '#', shadarasa: '#', kizil: '#', foundation: '#', acfhe: '#' }; // ── Mobile Drawer Toggle Script ───────────────────────────────── function initMobileMenu() { const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn'); const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-drawer'); const closeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-close-btn'); const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-therapies', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-videos', () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(1); }, () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); });

title: ENT Excellence: Expert Care for Ear, Nose & Throat
desc: Conditions affecting the ear, nose, and throat (ENT) — medically known as Otolaryngology — can significantly impact your ability to hear, breathe, speak, eat, a...
content: ENT Excellence: Expert Care for Ear, Nose & Throat Conditions affecting the ear, nose, and throat (ENT) — medically known as Otolaryngology — can significantly impact your ability to hear, breathe, speak, eat, and sleep. These are not merely inconveniences; they are functions central to daily life, communication, and overall health. At Ayurgreen Hospital, our ENT Department provides specialized, compassionate care for the complete range of ear, nose, and throat conditions. Our expert ENT surgeons combine the most advanced surgical techniques with evidence-based medical management. A unique advantage of our integrated center is the natural synergy between ENT care and our other departments. Hearing loss from stroke, swallowing difficulties (dysphagia) managed by speech therapists, and vertigo rehabilitated by our physiotherapists — these connections are seamlessly managed in one place, providing a truly holistic recovery experience.

title: ENT Conditions We Specialize In
desc: Expert surgical and medical management for all conditions of the ear, nose, throat, head, and neck.
content: ENT Conditions We Specialize In Expert surgical and medical management for all conditions of the ear, nose, throat, head, and neck.

title: Comprehensive ENT Care
desc: Advanced ENT surgery and medical management integrated with our speech therapy and neurological rehabilitation services.
content: Comprehensive ENT Care Advanced ENT surgery and medical management integrated with our speech therapy and neurological rehabilitation services.

title: Functional Endoscopic Sinus Surgery (FESS)
desc: FESS is the gold standard for surgical management of chronic sinusitis and nasal polyps. Using specialized endoscopes, our ENT surgeons restore normal sinus dra...
content: Functional Endoscopic Sinus Surgery (FESS) FESS is the gold standard for surgical management of chronic sinusitis and nasal polyps. Using specialized endoscopes, our ENT surgeons restore normal sinus drainage through precise, minimally invasive surgery — with immediate improvement in breathing, reduced headaches, and elimination of recurrent infections.

title: Dysphagia & Swallowing Management
