flex-direction: column; gap: 0; padding-top: 24px; } Explore Medical Integrations Medical Integrations Neurology Neurosurgery Orthopedic ENT General Medicine Urology Cardiology Respiratory Therapy Neuro Psychology OVERVIEW General Medicine: Comprehensive Internal Medicine Care General Medicine, or Internal Medicine, is the bedrock of comprehensive hospital care. It provides expert diagnosis and management of a vast spectrum of medical conditions — from common infections and chronic diseases to complex multi-system disorders that require a discerning clinical mind to unravel. At Ayurgreen Hospital, our General Medicine team serves a critical dual function: managing the general health of all patients within our complex rehabilitation population, and providing specialized medical services to all patients and their families in the local community. Our physicians are experts in managing the medical complexities that arise in rehabilitation patients — such as preventing secondary strokes, managing diabetes in spinal cord injury patients, controlling hypertension in brain injury survivors, and treating infections in immune-compromised patients. This in-house medical expertise ensures that our rehabilitation patients are always medically safe and stable, even as they undergo intensive physical recovery. WHAT WE TREAT Medical Conditions We Manage Expert clinical management for acute illnesses, chronic diseases, and the complex medical needs of our rehabilitation population. Acute & Infectious Diseases Expert management of acute febrile illnesses, respiratory tract infections, urinary tract infections, gastrointestinal disorders, and other acute medical presentations requiring prompt, expert diagnosis and treatment. Chronic Disease Management Comprehensive, long-term management of diabetes mellitus, hypertension, thyroid disorders, chronic kidney disease, liver disease, and autoimmune conditions. Dedicated clinics ensure optimal control and prevention of organ damage. Rehabilitation Medical Support Specialized internal medical care for rehabilitation inpatients, including management of post-stroke complications, autonomic dysreflexia in spinal cord injury, aspiration pneumonia in dysphagia patients, and pressure sore prevention and care. CLINICAL SERVICES Comprehensive General Medicine Services Expert internal medical care delivered by experienced physicians in close collaboration with our specialist rehabilitation team. 1 Specialized Chronic Disease Clinics Dedicated clinics for Diabetes (including insulin pump management), Hypertension (with 24-hour ambulatory monitoring), Thyroid, and Metabolic Syndrome. Our physicians use the latest evidence-based protocols to achieve optimal medical control, which is essential for maximizing rehabilitation outcomes. 2 Preventive Medicine & Health Screening Comprehensive health check packages for all age groups covering cardiac risk assessment, cancer screening, diabetes screening, pulmonary function testing, and metabolic profiling. Early detection is the most powerful tool in disease management. 3 Evidence-Based Ayurvedic Integration Our general physicians collaborate with Ayurvedic physicians to integrate evidence-based herbal medicines and lifestyle protocols for chronic disease management. Ayurvedic interventions for diabetes (Diabetes management protocols), hypertension, and metabolic syndrome are prescribed carefully alongside and in harmony with conventional medical treatments. 4 Intensive Rehabilitation Medical Support Daily medical ward rounds for all rehabilitation inpatients by our internal medicine team. Rapid intervention for any medical complications arising during rehabilitation — including DVT prevention, nutrition management, wound care, and infection control — ensuring patients can safely continue their rehabilitation programs without interruption. DIAGNOSTIC CAPABILITIES Advanced Medical Diagnostics Comprehensive diagnostic capabilities for rapid, accurate clinical decision-making. Advanced Laboratory Services Full in-house pathology laboratory for rapid blood analysis, urine studies, microbiology, and specialized tests — ensuring fast, accurate diagnostic results. ECG & Holter Monitoring 12-lead ECG for acute cardiac assessment, 24-hour Holter monitoring for cardiac rhythm disorders, and 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure monitoring for hypertension management. Pulmonary Function Testing Spirometry and comprehensive pulmonary function tests to diagnose COPD, asthma, and respiratory complications common in rehabilitation patients. Ayurvedic Medicine Integration Evidence-based Ayurvedic formulations for diabetes, hypertension, and metabolic syndrome management, prescribed in collaboration with internal medicine physicians. Infusion & IV Therapy Suite Dedicated infusion center for IV antibiotics, IV nutritional support, and specialized infusion therapies for rehabilitation patients requiring parenteral treatment. RECOVERY TIMELINE Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence. 1. Assessment Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel. 2. Diagnosis Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors. 3. Personalized Plan Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols. 4. Therapy Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments. 5. Monitoring Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data. 6. Recovery Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan. COMMON QUERIES Frequently Asked Questions Find answers to key details about the General Medicine program. What is the recovery protocol for this program? Our recovery protocol for General Medicine combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains. How long is the typical inpatient stay? Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways. Is robotic therapy safe for all patients? Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists. Are the Ayurvedic medicines safe? All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state. Can we coordinate with our existing neurologist? Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care. What is the daily therapy schedule? A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon. Do you offer post-discharge support? Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains. How do I book a consultation? You can book a virtual consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly. Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway. const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!container || !clip) return; const gap = 18; const totalWidth = clip.clientWidth; // Dynamic card count based on viewport width let n = 5; if (totalWidth < 480) n = 1; else if (totalWidth < 768) n = 2; else if (totalWidth < 1024) n = 3; else if (totalWidth < 1366) n = 4; else n = 5; const cardWidth = (totalWidth - gap * (n - 1)) / n; container.querySelectorAll('.rehab-card').forEach(card => { card.style.width = cardWidth + 'px'; card.style.minWidth = cardWidth + 'px'; }); container._cardWidth = cardWidth; container._gap = gap; container._visibleCards = n; // save dynamic visible card count // Always reset position when (re-)initialising container._offset = 0; container.style.transition = 'none'; container.style.transform = 'translateX(0px)'; updateSliderNav(scrollId); } // ── Move cards left/right ───────────────────────────────────── function slideCards(scrollId, dir) { const container = document.getElementById(scrollId); if (!container) return; const cardWidth = container._cardWidth || 255; const gap = container._gap || 18; const n = container._visibleCards || 5; // read dynamic count const total = container.querySelectorAll('.rehab-card').length; const maxOffset = Math.max(0, total - n); container._offset = Math.min(Math.max((container._offset || 0) + dir, 0), maxOffset); const translateX = -(container._offset * (cardWidth + gap)); container.style.transform = 'translateX(' + translateX + 'px)'; container.style.transition = 'transform 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1)'; updateSliderNav(scrollId); } function updateSliderNav(scrollId) { const tabName = scrollId.replace('scroll-', ''); const container = document.getElementById(scrollId); if (!container) return; const n = container._visibleCards || 5; // read dynamic count const total = container.querySelectorAll('.rehab-card').length; const offset = container._offset || 0; const prevBtn = document.getElementById('btn-prev-' + tabName); const nextBtn = document.getElementById('btn-next-' + tabName); if (prevBtn) prevBtn.disabled = offset <= 0; if (nextBtn) nextBtn.disabled = offset >= total - n; } // ── Tab switching with ARIA updates ──────────────────────────── function switchRehabTab(tab) { const next = document.getElementById('tab-content-' + tab); initVideoSlider); // --- Ayurgreen Ecosystem Redirection Configuration --- const ECOSYSTEM_URLS = { hospitals: '#', getwell: '#', niramaya: '#', herbals: '#', college: '#', scientifica: '#', shadarasa: '#', kizil: '#', foundation: '#', acfhe: '#' }; // ── Mobile Drawer Toggle Script ───────────────────────────────── function initMobileMenu() { const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn'); const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-drawer'); const closeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-close-btn'); const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-therapies', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-videos', () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(1); }, () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); });

title: General Medicine: Comprehensive Internal Medicine Care
desc: General Medicine, or Internal Medicine, is the bedrock of comprehensive hospital care. It provides expert diagnosis and management of a vast spectrum of medical...
content: General Medicine: Comprehensive Internal Medicine Care General Medicine, or Internal Medicine, is the bedrock of comprehensive hospital care. It provides expert diagnosis and management of a vast spectrum of medical conditions — from common infections and chronic diseases to complex multi-system disorders that require a discerning clinical mind to unravel. At Ayurgreen Hospital, our General Medicine team serves a critical dual function: managing the general health of all patients within our complex rehabilitation population, and providing specialized medical services to all patients and their families in the local community. Our physicians are experts in managing the medical complexities that arise in rehabilitation patients — such as preventing secondary strokes, managing diabetes in spinal cord injury patients, controlling hypertension in brain injury survivors, and treating infections in immune-compromised patients. This in-house medical expertise ensures that our rehabilitation patients are always medically safe and stable, even as they undergo intensive physical recovery.

title: Medical Conditions We Manage
desc: Expert clinical management for acute illnesses, chronic diseases, and the complex medical needs of our rehabilitation population.
content: Medical Conditions We Manage Expert clinical management for acute illnesses, chronic diseases, and the complex medical needs of our rehabilitation population.

title: Comprehensive General Medicine Services
desc: Expert internal medical care delivered by experienced physicians in close collaboration with our specialist rehabilitation team.
content: Comprehensive General Medicine Services Expert internal medical care delivered by experienced physicians in close collaboration with our specialist rehabilitation team.

title: Specialized Chronic Disease Clinics
desc: Dedicated clinics for Diabetes (including insulin pump management), Hypertension (with 24-hour ambulatory monitoring), Thyroid, and Metabolic Syndrome. Our phys...
content: Specialized Chronic Disease Clinics Dedicated clinics for Diabetes (including insulin pump management), Hypertension (with 24-hour ambulatory monitoring), Thyroid, and Metabolic Syndrome. Our physicians use the latest evidence-based protocols to achieve optimal medical control, which is essential for maximizing rehabilitation outcomes.

title: Preventive Medicine & Health Screening
desc: Comprehensive health check packages for all age groups covering cardiac risk assessment, cancer screening, diabetes screening, pulmonary function testing, and m...
content: Preventive Medicine & Health Screening Comprehensive health check packages for all age groups covering cardiac risk assessment, cancer screening, diabetes screening, pulmonary function testing, and metabolic profiling. Early detection is the most powerful tool in disease management.

title: Evidence-Based Ayurvedic Integration
desc: Our general physicians collaborate with Ayurvedic physicians to integrate evidence-based herbal medicines and lifestyle protocols for chronic disease management...
content: Evidence-Based Ayurvedic Integration Our general physicians collaborate with Ayurvedic physicians to integrate evidence-based herbal medicines and lifestyle protocols for chronic disease management. Ayurvedic interventions for diabetes (Diabetes management protocols), hypertension, and metabolic syndrome are prescribed carefully alongside and in harmony with conventional medical treatments.

title: Intensive Rehabilitation Medical Support
desc: Daily medical ward rounds for all rehabilitation inpatients by our internal medicine team. Rapid intervention for any medical complications arising during rehab...
content: Intensive Rehabilitation Medical Support Daily medical ward rounds for all rehabilitation inpatients by our internal medicine team. Rapid intervention for any medical complications arising during rehabilitation — including DVT prevention, nutrition management, wound care, and infection control — ensuring patients can safely continue their rehabilitation programs without interruption.

title: Advanced Medical Diagnostics
desc: Comprehensive diagnostic capabilities for rapid, accurate clinical decision-making.
content: Advanced Medical Diagnostics Comprehensive diagnostic capabilities for rapid, accurate clinical decision-making.

title: Your Recovery Journey
desc: Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.
content: Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.

title: Start Your Recovery Journey Today
desc: Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway.
content: Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway.

flex-direction: column; gap: 0; padding-top: 24px; } Explore Specialities Specialities Stroke Spinal Cord Injury Traumatic Brain Injury Hemiplegia Quadriplegia & Paraplegia Post-Surgical Complications Motor Neuron Diseases Cerebral Palsy Parkinson's Disease Myopathy Disc & Spine Problems Sciatica Obesity Post-Covid Complications Muscular Dystrophy Osteoarthritis Rheumatoid Arthritis Developmental Delay Psychological Problems Autism Psychiatry OVERVIEW Hemiplegia Rehabilitation: Restoring One-Sided Strength Hemiplegia — paralysis affecting one side of the body — is most commonly a consequence of stroke but can also result from traumatic brain injury, brain tumors, or cerebral infections. It profoundly impacts the ability to walk, use the arm, perform self-care, and live independently. At Ayurgreen Hospital, hemiplegia rehabilitation is a core specialty. Our integrated program combines the most advanced robotic technology, evidence-based neurological physiotherapy, and authentic Kerala Ayurvedic therapies to systematically rebuild strength, coordination, and independence on the affected side. The key to hemiplegia recovery is intensive, repetitive, and task-specific training that forces the brain to rewire itself — a process known as neuroplasticity. Our robotic systems deliver this training with a precision and volume impossible through manual therapy alone. CAUSES & PRESENTATIONS Types of Hemiplegia We Treat Our hemiplegia program is tailored to the specific cause, stage, and severity of each patient's one-sided weakness. Post-Stroke Hemiplegia The most common cause of hemiplegia. Our program targets motor recovery of the affected arm and leg through robotic training (Armotion and G-EO), CIMT, and Ayurvedic nerve-stimulating therapies. Post-TBI & Post-Surgical Hemiplegia Hemiplegia following traumatic brain injury or brain surgery. A comprehensive program that simultaneously addresses motor recovery and cognitive-behavioral deficits common in this population. Pediatric Hemiplegia & Cerebral Palsy Specialized pediatric hemiplegia rehabilitation using play-based Constraint-Induced Movement Therapy (CIMT), modified robotic training, and age-appropriate Ayurvedic therapies to maximize development and independence. TREATMENT PROGRAM Comprehensive Hemiplegia Rehabilitation An intensive, integrated program combining robotic precision, Ayurvedic healing, and advanced physiotherapy for maximum motor recovery. 1 Robotic Motor Rehabilitation The Armotion Robotic Arm Trainer provides intensive, sensor-guided training for the hemiplegic arm — targeting shoulder, elbow, and wrist coordination with real-time biofeedback. The G-EO Gait System provides weight-supported walking training to restore gait symmetry and walking ability on the affected leg. These systems deliver 1,000+ repetitions per session — the critical ingredient for neuroplastic motor recovery. 2 Constraint-Induced Movement Therapy (CIMT) A powerful evidence-based technique where the unaffected arm is constrained to force intensive use of the hemiplegic arm for 4-6 hours daily. CIMT has the strongest evidence base of any intervention for upper limb recovery after stroke. Our therapists provide structured, intensive CIMT programs combined with robotic training for maximum arm recovery. 3 Ayurvedic Neurological Therapies Traditional Kerala Ayurvedic therapies specifically targeting the hemiplegic nervous system: Pizhichil (warm oil bath) and Abhyanga reduce spasticity and stimulate nerve pathways; Njavara Kizhi (rice bundle therapy) strengthens weakened muscles; Shirodhara calms the nervous system and reduces emotional distress. These therapies create an internal neurological environment that powerfully synergizes with robotic motor training. 4 Speech, Communication & Swallowing For hemiplegia patients with associated aphasia, dysarthria, or dysphagia, our speech therapists provide comprehensive assessment and treatment. Augmentative and Alternative Communication (AAC) strategies are implemented where needed to ensure patients can communicate effectively throughout rehabilitation. HEMIPLEGIA TECHNOLOGY Advanced Hemiplegia Rehabilitation Technology Precision robotic systems and proven neuroplasticity techniques for maximum one-sided motor recovery. Armotion Robotic Arm System Precision robotic rehabilitation of the hemiplegic arm — targeting shoulder, elbow, and wrist with sensor-guided, high-repetition training and real-time performance biofeedback. G-EO Gait Trainer Weight-supported robotic gait training correcting asymmetric walking patterns and rebuilding strength in the hemiplegic leg through 1,000+ precisely guided steps per session. CIMT Program Structured Constraint-Induced Movement Therapy with intensive task practice for 4-6 hours daily — the strongest evidence-based intervention for hemiplegic arm recovery. Ayurvedic Neuro-Stimulation Pizhichil, Abhyanga, and Njavara Kizhi therapies reducing spasticity, stimulating nerve pathways, and creating optimal internal conditions for neuroplastic motor recovery. VR Motor Training Virtual reality mirror therapy and motor training for hemiplegic arm rehabilitation — engaging the brain's mirror neuron system to promote recovery even when voluntary movement is minimal. RECOVERY TIMELINE Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence. 1. Assessment Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel. 2. Diagnosis Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors. 3. Personalized Plan Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols. 4. Therapy Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments. 5. Monitoring Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data. 6. Recovery Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan. COMMON QUERIES Frequently Asked Questions Find answers to key details about the Hemiplegia program. What is the recovery protocol for this program? Our recovery protocol for Hemiplegia combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains. How long is the typical inpatient stay? Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways. Is robotic therapy safe for all patients? Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists. Are the Ayurvedic medicines safe? All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state. Can we coordinate with our existing neurologist? Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care. What is the daily therapy schedule? A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon. Do you offer post-discharge support? Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains. How do I book a consultation? You can book a virtual consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly. Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway. = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); } } }; card.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); if (playOverlay) playOverlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); if (miniPlay) miniPlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); }); } // Auto sliding let videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); // Pause auto sliding on hover (only if no video is currently playing) const clipVideos = document.getElementById('clip-videos'); if (clipVideos) { clipVideos.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); }); clipVideos.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { let anyPlaying = false; document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(v => { if (!v.paused) anyPlaying = true; }); if (!anyPlaying) { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); } }); } function renderLifeGallery() { const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!rowTop || !rowBottom) return; const renderRow = (container, items) => { // No lazy loading — images need to measure their widths for the animation const markup = items.map((src) => { return `<img src="${src}" class="gallery-img" alt="Life at Ayurgreen">`; }).join(''); // Repeat the images 3 times for seamless wrapping container.innerHTML = markup + markup + markup; }; // Distribute images between top and bottom rows const topItems = []; const bottomItems = []; galleryImages.forEach((src, idx) => { if (idx % 2 === 0) { topItems.push(src); } else { bottomItems.push(src); } }); renderRow(rowTop, topItems); renderRow(rowBottom, bottomItems); } function initLifeGalleryAnimation() { const trigger = document.getElementById('life-gallery-trigger'); const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!trigger || !rowTop || !rowBottom) return; // Constant speed — never changes regardless of scroll const BASE_SPEED = 60; // pixels per second let trackTopWidth = 0; let trackBottomWidth = 0; let xTop = 0; let xBottom = 0; // direction: +1 = normal (scroll down), -1 = reversed (scroll up) let direction = 1; let targetDirection = 1; let lastScrollY = window.scrollY; let tickerAdded = false; let scrollListenerAdded = false; window.addEventListener('resize', () => { trackTopWidth = 0; trackBottomWidth = 0; }); function measureTracks() { const tw = rowTop.scrollWidth / 3; const bw = rowBottom.scrollWidth / 3; if (tw > 0) trackTopWidth = tw; if (bw > 0) trackBottomWidth = bw; } function runTicker() { if (tickerAdded) return; tickerAdded = true; measureTracks(); // Stagger the bottom row so rows are visually offset from each other if (trackBottomWidth > 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } // Detect scroll direction — set targetDirection, never touch speed if (!scrollListenerAdded) { scrollListenerAdded = true; window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { const current = window.scrollY; const delta = current - lastScrollY; lastScrollY = current; if (delta > 0) { // Scrolling down → normal direction targetDirection = 1; } else if (delta < 0) { // Scrolling up → reverse direction targetDirection = -1; } }, { passive: true }); } gsap.ticker.add((_time, deltaMs) => { const dt = Math.min(deltaMs / 1000, 0.05); // Re-measure if images haven't loaded widths yet if (trackTopWidth === 0 || trackBottomWidth === 0) { measureTracks(); if (trackBottomWidth > 0 && xBottom === 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } return; } // Smoothly interpolate direction so the flip feels natural, not jarring direction += (targetDirection - direction) * Math.min(dt * 5, 1); // Constant pixel step — speed never changes, only sign (direction) does const px = BASE_SPEED * direction * dt; xTop -= px; // top row: negative px = left, positive px = right xBottom += px; // bottom row: opposite direction always // Seamless infinite loop snapping if (xTop <= -trackTopWidth) xTop += trackTopWidth; if (xTop > 0) xTop -= trackTopWidth; if (xBottom >= 0) xBottom -= trackBottomWidth; if (xBottom < -trackBottomWidth) xBottom += trackBottomWidth; gsap.set(rowTop, { x: xTop, force3D: true }); gsap.set(rowBottom, { x: xBottom, force3D: true }); }); } // Start only when the gallery section scrolls into view if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) { const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { if (entries[0].isIntersecting) { observer.disconnect(); requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(runTicker)); } }, { threshold: 0.01 }); observer.observe(trigger); } else { setTimeout(runTicker, 500); } // Re-measure on resize window.addEventListener('resize', measureTracks, { passive: true }); // Re-measure when images load to ensure correct widths are used for animation const imgs = trigger.querySelectorAll('.gallery-img'); imgs.forEach(img => { if (img.complete) { measureTracks(); } else { img.addEventListener('load', measureTracks, { passive: true }); } }); } // Render stories dynamically from Instagram links renderDynamicStories(); setupInfiniteSlider(); initVideoSlider(); // Render Life Gallery renderLifeGallery(); initLifeGalleryAnimation(); // Understanding Ayurgreen Pinned Storytelling GSAP Timeline let mm = gsap.matchMedia(); mm.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Separate ScrollTrigger for the Title to reveal it immediately as the section enters the viewport gsap.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", ease: "power2.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 95%", // Starts revealing immediately when it starts entering the viewport end: "top 40%", // Fully revealed by the time it reaches top 40% scrub: 1.0 } }); // Pinned timeline starting at top top let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top top", end: "+=250%", pin: true, scrub: 1.2, invalidateOnRefresh: true } }); // Timeline starts directly with video reveal and scales up centered tl.to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 1.6, ease: "power2.out" }) .to({}, { duration: 2.0 }) // Pause to let the video settle in the center focus // Video shifts left, title stays at the top, card reveals .to(".storytelling-video-box", { xPercent: -15, scale: 0.95, duration: 1.8, ease: "power2.inOut" }) .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, x: 0, y: 30, scale: 1, duration: 1.8, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.8") .to({}, { duration: 0.8 }) // Settle card .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, stagger: 0.5, ease: "power2.out" }) .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.3") .to({}, { duration: 1.5 }); // Hold at final state }); mm.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 80%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); tl.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", duration: 0.6 }) .to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.2 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }, "-=0.2"); }); gsap.fromTo(".stories-bg-shape", { width: "70%" }, { width: "100%", ease: "power1.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: ".stories-relearning-section", start: "top bottom-=10%", end: "center center", scrub: 1.2, // Ultra smooth scroll scrubbing with lag invalidateOnRefresh: true } } ); // ADMIRE Ecosystem animations using gsap.matchMedia() let admireMM = gsap.matchMedia(); admireMM.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Desktop entry timeline let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top 75%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); gsap.set("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 0, y: 35 }); gsap.set(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 0, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 0 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.7, ease: "back.out(1.2)" }, 0) .to(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 1, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.1 }, 0) .to([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.12, ease: "power2.out" }, 0) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08, ease: "back.out(1.5)" }, 0.2); // Parallax scroll effect on cards gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-1", { y: -25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-2", { y: 15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-3", { y: -15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-4", { y: 25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); // Running dash lines let flowAnim = gsap.to(".admire-connecting-lines path", { strokeDashoffset: -30, duration: 2.5, repeat: -1, ease: "none" }); return () => { flowAnim.kill(); }; }); admireMM.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { // Mobile entry timeline (simplified stacking animations) let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top 80%", toggleActions: "play none none none" } }); gsap.set(["#admire-centerpiece", ".admire-info-card", ".admire-tag-pill"], { opacity: 0, y: 30 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08 }, "-=0.3") .to(".admire-info-card", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.15 }, "-=0.3"); }); window.addEventListener('resize', initVideoSlider); // --- Ayurgreen Ecosystem Redirection Configuration --- const ECOSYSTEM_URLS = { hospitals: '#', getwell: '#', niramaya: '#', herbals: '#', college: '#', scientifica: '#', shadarasa: '#', kizil: '#', foundation: '#', acfhe: '#' }; // ── Mobile Drawer Toggle Script ───────────────────────────────── function initMobileMenu() { const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn'); const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-drawer'); const closeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-close-btn'); const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-therapies', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-videos', () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(1); }, () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); });

title: Hemiplegia Rehabilitation: Restoring One-Sided Strength
desc: Hemiplegia — paralysis affecting one side of the body — is most commonly a consequence of stroke but can also result from traumatic brain injury, brain tumors, ...
content: Hemiplegia Rehabilitation: Restoring One-Sided Strength Hemiplegia — paralysis affecting one side of the body — is most commonly a consequence of stroke but can also result from traumatic brain injury, brain tumors, or cerebral infections. It profoundly impacts the ability to walk, use the arm, perform self-care, and live independently. At Ayurgreen Hospital, hemiplegia rehabilitation is a core specialty. Our integrated program combines the most advanced robotic technology, evidence-based neurological physiotherapy, and authentic Kerala Ayurvedic therapies to systematically rebuild strength, coordination, and independence on the affected side. The key to hemiplegia recovery is intensive, repetitive, and task-specific training that forces the brain to rewire itself — a process known as neuroplasticity. Our robotic systems deliver this training with a precision and volume impossible through manual therapy alone.

title: Types of Hemiplegia We Treat
desc: Our hemiplegia program is tailored to the specific cause, stage, and severity of each patient's one-sided weakness.
content: Types of Hemiplegia We Treat Our hemiplegia program is tailored to the specific cause, stage, and severity of each patient's one-sided weakness.

title: Comprehensive Hemiplegia Rehabilitation
desc: An intensive, integrated program combining robotic precision, Ayurvedic healing, and advanced physiotherapy for maximum motor recovery.
content: Comprehensive Hemiplegia Rehabilitation An intensive, integrated program combining robotic precision, Ayurvedic healing, and advanced physiotherapy for maximum motor recovery.

title: Robotic Motor Rehabilitation
desc: The Armotion Robotic Arm Trainer provides intensive, sensor-guided training for the hemiplegic arm — targeting shoulder, elbow, and wrist coordination with real...
content: Robotic Motor Rehabilitation The Armotion Robotic Arm Trainer provides intensive, sensor-guided training for the hemiplegic arm — targeting shoulder, elbow, and wrist coordination with real-time biofeedback. The G-EO Gait System provides weight-supported walking training to restore gait symmetry and walking ability on the affected leg. These systems deliver 1,000+ repetitions per session — the critical ingredient for neuroplastic motor recovery.

title: Constraint-Induced Movement Therapy (CIMT)
desc: A powerful evidence-based technique where the unaffected arm is constrained to force intensive use of the hemiplegic arm for 4-6 hours daily. CIMT has the stron...
content: Constraint-Induced Movement Therapy (CIMT) A powerful evidence-based technique where the unaffected arm is constrained to force intensive use of the hemiplegic arm for 4-6 hours daily. CIMT has the strongest evidence base of any intervention for upper limb recovery after stroke. Our therapists provide structured, intensive CIMT programs combined with robotic training for maximum arm recovery.

title: Ayurvedic Neurological Therapies
desc: Traditional Kerala Ayurvedic therapies specifically targeting the hemiplegic nervous system: Pizhichil (warm oil bath) and Abhyanga reduce spasticity and stimul...
content: Ayurvedic Neurological Therapies Traditional Kerala Ayurvedic therapies specifically targeting the hemiplegic nervous system: Pizhichil (warm oil bath) and Abhyanga reduce spasticity and stimulate nerve pathways; Njavara Kizhi (rice bundle therapy) strengthens weakened muscles; Shirodhara calms the nervous system and reduces emotional distress. These therapies create an internal neurological environment that powerfully synergizes with robotic motor training.

title: Speech, Communication & Swallowing
desc: For hemiplegia patients with associated aphasia, dysarthria, or dysphagia, our speech therapists provide comprehensive assessment and treatment. Augmentative an...
content: Speech, Communication & Swallowing For hemiplegia patients with associated aphasia, dysarthria, or dysphagia, our speech therapists provide comprehensive assessment and treatment. Augmentative and Alternative Communication (AAC) strategies are implemented where needed to ensure patients can communicate effectively throughout rehabilitation.

title: Advanced Hemiplegia Rehabilitation Technology
desc: Precision robotic systems and proven neuroplasticity techniques for maximum one-sided motor recovery.
content: Advanced Hemiplegia Rehabilitation Technology Precision robotic systems and proven neuroplasticity techniques for maximum one-sided motor recovery.

content: Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.

flex-direction: column; gap: 0; padding-top: 24px; } Explore Departments Departments Ayurveda Physiotherapy Robotic Rehabilitation Occupational Therapy Speech Therapy Virtual Reality Yoga and Meditation Acupuncture Reflexology Hydro / Aquatic Therapy Pediatrics Slimming Treatment Pain Management Diet & Nutrition Counseling Dentistry Modern Medicine Assistive Devices OVERVIEW Hydrotherapy: The Healing Power of Water Hydrotherapy — therapeutic exercise and treatment in water — harnesses the unique physical properties of water to facilitate rehabilitation that would be impossible on dry land. The buoyancy of water dramatically reduces gravitational loading on joints and muscles; the resistance of water provides gentle, 360° resistance for strengthening; and the warmth of water relaxes muscle spasm and reduces pain. At Ayurgreen Hospital, our Hydrotherapy Department features specialized aquatic therapy facilities with separate pools for men and women, and an advanced Underwater Treadmill (AquaCiser III) — enabling precise, progressive water-based rehabilitation from the earliest stages of recovery. Hydrotherapy is particularly valuable for our rehabilitation population: it enables weight-bearing walking practice for patients who cannot yet bear full weight on land; provides gentle, effective exercise for obese patients where land-based exercise is limited by joint pain; and offers a refreshing, motivating alternative to conventional physiotherapy. HYDROTHERAPY INDICATIONS Who Benefits from Hydrotherapy Specialized aquatic rehabilitation for neurological, orthopedic, and general rehabilitation conditions. Neurological Rehabilitation Stroke and TBI patients practicing gait and balance in the safe, buoyancy-supported aquatic environment. Spinal cord injury patients with incomplete recovery practicing walking movements. Parkinson's disease balance and gait therapy in water. Orthopedic & Post-Surgical Rehabilitation Early post-surgical weight-bearing practice after knee and hip replacement. Osteoarthritis and back pain management with water-based exercise. Sciatica rehabilitation and fracture recovery using the reduced gravitational loading of water. Obesity & General Deconditioning Effective cardiovascular and strengthening exercise for obese patients who cannot perform land-based exercise due to joint pain. Post-ICU deconditioning rehabilitation using the motivating aquatic environment. HYDROTHERAPY SERVICES Comprehensive Hydrotherapy Services Advanced aquatic rehabilitation using our hydrotherapy pool and AquaCiser III underwater treadmill. 1 AquaCiser III Underwater Treadmill Training Our AquaCiser III underwater treadmill allows precise, progressive gait training at adjustable water depths — enabling patients to practice walking at any percentage of body weight from 20% to full weight bearing. This is invaluable for patients who cannot yet bear full weight on land after neurological injury, joint replacement, or fracture. Water depth, belt speed, and jet resistance are individually adjustable for complete customization. 2 Aquatic Physiotherapy Structured therapeutic exercise programs in our hydrotherapy pool: Bad Ragaz Ring Method for facilitated aquatic exercise; Halliwick Concept for swimming and water confidence in neurologically impaired patients; water-based strengthening using resistance paddles and buoyancy equipment; aquatic balance and proprioception training. All sessions are directed by trained aquatic physiotherapists. 3 Medicated Aquatic Therapies Integration of Ayurvedic principles with aquatic therapy: medicated warm water immersion with Ayurvedic herbs (Dashamoola, Nirgundi) added to the hydrotherapy pool provides simultaneous physiotherapy and topical Ayurvedic treatment. This reduces joint inflammation, relaxes muscle spasm, and provides the anti-inflammatory and analgesic benefits of Ayurvedic herbs through water immersion. 4 Halliwick Aquatic Therapy for Neurological Rehab The Halliwick Concept is a specialized aquatic therapy method for people with physical and mental disabilities, developing water independence and using water's properties for therapeutic effect. Particularly valuable for stroke, CP, and SCI patients — improving balance, rotation control, and confidence in water, with significant carryover to land-based balance and mobility. HYDROTHERAPY TECHNOLOGY Advanced Hydrotherapy Facilities State-of-the-art hydrotherapy equipment for comprehensive aquatic rehabilitation. AquaCiser III Underwater Treadmill Advanced underwater treadmill allowing precise weight-bearing reduction from 20-80% of body weight — enabling gait training at any recovery stage after neurological or orthopedic injury. Therapeutic Hydrotherapy Pool Separate hydrotherapy pools for men and women with temperature control, hydraulic floor lift for safe pool entry, and appropriate accessibility for wheelchair and non-ambulant patients. Precise Temperature Control Thermostatically controlled pool temperature maintained at therapeutic levels (33-36°C) — warm enough to relax spasm without causing dehydration or cardiovascular stress. Medicated Aquatic Therapy Dashamoola and Nirgundi herbal additions to hydrotherapy water — combining the physiotherapy benefits of aquatic exercise with topical Ayurvedic anti-inflammatory treatment. Underwater Gait Analysis Underwater video gait analysis identifying movement compensations during aquatic gait training — guiding precise physiotherapy interventions to improve gait quality. RECOVERY TIMELINE Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence. 1. Assessment Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel. 2. Diagnosis Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors. 3. Personalized Plan Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols. 4. Therapy Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments. 5. Monitoring Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data. 6. Recovery Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan. COMMON QUERIES Frequently Asked Questions Find answers to key details about the Hydro / Aquatic Therapy program. What is the recovery protocol for this program? Our recovery protocol for Hydro / Aquatic Therapy combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains. How long is the typical inpatient stay? Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways. Is robotic therapy safe for all patients? Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists. Are the Ayurvedic medicines safe? All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state. Can we coordinate with our existing neurologist? Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care. What is the daily therapy schedule? A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon. Do you offer post-discharge support? Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains. How do I book a consultation? You can book a virtual consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly. Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway. or has no source yet const isNotPlaying = video.paused || !video.src || video.src === window.location.href; if (isNotPlaying) { // Pause and reset all other cards (restore their poster cover images) Dynamically set source if not set if (!video.src || video.src === window.location.href) { video.src = video.getAttribute('data-src') + "#t=0.001"; video.load(); } // Play video video.play().catch(err = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); } } }; card.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); if (playOverlay) playOverlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); if (miniPlay) miniPlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); }); } // Auto sliding let videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); // Pause auto sliding on hover (only if no video is currently const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!rowTop || !rowBottom) return; const renderRow = (container, items) => { // No lazy loading — images need to measure their widths for the animation const markup = items.map((src) => { return `<img src="${src}" class="gallery-img" alt="Life at Ayurgreen">`; }).join(''); // Repeat the images 3 times for seamless wrapping container.innerHTML = markup + markup + markup; }; // Distribute images between top and bottom rows const topItems = []; const bottomItems = []; galleryImages.forEach((src, idx) => { if (idx % 2 === 0) { topItems.push(src); } else { bottomItems.push(src); } }); renderRow(rowTop, topItems); renderRow(rowBottom, bottomItems); } function initLifeGalleryAnimation() { const trigger = document.getElementById('life-gallery-trigger'); const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!trigger || !rowTop || !rowBottom) return; // Constant speed — never changes regardless of scroll const BASE_SPEED = 60; // pixels per second let trackTopWidth = 0; let trackBottomWidth = 0; let xTop = 0; let xBottom = 0; // direction: +1 = normal (scroll down), -1 = reversed (scroll up) let direction = 1; let targetDirection = 1; let lastScrollY = window.scrollY; let tickerAdded = false; let scrollListenerAdded = false; window.addEventListener('resize', () => { trackTopWidth = 0; trackBottomWidth = 0; }); function measureTracks() { const tw = rowTop.scrollWidth / 3; const bw = rowBottom.scrollWidth / 3; if (tw > 0) trackTopWidth = tw; if (bw > 0) trackBottomWidth = bw; } function runTicker() { if (tickerAdded) return; tickerAdded = true; measureTracks(); // Stagger the bottom row so rows are visually offset from each other if (trackBottomWidth > 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } // Detect scroll direction — set targetDirection, never touch speed if (!scrollListenerAdded) { scrollListenerAdded = true; window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { const current = window.scrollY; const delta = current - lastScrollY; lastScrollY = current; if (delta > 0) { // Scrolling down → normal direction targetDirection = 1; } else if (delta < 0) { // Scrolling up → reverse direction targetDirection = -1; } }, { passive: true }); } gsap.ticker.add((_time, deltaMs) => { const dt = Math.min(deltaMs / 1000, 0.05); // Re-measure if images haven't loaded widths yet if (trackTopWidth === 0 || trackBottomWidth === 0) { measureTracks(); if (trackBottomWidth > 0 && xBottom === 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } return; } // Smoothly interpolate direction so the flip feels natural, not jarring direction += (targetDirection - direction) * Math.min(dt * 5, 1); // Constant pixel step — speed never changes, only sign (direction) does const px = BASE_SPEED * direction * dt; xTop -= px; // top row: negative px = left, positive px = right xBottom += px; // bottom row: opposite direction always // Seamless infinite loop snapping if (xTop <= -trackTopWidth) xTop += trackTopWidth; if (xTop > 0) xTop -= trackTopWidth; if (xBottom >= 0) xBottom -= trackBottomWidth; if (xBottom < -trackBottomWidth) xBottom += trackBottomWidth; gsap.set(rowTop, { x: xTop, force3D: true }); gsap.set(rowBottom, { x: xBottom, force3D: true }); }); } // Start only when the gallery section scrolls into view if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) { const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { if (entries[0].isIntersecting) { observer.disconnect(); requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(runTicker)); } }, { threshold: 0.01 }); observer.observe(trigger); } else { setTimeout(runTicker, 500); } // Re-measure on resize window.addEventListener('resize', measureTracks, { passive: true }); // Re-measure when images load to ensure correct widths are used for animation const imgs = trigger.querySelectorAll('.gallery-img'); imgs.forEach(img => { if (img.complete) { measureTracks(); } else { img.addEventListener('load', measureTracks, { passive: true }); } }); } // Render stories dynamically from Instagram links renderDynamicStories(); setupInfiniteSlider(); initVideoSlider(); // Render Life Gallery renderLifeGallery(); initLifeGalleryAnimation(); // Understanding Ayurgreen Pinned Storytelling GSAP Timeline let mm = gsap.matchMedia(); mm.add("(min-width: Settle card .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, stagger: 0.5, ease: "power2.out" }) .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.3") .to({}, { duration: 1.5 }); // Hold at final state }); mm.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 80%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); tl.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", duration: 0.6 }) .to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.2 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }, "-=0.2"); }); gsap.fromTo(".stories-bg-shape", { width: "70%" }, { width: "100%", ease: "power1.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: ".stories-relearning-section", start: "top bottom-=10%", end: "center center", scrub: 1.2, // Ultra smooth scroll scrubbing with lag invalidateOnRefresh: true } } ); // ADMIRE Ecosystem animations using gsap.matchMedia() let admireMM = gsap.matchMedia(); admireMM.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Desktop entry timeline let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top 75%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); gsap.set("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 0, y: 35 }); gsap.set(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 0, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 0 }); .to([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.12, ease: "power2.out" }, 0) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08, ease: "back.out(1.5)" }, 0.2); // Parallax scroll effect on cards gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-1", { y: -25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-2", { y: 15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-3", { y: -15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-4", { y: 25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); // Running dash lines let flowAnim = gsap.to(".admire-connecting-lines path", { strokeDashoffset: -30, duration: 2.5, repeat: -1, ease: "none" }); return () => { flowAnim.kill(); }; }); admireMM.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { // }); gsap.set(["#admire-centerpiece", ".admire-info-card", ".admire-tag-pill"], { opacity: 0, y: 30 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08 }, "-=0.3") .to(".admire-info-card", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.15 }, "-=0.3"); }); window.addEventListener('resize', initVideoSlider); // --- Ayurgreen Ecosystem Redirection Configuration --- const ECOSYSTEM_URLS = { hospitals: '#', getwell: '#', niramaya: '#', herbals: '#', college: '#', scientifica: '#', shadarasa: '#', kizil: '#', foundation: '#', acfhe: '#' }; // ── Mobile Drawer Toggle Script ───────────────────────────────── function initMobileMenu() { const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn'); const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-drawer'); const closeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-close-btn'); const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-therapies', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-videos', () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(1); }, () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); });

title: Hydrotherapy: The Healing Power of Water
desc: Hydrotherapy — therapeutic exercise and treatment in water — harnesses the unique physical properties of water to facilitate rehabilitation that would be imposs...
content: Hydrotherapy: The Healing Power of Water Hydrotherapy — therapeutic exercise and treatment in water — harnesses the unique physical properties of water to facilitate rehabilitation that would be impossible on dry land. The buoyancy of water dramatically reduces gravitational loading on joints and muscles; the resistance of water provides gentle, 360° resistance for strengthening; and the warmth of water relaxes muscle spasm and reduces pain. At Ayurgreen Hospital, our Hydrotherapy Department features specialized aquatic therapy facilities with separate pools for men and women, and an advanced Underwater Treadmill (AquaCiser III) — enabling precise, progressive water-based rehabilitation from the earliest stages of recovery. Hydrotherapy is particularly valuable for our rehabilitation population: it enables weight-bearing walking practice for patients who cannot yet bear full weight on land; provides gentle, effective exercise for obese patients where land-based exercise is limited by joint pain; and offers a refreshing, motivating alternative to conventional physiotherapy.

title: Who Benefits from Hydrotherapy
desc: Specialized aquatic rehabilitation for neurological, orthopedic, and general rehabilitation conditions.
content: Who Benefits from Hydrotherapy Specialized aquatic rehabilitation for neurological, orthopedic, and general rehabilitation conditions.

title: Comprehensive Hydrotherapy Services
desc: Advanced aquatic rehabilitation using our hydrotherapy pool and AquaCiser III underwater treadmill.
content: Comprehensive Hydrotherapy Services Advanced aquatic rehabilitation using our hydrotherapy pool and AquaCiser III underwater treadmill.

title: AquaCiser III Underwater Treadmill Training
desc: Our AquaCiser III underwater treadmill allows precise, progressive gait training at adjustable water depths — enabling patients to practice walking at any perce...
content: AquaCiser III Underwater Treadmill Training Our AquaCiser III underwater treadmill allows precise, progressive gait training at adjustable water depths — enabling patients to practice walking at any percentage of body weight from 20% to full weight bearing. This is invaluable for patients who cannot yet bear full weight on land after neurological injury, joint replacement, or fracture. Water depth, belt speed, and jet resistance are individually adjustable for complete customization.

title: Aquatic Physiotherapy
desc: Structured therapeutic exercise programs in our hydrotherapy pool: Bad Ragaz Ring Method for facilitated aquatic exercise; Halliwick Concept for swimming and wa...
content: Aquatic Physiotherapy Structured therapeutic exercise programs in our hydrotherapy pool: Bad Ragaz Ring Method for facilitated aquatic exercise; Halliwick Concept for swimming and water confidence in neurologically impaired patients; water-based strengthening using resistance paddles and buoyancy equipment; aquatic balance and proprioception training. All sessions are directed by trained aquatic physiotherapists.

title: Medicated Aquatic Therapies
desc: Integration of Ayurvedic principles with aquatic therapy: medicated warm water immersion with Ayurvedic herbs (Dashamoola, Nirgundi) added to the hydrotherapy p...
content: Medicated Aquatic Therapies Integration of Ayurvedic principles with aquatic therapy: medicated warm water immersion with Ayurvedic herbs (Dashamoola, Nirgundi) added to the hydrotherapy pool provides simultaneous physiotherapy and topical Ayurvedic treatment. This reduces joint inflammation, relaxes muscle spasm, and provides the anti-inflammatory and analgesic benefits of Ayurvedic herbs through water immersion.

title: Halliwick Aquatic Therapy for Neurological Rehab
desc: The Halliwick Concept is a specialized aquatic therapy method for people with physical and mental disabilities, developing water independence and using water's ...
content: Halliwick Aquatic Therapy for Neurological Rehab The Halliwick Concept is a specialized aquatic therapy method for people with physical and mental disabilities, developing water independence and using water's properties for therapeutic effect. Particularly valuable for stroke, CP, and SCI patients — improving balance, rotation control, and confidence in water, with significant carryover to land-based balance and mobility.
