flex-direction: column; gap: 0; padding-top: 24px; } Explore Medical Integrations Medical Integrations Neurology Neurosurgery Orthopedic ENT General Medicine Urology Cardiology Respiratory Therapy Neuro Psychology OVERVIEW Urology: Specialized Care for the Urinary System Urological conditions affecting the kidneys, bladder, and urinary tract are among the most common yet undertreated medical issues. They significantly impact daily life, personal dignity, and quality of life. Expert, compassionate urological care is essential to restore normal function and confidence. At Ayurgreen Hospital, our Urology Department provides a comprehensive range of urological services for adults of all ages. Our urologists are particularly expert in managing the complex neurogenic bladder and urological complications that frequently arise in patients with spinal cord injuries, stroke, and multiple sclerosis. This expertise in neuro-urology sets us apart as a center uniquely capable of providing truly comprehensive rehabilitation for neurological patients — addressing both their physical recovery AND their urological health in one seamlessly integrated program. CONDITIONS WE TREAT Urological Conditions We Specialize In Expert medical and surgical management for the full range of adult urological conditions including complex neuro-urology. Neurogenic Bladder Complex bladder dysfunction resulting from neurological conditions — the most critical urological issue in our rehabilitation population. Expert urodynamic assessment and management for stroke, SCI, MS, and Parkinson's patients to prevent kidney damage and restore bladder control. Prostate & Voiding Disorders Benign prostate hyperplasia (BPH), prostate cancer screening, urinary incontinence, and overactive bladder. Minimally invasive surgical and medical options tailored to patient need and lifestyle. Kidney & Stone Disease Comprehensive management of kidney stones (nephrolithiasis), urinary tract infections (including complicated UTIs in catheterized patients), and kidney cyst management. UROLOGICAL SERVICES Comprehensive Urological Care Expert urological care for both standard conditions and the complex neuro-urological needs of our rehabilitation patients. 1 Urodynamic Studies & Neurogenic Bladder Management Expert urodynamic studies (cystometry, pressure flow studies) are used to precisely diagnose the type of neurogenic bladder dysfunction in our rehabilitation patients. Based on this, our urologists design comprehensive bladder management programs including clean intermittent catheterization (CIC) training, anticholinergic medications, Botox intravesical injections, and neuromodulation — protecting kidney function and dramatically improving patient independence and dignity. 2 Pelvic Floor & Bladder Rehabilitation Working in close collaboration with our physiotherapy and occupational therapy teams, urological rehabilitation focuses on pelvic floor retraining, bladder retraining programs, and the establishment of sustainable, safe catheter management routines that patients and caregivers can manage at home. 3 Ayurvedic Urological Support Powerful Ayurvedic renal and urinary tonics (Punarnava, Gokshura, Shilajit formulations) support bladder health, reduce inflammation, and enhance natural diuretic and anti-infective properties. These are integrated into our urological management programs to provide a comprehensive, holistic approach to urinary system health. 4 Minimally Invasive Urological Surgery Endoscopic procedures for stone removal (Ureteroscopy, PCNL), TURP for BPH, and cystoscopy for bladder diagnosis. Our minimally invasive approach means shorter hospital stays, less pain, and faster recovery — essential for patients also undergoing intensive rehabilitation. UROLOGICAL TECHNOLOGY Advanced Urological Capabilities State-of-the-art urological diagnostics and minimally invasive surgery for precise, effective treatment. Urodynamic Suite Comprehensive multi-channel urodynamic testing including cystometry, pressure flow studies, video urodynamics, and electromyography for precise diagnosis of bladder dysfunction. Flexible & Rigid Cystoscopy Advanced endoscopic visualization of the bladder and urethra for diagnosis and treatment of bladder pathology including stones, tumors, and strictures. Intravesical Botox Botulinum toxin injections into the bladder for severe neurogenic overactive bladder — dramatically reducing incontinence and urgency in rehabilitation patients. Ayurvedic Renal Tonics Punarnava, Gokshura, and Shilajit-based formulations supporting kidney filtration, bladder health, and urinary tract immunity as an integral part of the management program. UTI Prevention Protocols Specialized infection prevention protocols for catheter-dependent rehabilitation patients, significantly reducing catheter-associated urinary tract infection rates. RECOVERY TIMELINE Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence. 1. Assessment Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel. 2. Diagnosis Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors. 3. Personalized Plan Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols. 4. Therapy Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments. 5. Monitoring Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data. 6. Recovery Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan. COMMON QUERIES Frequently Asked Questions Find answers to key details about the Urology program. What is the recovery protocol for this program? Our recovery protocol for Urology combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains. How long is the typical inpatient stay? Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways. Is robotic therapy safe for all patients? Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists. Are the Ayurvedic medicines safe? All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state. Can we coordinate with our existing neurologist? Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care. What is the daily therapy schedule? A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon. Do you offer post-discharge support? Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains. How do I book a consultation? You can book a virtual consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly. Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway. function setupVideoCardEvents(container) { container.querySelectorAll('.story-card').forEach(card => { const video = card.querySelector('.story-card-video'); const playOverlay = card.querySelector('.story-play-overlay-btn'); const miniPlay = card.querySelector('.story-mini-play-btn'); const muteBtn = card.querySelector('.story-mute-btn'); if (muteBtn) { 7.07"/></svg>`; }); } const togglePlay = (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.story-open-ig-btn')) return; e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); // If video is paused or has no source yet const isNotPlaying = video.paused || !video.src || video.src === window.location.href; if (isNotPlaying) { // Pause and reset all other cards (restore their poster cover images) document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(otherVideo => { if (otherVideo !== video) { otherVideo.pause(); otherVideo.src = ""; // Clears the source to show poster otherVideo.load(); const otherCard = otherVideo.closest('.story-card'); otherCard.classList.remove('playing'); const otherMini = otherCard.querySelector('.story-mini-play-btn'); setMiniPlayIcon(otherMini, false); } }); // Dynamically set source if not set if (!video.src || video.src === window.location.href) { video.src = video.getAttribute('data-src') + "#t=0.001"; video.load(); } // Play video video.play().catch(err => console.log("Play interrupted:", err)); card.classList.add('playing'); setMiniPlayIcon(miniPlay, true); } else { // Stop current video video.pause(); video.src = ""; // Clear src to restore patient cover thumbnail video.load(); card.classList.remove('playing'); setMiniPlayIcon(miniPlay, false); // Restart auto-slider if no card is playing let anyPlaying = false; document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(v => { if (v.src && v.src !== "" && !v.paused) anyPlaying = true; }); if (!anyPlaying) { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); } } }; card.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); if (playOverlay) playOverlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); if (miniPlay) miniPlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); }); } // Auto sliding let videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); // Pause auto sliding on hover (only if no video is currently playing) const clipVideos = document.getElementById('clip-videos'); if (clipVideos) { clipVideos.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); }); clipVideos.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { let anyPlaying = false; document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(v => { if (!v.paused) anyPlaying = true; }); if (!anyPlaying) { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); } }); } function renderLifeGallery() { const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!rowTop || !rowBottom) return; const renderRow = (container, items) => { // No lazy loading — images need to measure their widths for the animation const markup = items.map((src) => { return `<img src="${src}" class="gallery-img" alt="Life at Ayurgreen">`; }).join(''); // Repeat the images 3 times for seamless wrapping container.innerHTML = markup + markup + markup; }; // Distribute images between top and bottom rows const topItems = []; const bottomItems = []; galleryImages.forEach((src, idx) => { if (idx % 2 === 0) { topItems.push(src); } else { bottomItems.push(src); } }); renderRow(rowTop, topItems); renderRow(rowBottom, bottomItems); } function initLifeGalleryAnimation() { const trigger = document.getElementById('life-gallery-trigger'); const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!trigger || !rowTop || !rowBottom) return; // Constant speed — never changes regardless of scroll const BASE_SPEED = 60; // pixels per second let trackTopWidth = 0; let trackBottomWidth = 0; let xTop = 0; let xBottom = 0; // direction: +1 = normal (scroll down), -1 = reversed (scroll up) let direction = 1; let targetDirection = 1; let lastScrollY = window.scrollY; let tickerAdded = false; let scrollListenerAdded = false; window.addEventListener('resize', () => { trackTopWidth = 0; trackBottomWidth = 0; }); function measureTracks() { const tw = rowTop.scrollWidth / 3; const bw = rowBottom.scrollWidth / 3; if (tw > 0) trackTopWidth = tw; if (bw > 0) trackBottomWidth = bw; } function runTicker() { if (tickerAdded) return; tickerAdded = true; measureTracks(); // Stagger the bottom row so rows are visually offset from each other if (trackBottomWidth > 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } // Detect scroll direction — set targetDirection, never touch speed if (!scrollListenerAdded) { scrollListenerAdded = true; window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { const current = window.scrollY; const delta = current - lastScrollY; lastScrollY = current; if (delta > 0) { // Scrolling down → normal direction targetDirection = 1; } else if (delta < 0) { // Scrolling up → reverse direction targetDirection = -1; } }, { passive: true }); } gsap.ticker.add((_time, deltaMs) => { const dt = Math.min(deltaMs / 1000, 0.05); // Re-measure if images haven't loaded widths yet if (trackTopWidth === 0 || trackBottomWidth === 0) { measureTracks(); if (trackBottomWidth > 0 && xBottom === 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } return; } // Smoothly interpolate direction so the flip feels natural, not jarring direction += (targetDirection - direction) * Math.min(dt * 5, 1); // Constant pixel step — speed never changes, only sign (direction) does const px = BASE_SPEED * direction * dt; xTop -= px; // top row: negative px = left, positive px = right xBottom += px; // bottom row: opposite direction always // Seamless infinite loop snapping if (xTop <= -trackTopWidth) xTop += trackTopWidth; if (xTop > 0) xTop -= trackTopWidth; if (xBottom >= 0) xBottom -= trackBottomWidth; if (xBottom < -trackBottomWidth) xBottom += trackBottomWidth; gsap.set(rowTop, { x: xTop, force3D: true }); gsap.set(rowBottom, { x: xBottom, force3D: true }); }); } // Start only when the gallery section scrolls into view if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) { const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { if (entries[0].isIntersecting) { observer.disconnect(); requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(runTicker)); } }, { threshold: 0.01 }); observer.observe(trigger); } else { setTimeout(runTicker, 500); } // Re-measure on resize window.addEventListener('resize', measureTracks, { passive: true }); // Re-measure when images load to ensure correct widths are used for animation const imgs = trigger.querySelectorAll('.gallery-img'); imgs.forEach(img => { if (img.complete) { measureTracks(); } else { img.addEventListener('load', measureTracks, { passive: true }); } }); } // Render stories dynamically from Instagram links renderDynamicStories(); setupInfiniteSlider(); initVideoSlider(); // Render Life Gallery renderLifeGallery(); initLifeGalleryAnimation(); // Understanding Ayurgreen Pinned Storytelling GSAP Timeline let mm = gsap.matchMedia(); mm.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Separate ScrollTrigger for the Title to reveal it immediately as the section enters the viewport gsap.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", ease: time it reaches top 40% scrub: 1.0 } }); // Pinned timeline starting at top top let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top top", end: "+=250%", pin: true, scrub: 1.2, invalidateOnRefresh: true } }); // Timeline starts directly with video reveal and scales up centered tl.to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 1.6, ease: "power2.out" }) .to({}, { duration: 2.0 }) // Pause to let the video settle in the center focus // Video shifts left, title stays at the top, card reveals .to(".storytelling-video-box", { xPercent: -15, scale: 0.95, duration: 1.8, ease: "power2.inOut" }) .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, x: 0, y: 30, scale: 1, duration: 1.8, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.8") .to({}, { duration: 0.8 }) // Settle card .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, stagger: 0.5, ease: "power2.out" }) .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.3") .to({}, { duration: 1.5 }); // Hold at final state }); mm.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 80%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); tl.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", duration: 0.6 }) .to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.2 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }, "-=0.2"); }); gsap.fromTo(".stories-bg-shape", { width: "70%" }, { width: "100%", ease: "power1.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: ".stories-relearning-section", start: "top bottom-=10%", end: "center center", scrub: 1.2, // Ultra smooth scroll scrubbing with lag invalidateOnRefresh: true } } ); // ADMIRE Ecosystem animations using gsap.matchMedia() let admireMM = gsap.matchMedia(); admireMM.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Desktop entry timeline let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top 75%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); gsap.set("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 0, y: 35 }); gsap.set(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 0, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 0 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.7, ease: "back.out(1.2)" }, 0) .to(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 1, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.1 }, 0) .to([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.12, ease: "power2.out" }, 0) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08, ease: "back.out(1.5)" }, 0.2); // Parallax scroll effect on cards gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-1", { y: -25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-2", { y: 15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-3", { y: -15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-4", { y: 25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); // Running dash lines let flowAnim = gsap.to(".admire-connecting-lines path", { strokeDashoffset: -30, duration: 2.5, repeat: -1, ease: "none" }); return () => { flowAnim.kill(); }; }); admireMM.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { // Mobile entry timeline (simplified stacking animations) let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top 80%", toggleActions: "play none none none" } }); gsap.set(["#admire-centerpiece", ".admire-info-card", ".admire-tag-pill"], { opacity: 0, y: 30 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08 }, "-=0.3") .to(".admire-info-card", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.15 }, "-=0.3"); }); window.addEventListener('resize', initVideoSlider); // --- Ayurgreen Ecosystem Redirection Configuration --- const ECOSYSTEM_URLS = { hospitals: '#', getwell: '#', niramaya: '#', herbals: '#', college: '#', scientifica: '#', shadarasa: '#', kizil: '#', foundation: '#', acfhe: '#' }; // ── Mobile Drawer Toggle Script ───────────────────────────────── function initMobileMenu() { const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn'); const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-drawer'); const closeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-close-btn'); const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-therapies', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-videos', () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(1); }, () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); });

title: Urology: Specialized Care for the Urinary System
desc: Urological conditions affecting the kidneys, bladder, and urinary tract are among the most common yet undertreated medical issues. They significantly impact dai...
content: Urology: Specialized Care for the Urinary System Urological conditions affecting the kidneys, bladder, and urinary tract are among the most common yet undertreated medical issues. They significantly impact daily life, personal dignity, and quality of life. Expert, compassionate urological care is essential to restore normal function and confidence. At Ayurgreen Hospital, our Urology Department provides a comprehensive range of urological services for adults of all ages. Our urologists are particularly expert in managing the complex neurogenic bladder and urological complications that frequently arise in patients with spinal cord injuries, stroke, and multiple sclerosis. This expertise in neuro-urology sets us apart as a center uniquely capable of providing truly comprehensive rehabilitation for neurological patients — addressing both their physical recovery AND their urological health in one seamlessly integrated program.

title: Urological Conditions We Specialize In
desc: Expert medical and surgical management for the full range of adult urological conditions including complex neuro-urology.
content: Urological Conditions We Specialize In Expert medical and surgical management for the full range of adult urological conditions including complex neuro-urology.

title: Comprehensive Urological Care
desc: Expert urological care for both standard conditions and the complex neuro-urological needs of our rehabilitation patients.
content: Comprehensive Urological Care Expert urological care for both standard conditions and the complex neuro-urological needs of our rehabilitation patients.

title: Urodynamic Studies & Neurogenic Bladder Management
desc: Expert urodynamic studies (cystometry, pressure flow studies) are used to precisely diagnose the type of neurogenic bladder dysfunction in our rehabilitation pa...
content: Urodynamic Studies & Neurogenic Bladder Management Expert urodynamic studies (cystometry, pressure flow studies) are used to precisely diagnose the type of neurogenic bladder dysfunction in our rehabilitation patients. Based on this, our urologists design comprehensive bladder management programs including clean intermittent catheterization (CIC) training, anticholinergic medications, Botox intravesical injections, and neuromodulation — protecting kidney function and dramatically improving patient independence and dignity.

title: Pelvic Floor & Bladder Rehabilitation
desc: Working in close collaboration with our physiotherapy and occupational therapy teams, urological rehabilitation focuses on pelvic floor retraining, bladder retr...
content: Pelvic Floor & Bladder Rehabilitation Working in close collaboration with our physiotherapy and occupational therapy teams, urological rehabilitation focuses on pelvic floor retraining, bladder retraining programs, and the establishment of sustainable, safe catheter management routines that patients and caregivers can manage at home.

title: Ayurvedic Urological Support
desc: Powerful Ayurvedic renal and urinary tonics (Punarnava, Gokshura, Shilajit formulations) support bladder health, reduce inflammation, and enhance natural diuret...
content: Ayurvedic Urological Support Powerful Ayurvedic renal and urinary tonics (Punarnava, Gokshura, Shilajit formulations) support bladder health, reduce inflammation, and enhance natural diuretic and anti-infective properties. These are integrated into our urological management programs to provide a comprehensive, holistic approach to urinary system health.

title: Minimally Invasive Urological Surgery
desc: Endoscopic procedures for stone removal (Ureteroscopy, PCNL), TURP for BPH, and cystoscopy for bladder diagnosis. Our minimally invasive approach means shorter ...
content: Minimally Invasive Urological Surgery Endoscopic procedures for stone removal (Ureteroscopy, PCNL), TURP for BPH, and cystoscopy for bladder diagnosis. Our minimally invasive approach means shorter hospital stays, less pain, and faster recovery — essential for patients also undergoing intensive rehabilitation.

title: Advanced Urological Capabilities
desc: State-of-the-art urological diagnostics and minimally invasive surgery for precise, effective treatment.
content: Advanced Urological Capabilities State-of-the-art urological diagnostics and minimally invasive surgery for precise, effective treatment.

title: Your Recovery Journey
desc: Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.
content: Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.

title: Start Your Recovery Journey Today
desc: Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway.

flex-direction: column; gap: 0; padding-top: 24px; } Explore Departments Departments Ayurveda Physiotherapy Robotic Rehabilitation Occupational Therapy Speech Therapy Virtual Reality Yoga and Meditation Acupuncture Reflexology Hydro / Aquatic Therapy Pediatrics Slimming Treatment Pain Management Diet & Nutrition Counseling Dentistry Modern Medicine Assistive Devices OVERVIEW Virtual Reality Rehabilitation: Immersive Technology for Faster Recovery Virtual Reality (VR) rehabilitation is one of the most exciting frontiers in modern medicine. By immersing patients in interactive, three-dimensional virtual environments, VR enables intensive, engaging, and measurable practice of movements and cognitive tasks that are impossible in conventional therapy settings. At Ayurgreen Hospital, our VR Rehabilitation Suite is at the forefront of therapeutic innovation. VR is used both as a standalone intervention and as a powerful complement to our robotic systems, physiotherapy, and cognitive rehabilitation programs. The scientific basis for VR rehabilitation is rooted in neuroplasticity — the brain's remarkable ability to form new neural connections in response to repetitive, task-specific training. VR provides this training in a uniquely engaging, motivating, and measurable way, enhancing patient adherence and accelerating recovery outcomes. VR APPLICATIONS VR Rehabilitation Indications Evidence-based VR rehabilitation for motor, cognitive, psychological, and pain management applications. Motor Rehabilitation Post-stroke hemiplegia, TBI motor deficits, Parkinson's gait training, balance disorders, and post-orthopedic rehabilitation. VR provides task-specific, high-repetition motor training in engaging game-like environments. Cognitive Rehabilitation Post-stroke and TBI cognitive deficits — memory, attention, processing speed, and executive function impairment. VR cognitive training provides adaptive, measurable, and highly engaging cognitive rehabilitation. Pain Management & Psychological Applications VR distraction therapy for procedural and chronic pain, VR exposure therapy for PTSD and phobias, and VR mindfulness environments for anxiety and stress management. VR APPLICATIONS Virtual Reality Rehabilitation Services Evidence-based VR therapy integrated within our comprehensive neurological and physical rehabilitation programs. 1 VR Motor & Gait Rehabilitation Immersive VR environments for task-specific motor training: reaching tasks in 3D space for hemiplegic arm recovery, balance games for postural training in Parkinson's and stroke, VR gait training with visual cues for freezing of gait, and mirror therapy VR for phantom limb pain and hemiplegia. The engaging nature of VR dramatically increases the repetitions patients perform voluntarily — the key driver of motor recovery. 2 VR Cognitive Rehabilitation Adaptive VR cognitive training programs targeting the specific cognitive deficits identified in neuropsychological assessment. Attention training in dynamic VR environments, spatial navigation tasks for memory rehabilitation, multi-task training for executive function, and VR daily living simulations (virtual kitchen, virtual shop) for real-world functional cognitive rehabilitation. 3 VR Pain Management & Desensitization VR distraction therapy reduces procedural pain (wound dressing, physiotherapy mobilization) and chronic neuropathic pain by redirecting neural processing resources away from pain signals. Graded exposure VR for CRPS desensitization and post-SCI pain management. VR mindfulness and relaxation programs for stress and anxiety reduction. 4 VR Social Skills & Vocational Training VR social skills training for autism spectrum disorder — providing safe, repeatable practice of complex social scenarios. VR vocational simulations for work hardening and return-to-work training. VR driving assessment environments for evaluating fitness to drive after neurological injury. VR TECHNOLOGY Advanced VR Rehabilitation Technology Cutting-edge VR systems providing immersive, measurable, and engaging rehabilitation experiences. Immersive VR Headsets High-resolution, low-latency VR headsets providing fully immersive 360° environments for motor, cognitive, and psychological rehabilitation applications. Motion Capture & Tracking Full-body motion tracking systems enabling precise measurement of movement quality and progress during VR motor rehabilitation. Adaptive Cognitive VR Programs AI-driven adaptive VR cognitive training programs that automatically adjust difficulty based on patient performance — ensuring optimal challenge for maximum cognitive rehabilitation benefit. VR-Robotic Integration Integration of VR environments with our robotic rehabilitation systems (G-EO, Armotion) — providing immersive VR gaming environments that enhance motivation during robotic gait and arm training. VR Mindfulness & Nature Environments Calming virtual nature environments integrated with Ayurvedic meditation and Yoga Nidra practices for stress management, anxiety reduction, and sleep improvement. RECOVERY TIMELINE Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence. 1. Assessment Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel. 2. Diagnosis Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors. 3. Personalized Plan Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols. 4. Therapy Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments. 5. Monitoring Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data. 6. Recovery Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan. COMMON QUERIES Frequently Asked Questions Find answers to key details about the Virtual Reality program. What is the recovery protocol for this program? Our recovery protocol for Virtual Reality combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains. How long is the typical inpatient stay? Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways. Is robotic therapy safe for all patients? Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists. Are the Ayurvedic medicines safe? All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state. Can we coordinate with our existing neurologist? Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care. What is the daily therapy schedule? A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon. Do you offer post-discharge support? Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains. How do I book a consultation? You can book a virtual consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly. Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway. const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!container || !clip) return; const gap = 18; const totalWidth = clip.clientWidth; // Dynamic card count based on viewport width let n = 5; if (totalWidth < 480) n = 1; else if (totalWidth < 768) n = 2; else if (totalWidth < 1024) n = 3; else if (totalWidth < 1366) n = 4; else n = 5; const cardWidth = (totalWidth - gap * (n - 1)) / n; container.querySelectorAll('.rehab-card').forEach(card => { card.style.width = cardWidth + 'px'; card.style.minWidth = cardWidth + 'px'; }); container._cardWidth = cardWidth; container._gap = gap; container._visibleCards = n; // save dynamic visible card count // Always reset position when (re-)initialising container._offset = 0; container.style.transition = 'none'; container.style.transform = 'translateX(0px)'; updateSliderNav(scrollId); } // ── Move cards left/right ───────────────────────────────────── function slideCards(scrollId, dir) { const container = document.getElementById(scrollId); if (!container) return; const cardWidth = container._cardWidth || 255; const gap = container._gap || 18; const n = container._visibleCards || 5; // read dynamic count const total = container.querySelectorAll('.rehab-card').length; const maxOffset = Math.max(0, total - n); container._offset = Math.min(Math.max((container._offset || 0) + dir, 0), maxOffset); const translateX = -(container._offset * (cardWidth + gap)); container.style.transform = 'translateX(' + translateX + 'px)'; container.style.transition = 'transform 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1)'; updateSliderNav(scrollId); } function updateSliderNav(scrollId) { const tabName = scrollId.replace('scroll-', ''); const container = document.getElementById(scrollId); if (!container) return; const n = container._visibleCards || 5; // read dynamic count const total = container.querySelectorAll('.rehab-card').length; const offset = container._offset || 0; const prevBtn = document.getElementById('btn-prev-' + tabName); const nextBtn = document.getElementById('btn-next-' + tabName); if (prevBtn) prevBtn.disabled = offset <= 0; if (nextBtn) nextBtn.disabled = offset >= total - n; } // ── Tab switching with ARIA updates ──────────────────────────── function switchRehabTab(tab) { const next = document.getElementById('tab-content-' + tab); const current = document.querySelector('.rehab-tab-content.tab-visible'); if (current === next) return; // Update tab buttons selection state document.querySelectorAll('.rehab-tab-btn').forEach(btn => { btn.classList.remove('active-tab'); btn.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'false'); }); const activeBtn = document.getElementById('tab-btn-' + tab); if (activeBtn) { activeBtn.classList.add('active-tab'); activeBtn.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'true'); } // Update tab panel visibility state if (current) { current.classList.remove('tab-visible'); current.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); } if (next) { next.classList.add('tab-visible'); next.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); } if (window.lucide) window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); initSliderWidth('scroll-' + tab); } // ── Init on load ────────────────────────────────────────────── window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initSliderWidth('scroll-programs'); initSliderWidth('scroll-therapies'); // Disable prev on load (both at position 0) ['programs', 'therapies'].forEach(t => { const btn = document.getElementById('btn-prev-' + t); if (btn) btn.disabled = true; }); }); window.addEventListener('resize', () => { ['programs', 'therapies'].forEach(t => initSliderWidth('scroll-' + t)); }); .minimal-footer { background-color: #ffffff; color: #333333; padding: 60px 0 20px; initVideoSlider); // --- Ayurgreen Ecosystem Redirection Configuration --- const ECOSYSTEM_URLS = { hospitals: '#', getwell: '#', niramaya: '#', herbals: '#', college: '#', scientifica: '#', shadarasa: '#', kizil: '#', foundation: '#', acfhe: '#' }; // ── Mobile Drawer Toggle Script ───────────────────────────────── function initMobileMenu() { const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn'); const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-drawer'); const closeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-close-btn'); const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-videos', () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(1); }, () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); });

title: Virtual Reality Rehabilitation: Immersive Technology for Faster Recovery
desc: Virtual Reality (VR) rehabilitation is one of the most exciting frontiers in modern medicine. By immersing patients in interactive, three-dimensional virtual en...
content: Virtual Reality Rehabilitation: Immersive Technology for Faster Recovery Virtual Reality (VR) rehabilitation is one of the most exciting frontiers in modern medicine. By immersing patients in interactive, three-dimensional virtual environments, VR enables intensive, engaging, and measurable practice of movements and cognitive tasks that are impossible in conventional therapy settings. At Ayurgreen Hospital, our VR Rehabilitation Suite is at the forefront of therapeutic innovation. VR is used both as a standalone intervention and as a powerful complement to our robotic systems, physiotherapy, and cognitive rehabilitation programs. The scientific basis for VR rehabilitation is rooted in neuroplasticity — the brain's remarkable ability to form new neural connections in response to repetitive, task-specific training. VR provides this training in a uniquely engaging, motivating, and measurable way, enhancing patient adherence and accelerating recovery outcomes.

title: VR Rehabilitation Indications
desc: Evidence-based VR rehabilitation for motor, cognitive, psychological, and pain management applications.
content: VR Rehabilitation Indications Evidence-based VR rehabilitation for motor, cognitive, psychological, and pain management applications.

title: Virtual Reality Rehabilitation Services
desc: Evidence-based VR therapy integrated within our comprehensive neurological and physical rehabilitation programs.
content: Virtual Reality Rehabilitation Services Evidence-based VR therapy integrated within our comprehensive neurological and physical rehabilitation programs.

title: VR Motor & Gait Rehabilitation
desc: Immersive VR environments for task-specific motor training: reaching tasks in 3D space for hemiplegic arm recovery, balance games for postural training in Parki...
content: VR Motor & Gait Rehabilitation Immersive VR environments for task-specific motor training: reaching tasks in 3D space for hemiplegic arm recovery, balance games for postural training in Parkinson's and stroke, VR gait training with visual cues for freezing of gait, and mirror therapy VR for phantom limb pain and hemiplegia. The engaging nature of VR dramatically increases the repetitions patients perform voluntarily — the key driver of motor recovery.

title: VR Cognitive Rehabilitation
desc: Adaptive VR cognitive training programs targeting the specific cognitive deficits identified in neuropsychological assessment. Attention training in dynamic VR ...
content: VR Cognitive Rehabilitation Adaptive VR cognitive training programs targeting the specific cognitive deficits identified in neuropsychological assessment. Attention training in dynamic VR environments, spatial navigation tasks for memory rehabilitation, multi-task training for executive function, and VR daily living simulations (virtual kitchen, virtual shop) for real-world functional cognitive rehabilitation.

title: VR Pain Management & Desensitization
desc: VR distraction therapy reduces procedural pain (wound dressing, physiotherapy mobilization) and chronic neuropathic pain by redirecting neural processing resour...
content: VR Pain Management & Desensitization VR distraction therapy reduces procedural pain (wound dressing, physiotherapy mobilization) and chronic neuropathic pain by redirecting neural processing resources away from pain signals. Graded exposure VR for CRPS desensitization and post-SCI pain management. VR mindfulness and relaxation programs for stress and anxiety reduction.

title: VR Social Skills & Vocational Training
desc: VR social skills training for autism spectrum disorder — providing safe, repeatable practice of complex social scenarios. VR vocational simulations for work har...
content: VR Social Skills & Vocational Training VR social skills training for autism spectrum disorder — providing safe, repeatable practice of complex social scenarios. VR vocational simulations for work hardening and return-to-work training. VR driving assessment environments for evaluating fitness to drive after neurological injury.

title: Advanced VR Rehabilitation Technology
desc: Cutting-edge VR systems providing immersive, measurable, and engaging rehabilitation experiences.
content: Advanced VR Rehabilitation Technology Cutting-edge VR systems providing immersive, measurable, and engaging rehabilitation experiences.

content: Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.

flex-direction: column; gap: 0; padding-top: 24px; } Explore Departments Departments Ayurveda Physiotherapy Robotic Rehabilitation Occupational Therapy Speech Therapy Virtual Reality Yoga and Meditation Acupuncture Reflexology Hydro / Aquatic Therapy Pediatrics Slimming Treatment Pain Management Diet & Nutrition Counseling Dentistry Modern Medicine Assistive Devices OVERVIEW Yoga & Meditation: Ancient Wisdom for Modern Healing Yoga and Meditation are not merely exercise or relaxation techniques — they are sophisticated, time-tested systems for optimizing the function of the body and mind. In the context of neurological and physical rehabilitation, yoga and meditation provide uniquely powerful benefits that complement and enhance every other aspect of recovery. At Ayurgreen Hospital, Yoga and Meditation are integral clinical components of our rehabilitation program, delivered by trained yoga therapists who understand neurological and orthopedic conditions. This is not a general wellness yoga class — it is therapeutic yoga and mindfulness, precisely customized to each patient's specific condition, stage of recovery, and rehabilitation goals. The scientific basis for yoga in rehabilitation is substantial: yoga improves balance, flexibility, strength, and respiratory function; reduces stress hormones that impair healing; decreases pain and spasticity; enhances mindfulness and cognitive function; and improves the psychological wellbeing that drives rehabilitation engagement. YOGA THERAPY APPLICATIONS How Yoga Supports Rehabilitation Therapeutic yoga and meditation integrated into neurological, orthopedic, and wellness rehabilitation programs. Neurological Rehabilitation Therapeutic yoga for stroke, Parkinson's, TBI, and spinal cord injury — improving balance, strength, flexibility, and motor control while reducing spasticity and improving psychological wellbeing. Chronic Pain & Musculoskeletal Conditions Yoga for back pain, arthritis, chronic fatigue, and post-surgical recovery — combining physical postures, breathwork, and mindfulness for comprehensive pain management and functional improvement. Stress, Mental Health & Wellness Mindfulness-based yoga and meditation for anxiety, depression, sleep disorders, and stress — both for rehabilitation patients and community wellness seekers. YOGA THERAPY SERVICES Therapeutic Yoga & Meditation Programs Customized therapeutic yoga and meditation precisely adapted for each patient's neurological and physical condition. 1 Individualized Therapeutic Yoga One-to-one therapeutic yoga sessions customized to each patient's condition and rehabilitation stage. For stroke patients — chair yoga focusing on range of motion and breathing; for Parkinson's — balance-specific yoga sequences addressing postural instability and gait; for SCI — breathing yoga (Pranayama) and upper body yoga; for back pain — targeted spine mobilization sequences. All programs are carefully modified to be safe and beneficial for each condition. 2 Pranayama (Breathing Therapy) Therapeutic breathwork for rehabilitation: Nadi Shodhana (alternate nostril breathing) balances the nervous system and reduces anxiety; Kapalabhati improves respiratory function and energy; Bhramari (humming bee breath) reduces stress and improves voice quality for speech rehabilitation; Anulom Vilom improves lung capacity and oxygenation. Pranayama is particularly valuable for respiratory rehabilitation and stress management. 3 Yoga Nidra & Mindfulness Meditation Yoga Nidra (yogic sleep) is a deeply therapeutic guided relaxation practice proven to reduce pain, improve sleep quality, reduce anxiety and PTSD symptoms, and restore vitality. It is particularly valuable for rehabilitation patients dealing with chronic pain, sleep disturbance, and psychological distress. Mindfulness meditation practice builds the non-reactive awareness that supports both physical recovery and emotional wellbeing. 4 Yoga-Ayurveda Integration The synergy between Yoga and Ayurveda is profound and clinically powerful. Our yoga therapists work in coordination with Ayurvedic physicians to ensure that yoga practice is aligned with each patient's Ayurvedic constitution (Prakriti) and current imbalances (Vikriti). Post-Ayurvedic treatment yoga sessions consolidate the therapeutic effects of oil treatments and internal medicines. YOGA THERAPY TOOLS Yoga & Meditation Therapy Capabilities Evidence-based therapeutic yoga and meditation for neurological, physical, and psychological rehabilitation. Adaptive Yoga Equipment Specialized yoga props (bolsters, blocks, chairs, wall bars) enabling yoga practice for patients with significant physical limitations — ensuring yoga is accessible and therapeutic for all. Pranayama Therapy Room Dedicated therapeutic breathing practice space with biofeedback monitoring of respiratory parameters during Pranayama therapy — ensuring effective, safe breathwork. VR Meditation Environments Immersive VR nature environments paired with guided mindfulness meditation and Yoga Nidra — enhancing the depth and effectiveness of relaxation practice for rehabilitation patients. Yoga-Ayurveda Coordination Yoga therapy sessions precisely coordinated with Ayurvedic treatment schedules — ensuring yoga postures and breathwork complement and consolidate the effects of Panchakarma and herbal medicines. Yoga Therapy Assessment Structured yoga therapy assessment evaluating flexibility, strength, balance, respiratory function, and psychological wellbeing before and after yoga therapy programs — measuring outcomes objectively. RECOVERY TIMELINE Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence. 1. Assessment Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel. 2. Diagnosis Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors. 3. Personalized Plan Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols. 4. Therapy Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments. 5. Monitoring Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data. 6. Recovery Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan. COMMON QUERIES Frequently Asked Questions Find answers to key details about the Yoga and Meditation program. What is the recovery protocol for this program? Our recovery protocol for Yoga and Meditation combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains. How long is the typical inpatient stay? Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways. Is robotic therapy safe for all patients? Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists. Are the Ayurvedic medicines safe? All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state. Can we coordinate with our existing neurologist? Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care. What is the daily therapy schedule? A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon. Do you offer post-discharge support? Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains. How do I book a consultation? You can book a virtual consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly. Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway. document.getElementById('life-gallery-trigger'); const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!trigger || !rowTop || !rowBottom) return; // Constant speed — never changes regardless of scroll const BASE_SPEED = 60; // pixels per second let trackTopWidth = 0; let trackBottomWidth = 0; let xTop = 0; let xBottom = 0; // direction: +1 = normal (scroll down), -1 = reversed (scroll up) let direction = 1; let targetDirection = 1; let lastScrollY = window.scrollY; let tickerAdded = false; let scrollListenerAdded = false; window.addEventListener('resize', () => { trackTopWidth = 0; trackBottomWidth = 0; }); function measureTracks() { const tw = rowTop.scrollWidth / 3; const bw = rowBottom.scrollWidth / 3; if (tw > 0) trackTopWidth = tw; if (bw > 0) trackBottomWidth = bw; } function runTicker() { if (tickerAdded) return; tickerAdded = true; measureTracks(); // Stagger the bottom row so rows are visually offset from each other if (trackBottomWidth > 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } // Detect scroll direction — set targetDirection, never touch speed if (!scrollListenerAdded) { scrollListenerAdded = true; window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { const current = window.scrollY; const delta = current - lastScrollY; lastScrollY = current; if (delta > 0) { // Scrolling down → normal direction targetDirection = 1; } else if (delta < 0) { // Scrolling up → reverse direction targetDirection = -1; } }, { passive: true }); } gsap.ticker.add((_time, deltaMs) => { const dt = Math.min(deltaMs / 1000, 0.05); // Re-measure if images haven't loaded widths yet if (trackTopWidth === 0 || trackBottomWidth === 0) { measureTracks(); if (trackBottomWidth > 0 && xBottom === 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } return; } // Smoothly interpolate direction so the flip feels natural, not jarring direction += (targetDirection - direction) * Math.min(dt * 5, 1); // Constant pixel step — speed never changes, only sign (direction) does const px = BASE_SPEED * direction * dt; xTop -= px; // top row: negative px = left, positive px = right xBottom += px; // bottom row: opposite direction always // Seamless infinite loop snapping if (xTop <= -trackTopWidth) xTop += trackTopWidth; if (xTop > 0) xTop -= trackTopWidth; if (xBottom >= 0) xBottom -= trackBottomWidth; if (xBottom < -trackBottomWidth) xBottom += trackBottomWidth; gsap.set(rowTop, { x: xTop, force3D: true }); gsap.set(rowBottom, { x: xBottom, force3D: true }); }); } // Start only when the gallery section scrolls into view if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) { const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { if (entries[0].isIntersecting) { observer.disconnect(); requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(runTicker)); } }, { threshold: 0.01 }); observer.observe(trigger); } else { setTimeout(runTicker, 500); } // Re-measure on resize window.addEventListener('resize', measureTracks, { passive: true }); // Re-measure when images load to ensure correct widths are used for animation const imgs = trigger.querySelectorAll('.gallery-img'); imgs.forEach(img => { if (img.complete) { measureTracks(); } else { img.addEventListener('load', measureTracks, { passive: true }); } }); } // Render stories dynamically from Instagram links renderDynamicStories(); setupInfiniteSlider(); initVideoSlider(); // Render Life Gallery renderLifeGallery(); initLifeGalleryAnimation(); // Understanding Ayurgreen Pinned Storytelling GSAP Timeline let mm = gsap.matchMedia(); mm.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Separate ScrollTrigger for the Title to reveal it immediately as the section enters the viewport gsap.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", ease: "power2.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 95%", // Starts revealing immediately when it starts entering the viewport end: "top 40%", // Fully revealed by the time it reaches top 40% scrub: 1.0 } }); // Pinned timeline starting at top top let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top top", end: "+=250%", pin: true, scrub: 1.2, invalidateOnRefresh: true } }); // Timeline starts directly with video reveal and scales up centered tl.to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 1.6, ease: "power2.out" }) .to({}, { duration: 2.0 }) // Pause to let the video settle in the center focus // Video shifts left, title stays at the top, card reveals .to(".storytelling-video-box", { xPercent: -15, scale: 0.95, duration: 1.8, ease: "power2.inOut" }) .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, x: 0, y: 30, scale: 1, duration: 1.8, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.8") .to({}, { duration: 0.8 }) // Settle card .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, stagger: 0.5, ease: "power2.out" }) .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.3") .to({}, { duration: 1.5 }); // Hold at final state }); mm.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 80%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); tl.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", duration: 0.6 }) .to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.2 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }, "-=0.2"); }); gsap.fromTo(".stories-bg-shape", { width: "70%" }, { width: "100%", ease: "power1.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: ".stories-relearning-section", start: "top bottom-=10%", end: "center center", scrub: 1.2, // Ultra smooth scroll scrubbing with lag invalidateOnRefresh: true } } ); // ADMIRE Ecosystem animations using gsap.matchMedia() let admireMM = gsap.matchMedia(); admireMM.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Desktop entry timeline let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top 75%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); gsap.set("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 0, y: 35 }); gsap.set(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 0, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 0 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.7, ease: "back.out(1.2)" }, 0) .to(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 1, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.1 }, 0) .to([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.12, ease: "power2.out" }, 0) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08, ease: "back.out(1.5)" }, 0.2); // Parallax scroll effect on cards gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-1", { y: -25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-2", { y: 15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-3", { y: -15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-4", { y: 25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); // Running dash lines let flowAnim = gsap.to(".admire-connecting-lines path", { strokeDashoffset: -30, duration: 2.5, repeat: -1, ease: "none" }); return () => { flowAnim.kill(); }; }); admireMM.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { // Mobile entry timeline (simplified stacking animations) let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top 80%", toggleActions: "play none none none" } }); gsap.set(["#admire-centerpiece", ".admire-info-card", ".admire-tag-pill"], { opacity: 0, y: 30 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08 }, "-=0.3") .to(".admire-info-card", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.15 }, "-=0.3"); }); window.addEventListener('resize', initVideoSlider); // --- Ayurgreen Ecosystem Redirection Configuration --- const ECOSYSTEM_URLS = { hospitals: '#', getwell: '#', niramaya: '#', herbals: '#', college: '#', scientifica: '#', shadarasa: '#', kizil: '#', foundation: '#', acfhe: '#' }; // ── Mobile Drawer Toggle Script ───────────────────────────────── function initMobileMenu() { const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn'); const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-drawer'); const closeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-close-btn'); const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-therapies', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-videos', () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(1); }, () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); });

title: Yoga & Meditation: Ancient Wisdom for Modern Healing
desc: Yoga and Meditation are not merely exercise or relaxation techniques — they are sophisticated, time-tested systems for optimizing the function of the body and m...
content: Yoga & Meditation: Ancient Wisdom for Modern Healing Yoga and Meditation are not merely exercise or relaxation techniques — they are sophisticated, time-tested systems for optimizing the function of the body and mind. In the context of neurological and physical rehabilitation, yoga and meditation provide uniquely powerful benefits that complement and enhance every other aspect of recovery. At Ayurgreen Hospital, Yoga and Meditation are integral clinical components of our rehabilitation program, delivered by trained yoga therapists who understand neurological and orthopedic conditions. This is not a general wellness yoga class — it is therapeutic yoga and mindfulness, precisely customized to each patient's specific condition, stage of recovery, and rehabilitation goals. The scientific basis for yoga in rehabilitation is substantial: yoga improves balance, flexibility, strength, and respiratory function; reduces stress hormones that impair healing; decreases pain and spasticity; enhances mindfulness and cognitive function; and improves the psychological wellbeing that drives rehabilitation engagement.

title: How Yoga Supports Rehabilitation
desc: Therapeutic yoga and meditation integrated into neurological, orthopedic, and wellness rehabilitation programs.
content: How Yoga Supports Rehabilitation Therapeutic yoga and meditation integrated into neurological, orthopedic, and wellness rehabilitation programs.

title: Therapeutic Yoga & Meditation Programs
desc: Customized therapeutic yoga and meditation precisely adapted for each patient's neurological and physical condition.
content: Therapeutic Yoga & Meditation Programs Customized therapeutic yoga and meditation precisely adapted for each patient's neurological and physical condition.

title: Individualized Therapeutic Yoga
desc: One-to-one therapeutic yoga sessions customized to each patient's condition and rehabilitation stage. For stroke patients — chair yoga focusing on range of moti...
content: Individualized Therapeutic Yoga One-to-one therapeutic yoga sessions customized to each patient's condition and rehabilitation stage. For stroke patients — chair yoga focusing on range of motion and breathing; for Parkinson's — balance-specific yoga sequences addressing postural instability and gait; for SCI — breathing yoga (Pranayama) and upper body yoga; for back pain — targeted spine mobilization sequences. All programs are carefully modified to be safe and beneficial for each condition.

title: Pranayama (Breathing Therapy)
desc: Therapeutic breathwork for rehabilitation: Nadi Shodhana (alternate nostril breathing) balances the nervous system and reduces anxiety; Kapalabhati improves res...
content: Pranayama (Breathing Therapy) Therapeutic breathwork for rehabilitation: Nadi Shodhana (alternate nostril breathing) balances the nervous system and reduces anxiety; Kapalabhati improves respiratory function and energy; Bhramari (humming bee breath) reduces stress and improves voice quality for speech rehabilitation; Anulom Vilom improves lung capacity and oxygenation. Pranayama is particularly valuable for respiratory rehabilitation and stress management.

title: Yoga Nidra & Mindfulness Meditation
desc: Yoga Nidra (yogic sleep) is a deeply therapeutic guided relaxation practice proven to reduce pain, improve sleep quality, reduce anxiety and PTSD symptoms, and ...
content: Yoga Nidra & Mindfulness Meditation Yoga Nidra (yogic sleep) is a deeply therapeutic guided relaxation practice proven to reduce pain, improve sleep quality, reduce anxiety and PTSD symptoms, and restore vitality. It is particularly valuable for rehabilitation patients dealing with chronic pain, sleep disturbance, and psychological distress. Mindfulness meditation practice builds the non-reactive awareness that supports both physical recovery and emotional wellbeing.

title: Yoga-Ayurveda Integration
desc: The synergy between Yoga and Ayurveda is profound and clinically powerful. Our yoga therapists work in coordination with Ayurvedic physicians to ensure that yog...
content: Yoga-Ayurveda Integration The synergy between Yoga and Ayurveda is profound and clinically powerful. Our yoga therapists work in coordination with Ayurvedic physicians to ensure that yoga practice is aligned with each patient's Ayurvedic constitution (Prakriti) and current imbalances (Vikriti). Post-Ayurvedic treatment yoga sessions consolidate the therapeutic effects of oil treatments and internal medicines.
